en: Your brain can easily confuse hunger and thirst. If you feel hungry, try a glass of water first.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
Type: tip
Context: Plain-language hydration tip — the brain can confuse hunger and thirst signals; trying a glass of water first may help.
Register: casual T-form — tips are friendly health-conscious companion voice, not medical lecture (default for non-formal surfaces, see § Brand voice § Pronouns).

t.ar: لا يمكن للعقل البشري في الغالب التمييز بين الجوع والعطش. إذا شعرت بالجوع، اشرب كوبًا من الماء.
t.da: Den menneskelige hjerne kan næsten ikke skelne mellem sult og tørst. Drik et glas vand, hvis du føler dig sulten.
t.de: Dein Gehirn verwechselt Hunger und Durst leicht. Wenn du Hunger hast, trink zuerst ein Glas Wasser.
t.en: Your brain can easily confuse hunger and thirst. If you feel hungry, try a glass of water first.
t.es: El cerebro puede confundir fácilmente el hambre y la sed. Si tienes hambre, bebe un vaso de agua primero.
t.fr: Ton cerveau confond facilement la faim et la soif. Si tu as faim, bois d'abord un verre d'eau.
t.hi: हमारा दिमाग़ अक्सर भूख और प्यास में फ़र्क़ नहीं कर पाता। भूख लगने पर एक गिलास पानी पियो।
t.id: Otakmu mudah keliru membedakan lapar dan haus. Kalau lapar, coba minum segelas air dulu.
t.it: Il cervello umano non distingue tra fame e sete. Se hai fame, bevi un bicchiere d’acqua.
t.ja: 人間の脳は空腹と喉の渇きをほとんど見分けることができません。お腹が空いたと思ったら、水を一杯飲んでみてください。
t.ko: 우리 뇌는 배고픔과 목마름을 쉽게 헷갈릴 수 있어요. 배고프다면 먼저 물 한 잔을 마셔 보세요.
t.ms: Otak manusia hampir tidak dapat membezakan antara lapar dan dahaga. Jika awak rasa lapar, minum segelas air.
t.nb: Menneskets hjerne kan knapt skille mellom sult og tørst. Hvis du føler deg sulten, drikk et glass vann.
t.nl: Je brein verwart honger en dorst gemakkelijk. Voel je je hongerig? Probeer dan eerst een glas water.
t.pl: Mózg łatwo myli głód z pragnieniem. Jeśli czujesz głód, najpierw wypij szklankę wody.
t.pt_BR: O cérebro humano quase nunca consegue diferenciar a fome da sede. Se você estiver com fome, beba um copo de água.
t.ru: Мозг легко путает голод и жажду. Если чувствуешь голод, сначала выпей стакан воды.
t.sv: Den mänskliga hjärnan kan nästan inte skilja på hunger och törst. Om du känner dig hungrig, prova ett glas vatten först.
t.tr: İnsan beyni açlık ve susuzluk arasında neredeyse ayrım yapmaz. Kendini aç hissediyorsan bir bardak su iç.
t.vi: Não bộ của con người gần như không thể phân biệt rõ giữa đói và khát. Nếu bạn thấy đói, hãy uống một cốc nước.
t.zh_CN: 大脑无法区分饥饿、口渴这两种感觉，如果你饿了，就喝杯水吧！

en: Have a nice day! Don't forget to drink water!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Warm daily greeting that reminds the user to drink water.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: طاب يومك! لا تنس شرب الماء!
t.da: Hav en god dag! Glem ikke at drikke vand!
t.de: Schönen Tag noch! Vergiss nicht, Wasser zu trinken!
t.en: Have a nice day! Don't forget to drink water!
t.es: ¡Que tengas un buen día! ¡No te olvides de beber agua!
t.fr: Bonne journée! N'oublie pas de boire de l'eau!
t.hi: तुम्हारा दिन अच्छा हो! पानी पीना मत भूलना!
t.id: Semoga harimu menyenangkan! Jangan lupa minum air!
t.it: Buona giornata! Non dimenticare di bere tanta acqua!
t.ja: 良い一日を！水を飲むのを忘れないでください！
t.ko: 좋은 하루 되세요! 물을 마시는 것을 잊지 마세요!
t.ms: Semoga hari awak baik! Jangan lupa minum air!
t.nb: Ha en fin dag! Ikke glem å drikke vann!
t.nl: Fijne dag! Vergeet niet om water te drinken!
t.pl: Udanego dnia! Nie zapomnij pić wody!
t.pt_BR: Tenha um bom dia! Não se esqueça de beber água!
t.ru: Хорошего дня! Не забывай пить воду!
t.sv: Ha en bra dag! Glöm inte att dricka vatten!
t.vi: Chúc một ngày tốt lành! Đừng quên uống nước nhé!
t.zh_CN: 祝你开心一整天，别忘了多喝水！

en: I reached my daily water goal! Help your body, download the "My Water" app - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater

Type: paragraph (social share)
Context: First-person brag-style post saying the user hit their daily water goal and inviting friends to download the app. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with socialShareTextVkM for subject-gender agreement where the past-tense verb / adjective inflects (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Constraints: Preserve the URL (https://victorsharov.com/mywater) and the #mywater hashtag verbatim; keep the "My Water" brand quotes.
Tone: friendly, casual first person.

t.ko: 저는 오늘 하루 물 목표량을 다 마셨어요! 몸도 챙겨 보세요. "My Water" 앱을 받아보세요 - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater

t.nb: Jeg drakk den nødvendige daglige vannmengden. Hjelp kroppen din, last ned appen \"Mitt Vann\" - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.nl: Ik heb mijn dagelijkse waterdoel gehaald! Help je lichaam, download de "My Water"-app - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.pl: Wypiłam dziś wymaganą dzienną ilość wody. Pomóż swojemu ciału, pobierz aplikację \"Moja woda\" - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.pt_BR: Bebi o volume diário de água necessário. Ajude seu corpo, baixe o aplicativo \"My Water\"! - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.ru: Я выпила свой дневной объём воды. Помоги и ты своему организму, скачай приложение "Моя вода" - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.sv: Jag drack den nödvändiga dagliga vattenmängden. Hjälp din kropp, ladda ner appen \"Mitt Vatten\" - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.tr: Bugün günlük su hedefime ulaştım. Sen de vücuduna yardım et, "Benim suyum" uygulamasını indir - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.vi: Tôi đã uống đủ lượng nước cần thiết trong ngày. Hãy giúp cơ thể bạn, tải ứng dụng "My Water" - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater
t.zh_CN: 我今天喝够了每日所需的水量！为了健康，快下载 My Water 应用吧 - https://victorsharov.com/mywater #mywater

en: Well done, don’t forget to drink water tomorrow!
context:

Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Godt klaret, glem ikke at drikke vand i morgen!
t.de: Gut gemacht! Denk daran, morgen Wasser zu trinken!
t.en: Well done, don’t forget to drink water tomorrow!
t.es: ¡Buen trabajo, no olvides beber agua mañana!
t.fr: Bravo, n'oublie pas de boire de l'eau demain!
t.hi: शाबाश! कल भी पानी पीना मत भूलना!
t.id: Bagus sekali, jangan lupa minum air besok juga!

t.ko: 잘했어요, 내일도 물 마시는 거 잊지 마요!
t.ms: Bagus sekali, jangan lupa minum air esok juga!
t.nb: Godt jobba, ikke glem å drikke vann i morgen!
t.nl: Goed gedaan, vergeet niet om morgen water te drinken!
t.pl: Dobra robota, nie zapomnij jutro pić wody!
t.pt_BR: Muito bem, não se esqueça de beber água amanhã!

t.vi: Tốt lắm, đừng quên uống nước vào ngày mai!

Constraints: Keep short (single word where possible).

Surface: Social share post body (Facebook / generic share sheet) — main screen "share today's result" flow for male users.
Type: social share post body
Context: First-person message the user posts after completing the daily water goal. The user speaks as "I"; this is the male-form variant paired with `socialShareTextFbF` (female). In languages with grammatical gender, past-tense verbs / participles / adjectives agreeing with the speaker must use masculine forms. In English both variants may read the same; in target language adjust for the speaker's gender. Wording uses legacy "rate" (= daily goal); keep aligned with how the daily goal is named in target language.
Constraints: Preserve the `#mywater` hashtag and the quoted brand name "My Water" (use locale-standard quotation marks).

t.ar: لقد حققت هدفي اليومي من الماء اليوم! ساعد جسمك، حمّل "My Water"! #mywater
t.da: Jeg nåede mit daglige vandmål i dag! Hjælp din krop, download "Mit vand"! #mywater
t.de: Ich habe heute mein Tagesziel erreicht! Hilf deinem Körper, lade "Mein Wasser" herunter! #mywater
t.en: I reached my daily water goal today! Help your body, download "My Water"! #mywater
t.es: ¡Hoy he alcanzado mi meta diaria de agua! Ayuda a tu cuerpo, ¡descarga "My Water"! #mywater
t.fr: J'ai atteint mon objectif quotidien. Aide ton corps, télécharge My Water ! #mywater
t.hi: आज मैं अपने पानी के लक्ष्य तक पहुँच गया! अपने शरीर की मदद करो, "My Water" डाउनलोड करो! #mywater
t.id: Hari ini saya mencapai target air harian saya! Bantu tubuhmu juga, unduh "My Water"! #mywater
t.it: Oggi ho raggiunto il mio obiettivo d'acqua! Aiuta il tuo corpo, scarica "La mia acqua"! #mywater
t.ja: 今日の目標を達成しました！体のために、「My Water」をダウンロードしよう！#mywater
t.ko: 오늘 하루 물 목표를 달성했어요! 몸을 챙기고 "My Water" 앱을 받아보세요! #mywater
t.ms: Saya dah capai matlamat air harian saya hari ini! Bantu badan awak, muat turun "Air saya"! #mywater
t.nb: Jeg nådde det daglige vannmålet mitt i dag! Hjelp kroppen din, last ned "Mitt Vann"! #mywater
t.nl: Ik heb vandaag mijn dagelijkse waterdoel gehaald! Help je lichaam, download "My Water"! #mywater
t.pl: Dziś osiągnąłem swój dzienny cel wody! Pomóż swojemu ciału, pobierz "Moja woda"! #mywater
t.pt_BR: Atingi minha meta diária de água hoje! Ajude seu corpo, baixe o "My Water"! #mywater
t.ru: Я достиг дневной цели по воде! Помоги своему организму, скачай "Моя вода"! #mywater
t.sv: Jag nådde mitt dagliga vattenmål idag! Hjälp din kropp, ladda ner "Mitt Vatten"! #mywater
t.tr: Bugün günlük su hedefime ulaştım! Sen de vücuduna yardım et, "Benim suyum" uygulamasını indir! #mywater
t.vi: Hôm nay tôi đã đạt mục tiêu uống nước hàng ngày! Hãy giúp cơ thể bạn, tải "My Water"! #mywater
t.zh_CN: 我今天达成了每日饮水目标！为了健康，快下载My Water吧！ #mywater

en: Alcohol pulls water from your body, so your daily water goal is higher
context:
Surface: Add drink / drink-volume screen — info alert shown when the user adds an alcoholic beverage (also triggered from the debug shake menu).
Type: paragraph (educational alert body)
Context: Educational message explaining that alcohol has a dehydrating effect — it removes water from the body, so the daily water goal will be increased accordingly. Tone is informative, plain-language, body-positive (frames the goal increase as a helpful adjustment, not a warning).
Constraints: Alert body — fits a 1-2 sentence info dialog; trailing period intentionally omitted in source (preserve target-language sentence punctuation conventions).

t.ar: الكحول يسحب الماء من جسمك، لذلك يصبح هدفك اليومي من الماء أكبر
t.da: Alkohol trækker vand ud af kroppen, så dit daglige vandmål bliver højere
t.de: Alkohol entzieht dem Körper Wasser, deshalb ist das Tagesziel höher
t.en: Alcohol pulls water from your body, so your daily water goal is higher
t.es: El alcohol extrae agua de tu cuerpo, por lo que tu objetivo diario de agua será mayor
t.fr: L'alcool déshydrate ton corps, ton objectif quotidien d'eau est donc plus élevé
t.hi: शराब शरीर से पानी खींच लेती है, इसलिए पानी का दैनिक लक्ष्य बढ़ जाता है
t.id: Alkohol menarik air dari tubuh, sehingga target air harian akan lebih tinggi.
t.it: L'alcol sottrae acqua al corpo, perciò il tuo obiettivo giornaliero aumenta
t.ja: アルコールは体から水分を奪うので、一日の目標が増えます。
t.ko: 알코올은 몸에서 수분을 빼앗기 때문에 하루 물 목표가 늘어나요
t.ms: Alkohol menarik air dari tubuh, jadi matlamat air harian awak lebih tinggi
t.nb: Alkohol trekker vann ut av kroppen, så det daglige vannmålet ditt blir høyere
t.nl: Alcohol haalt water uit je lichaam, daarom is je dagelijkse waterdoel hoger
t.pl: Alkohol odbiera organizmowi wodę, więc twój dzienny cel wody będzie większy
t.pt_BR: O álcool retira água do corpo, então sua meta diária de água é maior
t.ru: Алкоголь забирает воду из организма, поэтому дневная цель по воде будет выше
t.sv: Alkohol drar vatten ur din kropp, så ditt dagliga mål blir högre
t.tr: Alkol vücudundan su çeker, bu yüzden günlük su hedefin artar
t.vi: Rượu lấy đi một phần nước trong cơ thể, vì vậy mục tiêu uống nước hàng ngày của bạn sẽ cao hơn
t.zh_CN: 酒精会带走体内水分，因此每日饮水目标会相应提高。

t.it: Ti abbiamo inviato un'email con il link per reimpostare la password

t.ms: Pautan tetapan semula kata laluan telah dihantar ke alamat e-mel awak.
t.nb: Vi har sendt deg en e-post med en lenke for å tilbakestille passordet ditt
t.nl: We hebben een e-mail gestuurd met een link om je wachtwoord te resetten
t.pl: Wysłaliśmy ci wiadomość e-mail z odnośnikiem do zresetowania hasła
t.pt_BR: Enviamos um e-mail com um link para redefinir sua senha
t.ru: Ссылка для восстановления пароля отправлена на почту.
t.sv: Ett e-postmeddelande med en länk för att återställa ditt lösenord har skickats till dig
t.tr: E-posta adresine bir şifre sıfırlama bağlantısı gönderildi
t.vi: Một email có chứa liên kết để thiết lập lại mật khẩu đã được gửi cho bạn
t.zh_CN: 包含重置密码链接的邮件已经发送给你了。

t.sv: Bra jobbat, du har klarat det!
t.vi: Tốt lắm, bạn đã làm được rồi!

en: Well done! Start tomorrow with a glass of water again!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Praise plus encouragement to begin tomorrow the same way — with a glass of water. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with text4_14M for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: أحسنت، ابدئي غدًا بكوب ماء مرة أخرى!
t.da: Godt klaret, start med et glas vand igen i morgen!
t.de: Gut gemacht! Fange morgen deinen Tag mit einem Glas Wasser an!
t.en: Well done! Start tomorrow with a glass of water again!
t.es: Buen trabajo, ¡mañana empieza el día con otro vaso de agua!
t.fr: Bravo, demain commence à nouveau avec un verre d'eau!
t.hi: बहुत अच्छे! कल फिर एक गिलास पानी से शुरू करना!
t.id: Hebat, mulai besok juga dengan segelas air!

t.pl: Dobra robota, jutro znów rozpocznij dzień od szklanki wody!
t.pt_BR: Muito bem, amanhã comece de novo com um copo de água!
t.ru: Молодец, начни и завтра свой день со стакана воды!
t.sv: Bra jobbat, börja morgondagen med ett glas vatten igen!
t.tr: Aferin, yarın da güne bir bardak su ile başla!
t.vi: Làm tốt lắm, ngày mai lại bắt đầu với một cốc nước!
t.zh_CN: 做得好，明天也用一杯水开启新的一天吧！

t.ar: أيقظ جسمك، اشرب كوبًا من الماء
t.da: Væk din krop og drik et glas vand
t.de: Wecke deinen Körper auf – trinke ein Glas Wasser
t.en: Awaken your body, drink a glass of water

t.hi: अपने शरीर को जगाओ, एक गिलास पानी पियो

en: During intense exercise, don’t forget to rest and drink plenty of water.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
Type: tip
Context: Plain-language hydration tip — remember to rest and replenish water during intense physical activity.
Register: casual T-form — tips are friendly health-conscious companion voice, not medical lecture (default for non-formal surfaces, see § Brand voice § Pronouns).

t.ar: أثناء ممارسة النشاط البدني المكثف لا تنسَ أخذ قسط من الراحة وشرب كمية كافية من الماء.
t.da: Husk at hvile og drikke rigeligt med vand under hård træning.
t.de: Vergiss bei intensivem Training nicht, Pausen zu machen und viel Wasser zu trinken.
t.en: During intense exercise, don’t forget to rest and drink plenty of water.
t.es: Durante una actividad física intensa, no olvides descansar y beber mucha agua.
t.fr: Pendant un effort physique intense, pense à te reposer et à boire beaucoup d'eau.
t.hi: ज़ोरदार कसरत के दौरान आराम करना और पानी पीते रहना न भूलो।
t.id: Saat latihan fisik berat, jangan lupa beristirahat dan minum banyak air.
t.it: Quando ti alleni, non dimenticare di riposarti e di idratarti.
t.ja: 激しい運動中は忘れず休憩を挟み、こまめに水分を補給しましょう。
t.ko: 격렬한 육체활동 중에는 휴식을 취하고 수분을 보충하는 것을 잊지 마세요.
t.ms: Semasa latihan fizikal yang intensif, jangan lupa berehat dan tambah semula air dalam badan.
t.nb: Under intens trening, ikke glem å hvile og drikke rikelig med vann.
t.nl: Vergeet tijdens intensieve inspanning niet om te rusten en voldoende water te drinken.
t.pl: Podczas intensywnego wysiłku fizycznego pamiętaj o odpoczynku i piciu dużej ilości wody.
t.pt_BR: Durante atividades físicas intensas, não se esqueça de descansar e repor seu nível de água.
t.ru: Во время интенсивных тренировок не забывай отдыхать и пить достаточно воды.
t.sv: Under intensiv fysisk aktivitet, glöm inte att vila och dricka ordentligt med vatten.
t.tr: Yoğun fiziksel etkinlik sırasında dinlenmeyi ve su içmeyi unutma.
t.vi: Trong thời gian hoạt động thể chất cường độ cao, đừng quên nghỉ ngơi và nạp đủ nước cho cơ thể.
t.zh_CN: 进行高强度体育运动时别忘了休息，补充水分。

t.nb: Drikk mer vann og bruk appen effektivt
t.nl: Drink meer water en gebruik de app effectief
t.pl: Pij więcej wody i efektywnie korzystaj z aplikacji
t.pt_BR: Beba mais água e use o aplicativo de maneira eficaz
t.ru: Пей больше воды и используй приложение эффективнее
t.sv: Drick mer vatten och använd appen effektivt
t.tr: Daha fazla su iç ve uygulamayı etkili kullan
t.vi: Uống nhiều nước hơn và sử dụng ứng dụng một cách hiệu quả
t.zh_CN: 多喝水，有效地使用应用

en: Are you already tracking your water with our app, or just getting started? We know stability and usability matter to you, so we’ve improved reliability and made the app easier to use in this update. Good luck reaching your goal!
context:
Surface: App Store Connect listing — "What's New in This Version" release notes.
Type: release notes
Context: Generic release-notes copy shown on the App Store version page describing stability and UX improvements. Despite the legacy "LoremIpsum" suffix in the key name, this is real shipped marketing prose. Not used in app code — uploaded as ASC metadata.
Constraints: ≤4000 chars in ASC; one paragraph, no bullet markers.
Tone: warm, encouraging.

t.ar: هل تتابع شرب الماء مع تطبيقنا بانتظام، أم أنك بدأت للتو؟ نعلم أن الاستقرار وسهولة الاستخدام يهمّانك، لذلك حسّنّا موثوقية التطبيق وجعلناه أسهل في الاستخدام في هذا التحديث. نتمنى لك التوفيق في تحقيق هدفك!
t.da: Holder du allerede styr på dit vand med vores app, eller er du lige begyndt? Vi ved, at stabilitet og brugervenlighed er vigtige for dig. Derfor har vi forbedret pålideligheden og gjort appen nemmere at bruge i denne opdatering. Held og lykke med at nå dit mål!
t.de: Erfasst du dein Wasser schon regelmäßig mit unserer App oder fängst du gerade erst an? Wir wissen, dass dir Stabilität und einfache Bedienung wichtig sind. Deshalb haben wir mit diesem Update die Zuverlässigkeit verbessert und die App noch einfacher bedienbar gemacht. Viel Glück beim Erreichen deines Ziels!
t.en: Are you already tracking your water with our app, or just getting started? We know stability and usability matter to you, so we’ve improved reliability and made the app easier to use in this update. Good luck reaching your goal!
t.es: ¿Añades el agua que bebes con nuestra aplicación constantemente o acabas de comenzar? La estabilidad y facilidad de uso de la aplicación son importantes. Hemos mejorado la fiabilidad y en esta actualización la interfaz es más cómoda. ¡Buena suerte en el logro de tu objetivo!
t.fr: Suivez-vous déjà votre consommation d'eau avec notre application, ou débutez-vous tout juste? La stabilité et l'ergonomie de l'application sont importantes pour vous. Dans cette mise à jour, nous avons amélioré la fiabilité et rendu l'interface plus pratique. Bonne chance pour atteindre votre objectif!
t.hi: क्या तुम पहले से हमारे ऐप से अपना पानी ट्रैक कर रहे हो या अभी शुरुआत कर रहे हो? हम जानते हैं कि ऐप की स्थिरता और उपयोगिता तुम्हारे लिए मायने रखती है, इसलिए इस अपडेट में हमने विश्वसनीयता बेहतर की है और ऐप को इस्तेमाल में आसान बनाया है। तुम्हारे लक्ष्य तक पहुँचने के लिए शुभकामनाएँ!
t.id: Apakah Anda selalu mencatat jumlah air yang diminum dengan aplikasi kami atau baru mulai? Stabilitas dan kenyamanan aplikasi penting bagi Anda. Dalam pembaruan ini, kami meningkatkan keandalan dan membuat antarmuka lebih nyaman. Semoga bisa mencapai tujuan Anda!
t.it: Stai già monitorando l'acqua con la nostra app o hai appena iniziato? La stabilità e l'usabilità dell'app sono importanti per te. Abbiamo migliorato l'affidabilità e reso l'interfaccia più comoda in questo aggiornamento. In bocca al lupo per raggiungere il tuo obiettivo!
t.ja: このアプリでいつも水分摂取を記録していますか？それとも始めたばかりですか？ アプリの安定性と使いやすさは、あなたにとって大切なことですよね。このアップデートでは信頼性を高め、より使いやすくしました。目標達成を応援しています！
t.ko: 이미 앱으로 마신 물을 기록하고 있나요, 아니면 이제 시작하나요? 안정성과 편의성을 높이고 앱을 더 쉽게 사용할 수 있게 개선했어요. 목표 달성을 응원할게요!
t.ms: Adakah anda sudah menjejaki air dengan aplikasi kami atau baru bermula? Kestabilan dan kemudahan penggunaan penting untuk anda. Dalam kemas kini ini, kami telah meningkatkan kebolehpercayaan dan menjadikan antara muka lebih mudah digunakan. Semoga berjaya mencapai matlamat anda!
t.nb: Sporer du vanninntaket med appen vår allerede, eller har du så vidt begynt? Stabilitet og brukervennlighet er viktig for deg. Vi har forbedret påliteligheten og gjort grensesnittet mer praktisk i denne oppdateringen. Lykke til med å nå målet ditt!
t.nl: Houd je je water al bij met onze app, of begin je net? Stabiliteit en gebruiksgemak zijn belangrijk voor je. In deze update hebben we de betrouwbaarheid verbeterd en de app makkelijker in gebruik gemaakt. Veel succes met het bereiken van je doel!
t.pl: Dbasz o picie wody cały czas dzięki naszej aplikacji, czy dopiero zaczynasz? Stabilność i użyteczność aplikacji są dla ciebie ważne. Poprawiliśmy niezawodność i uczyniliśmy interfejs wygodniejszym w tej aktualizacji. Powodzenia w osiąganiu swojego celu!
t.pt_BR: Você marca a água tomada no nosso aplicativo constantemente ou está apenas começando? A estabilidade e a usabilidade do aplicativo são importantes para você. Aprimoramos a confiabilidade e tornamos a interface mais prática nesta atualização. Boa sorte em atingir o seu objetivo!
t.ru: Уже записываешь воду с нашим приложением или только начинаешь? Мы знаем, как важны стабильность и удобство, поэтому в этом обновлении повысили надёжность и сделали приложение проще. Успехов в достижении цели!
t.sv: Spårar du redan ditt vattenintag med vår app, eller har du precis börjat? Vi vet att stabilitet och användbarhet är viktiga för dig, så vi har förbättrat tillförlitligheten och gjort appen enklare att använda i den här uppdateringen. Lycka till med att nå ditt mål!
t.tr: Suyunu çoktan uygulamamızla mı takip ediyorsun, yoksa daha yeni mi başlıyorsun? Kararlılık ve kullanılabilirliğin senin için önemli olduğunu biliyoruz; bu yüzden bu güncellemede güvenilirliği artırdık ve uygulamayı kullanması daha kolay hale getirdik. Hedefine ulaşmanı diliyoruz!
t.vi: Bạn đã theo dõi lượng nước uống với ứng dụng của chúng tôi hay chỉ mới bắt đầu? Tính ổn định và khả năng sử dụng của ứng dụng rất quan trọng đối với bạn. Chúng tôi đã cải thiện độ tin cậy và hoàn thiện giao diện hơn trong bản cập nhật này. Chúc bạn sớm đạt được mục tiêu!
t.zh_CN: 你是否一直用我们的 App 记录饮水，还是刚开始使用呢？App 的稳定性和易用性对你很重要。在此更新中，我们提高了可靠性，并让界面更方便好用。祝你顺利达成目标！

context:
Surface: Onboarding notifications interval step — time picker sheet title (start of the daily reminder window).
Type: section header / sheet title
Context: Preposition "From" introducing the start time of the daily hydration reminder window (paired with the end "To" time elsewhere). Not a beverage. Translate as the preposition meaning "starting at" / "from".
Constraints: Keep short (single word, fits sheet header).

en: Customize your default volumes to add drinks faster
context:
Surface: Paywall — feature comparison card / benefit row description (multiple subscription screens).
Type: paragraph (marketing claim)
Context: Marketing description paired with ourVolumesTitle — explains that customizing default volumes speeds up adding drinks.

t.ar: خصّص أحجامك الافتراضية لإضافة المشروبات بشكل أسرع
t.da: Skift standardmængder for at tilføje drikkevarer hurtigere
t.de: Passe die Standardmengen an, um Getränke schneller hinzuzufügen.
t.en: Customize your default volumes to add drinks faster
t.es: Cambia los valores estándar de volumen para añadir bebidas más rápido
t.fr: Modifie tes volumes par défaut pour ajouter tes boissons plus vite
t.hi: पेय जल्दी जोड़ने के लिए अपनी डिफ़ॉल्ट मात्रा बदलो
t.id: Ubah volume standar untuk menambah minuman lebih cepat
t.it: Cambia i valori predefiniti di volume per aggiungere più rapidamente le bevande
t.ja: 標準の容量をカスタマイズすると、飲み物をすばやく追加できます
t.ko: 기본 용량을 원하는 대로 바꿔 음료를 더 빠르게 추가하세요
t.ms: Ubah isi padu standard untuk tambah minuman lebih cepat
t.nb: Endre standard volumverdier for å legge til drikker raskere
t.nl: Pas je standaardvolumes aan om sneller drankjes toe te voegen
t.pl: Zmień standardowe miary, by szybciej dodawać napoje
t.pt_BR: Mude os volumes padrão para adicionar bebidas mais rápido
t.ru: Измени стандартные объёмы, чтобы быстрее добавлять напитки
t.sv: Ändra standardvolymerna för att lägga till drycker snabbare
t.tr: İçecekleri daha hızlı eklemek için varsayılan hacimleri değiştir
t.vi: Thay đổi các thể tích tiêu chuẩn để bổ sung đồ uống nhanh hơn
t.zh_CN: 更改标准饮用量，以快速添加饮料

en: Keep a water bottle with you so you can drink as soon as you feel thirsty.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
Type: tip
Context: Plain-language hydration tip — keeping a water bottle on hand makes it easy to drink as soon as thirst appears.
Register: casual T-form — tips are friendly health-conscious companion voice, not medical lecture (default for non-formal surfaces, see § Brand voice § Pronouns).

t.ar: احمل زجاجة مياه نظيفة معك دائمًا لتروي ظمأك على الفور.
t.da: Hav altid en flaske vand med, så du kan slukke tørsten med det samme.
t.de: Hab eine Flasche mit reinem Wasser immer bei der Hand, um den Durst sofort stillen zu können.
t.en: Keep a water bottle with you so you can drink as soon as you feel thirsty.
t.es: Lleva una botella de agua contigo para beber en cuanto tengas sed.
t.fr: Garde toujours une bouteille d'eau sur toi pour étancher ta soif dès que nécessaire.
t.hi: प्यास तुरंत बुझाने के लिए हमेशा साफ़ पानी की बोतल पास रखो
t.id: Selalu bawa sebotol air putih denganmu biar segera menghilangkan dahaga.
t.it: Porta sempre con te una bottiglia d’acqua per soddisfare subito la tua sete.
t.ja: 常にキレイな水を入れた水筒を持ち歩くことで、いつでもすぐに喉の渇きを癒すことができます。
t.ko: 항상 깨끗한 물이 담긴 물병을 휴대하여 갈증을 즉시 해소하세요.
t.ms: Selalu bawa sebotol air bersih biar segera melegakan dahaga.
t.nb: Ha alltid med deg en flaske rent vann for raskt å slukke tørsten.
t.nl: Houd altijd een waterfles bij je, zodat je kunt drinken zodra je dorst hebt.
t.pl: Zawsze miej przy sobie butelkę wody, by móc natychmiast zaspokoić pragnienie.
t.pt_BR: Leve uma garrafa com água pura o tempo todo para matar a sede rapidamente.
t.ru: Всегда держи под рукой бутылку с чистой водой, чтобы сразу утолить жажду.
t.sv: Bär alltid en flaska med rent vatten för att snabbt släcka din törst.
t.tr: Susadığında hemen içebilmek için yanında her zaman bir şişe su bulundur.
t.vi: Luôn mang theo một chai nước sạch để làm dịu cơn khát của bạn ngay lập tức.
t.zh_CN: 随身带瓶水，一渴就能马上喝。

en: Do you have a workout today? Drink water!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card, shown above today's logged drink amount after the user has logged drinks.
Type: motivational text
Context: Workout-themed nudge framed as a question, encouraging extra hydration on training days. Standalone statement, not paired with a numeric value. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Constraints: Keep question + exclamation rhythm.
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: هل لديك تمرين اليوم؟ اشربي الماء!
t.da: Har du træning i dag? Drik vand!
t.de: Hast du heute Training? Trink Wasser!
t.en: Do you have a workout today? Drink water!
t.fr: Tu fais du sport aujourd'hui? Bois de l'eau!
t.hi: क्या आज तुम्हारी कसरत है? पानी पियो!
t.id: Ada latihan hari ini? Minum air!
t.it: Farai un po' di sport oggi? Bevi acqua!
t.ja: 今日は運動しますか？水を飲みましょう！
t.ms: Ada latihan hari ini? Minum air!
t.nb: Har du trening i dag? Drikk vann!
t.nl: Heb je vandaag een workout? Drink water!
t.pt_BR: Você vai malhar hoje? Beba água!
t.sv: Har du ett träningspass idag? Drick vatten!
t.tr: Bugün antrenmanın mı var? O zaman su iç!
t.vi: Hôm nay bạn có tập luyện không? Hãy uống nước!
t.zh_CN: 今天你要锻炼吗？别忘记多喝水！

context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Reassuring "told you so" remark — reaching the daily water goal turned out to be easy. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with text4_12F for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Se, det var ikke så svært!
t.de: Schau mal, es war nicht so schwer!
t.fr: Tu vois, ce n'est pas si difficile!
t.hi: देखो, यह इतना मुश्किल नहीं था!
t.it: Hai visto, non era poi così difficile!
t.ja: ほら、そんなに難しくないでしょう！
t.nb: Se, det er ikke så vanskelig!
t.nl: Kijk, zo moeilijk is het niet!
t.ru: Видишь, это было не так сложно!
t.sv: Det var ju inte så svårt!
t.tr: Bak, gördün mü o kadar da zor değildi!
t.vi: Bạn thấy không, không khó lắm đâu!

context:
Surface: app-wide — Settings tab bar title, Settings screen navigation title, Spotlight result label, and action title in notification-permission alerts that direct the user to iOS Settings.
Type: screen title
Context: Refers to the in-app Settings screen as well as the iOS system Settings app in notification-permission alerts. Short noun phrase, title-case.
Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars) for tab bar / navigation title.

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Encouraging reassurance framing hydration as a self-care benefit — your body will appreciate it. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.). Note: same English wording is reused for text4_2 and text4_9 keys (legacy duplication) — translate each variant pair independently.
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.de: Dein Körper wird es dir danken!
t.nl: Je lichaam zal je dankbaar zijn!
t.sv: Din kropp kommer att tacka dig!
t.vi: Cơ thể của bạn sẽ cảm ơn bạn!

en: Have a glass of water, and your body will thank you 😉
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Self-care framing — drinking a glass of water is presented as something the body will appreciate. Includes a playful ";)" wink emoticon — preserve the wink (or a locale-equivalent informal wink) in translation.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).
Tone: Playful — keep the lighthearted wink register.

t.ar: تناول كوب من الماء، وسيشكرك جسمك 😉
t.da: Drik et glas vand, så vil din krop takke dig 😉
t.de: Trinke ein Glas Wasser, dein Körper wird es dir danken 😉
t.en: Have a glass of water, and your body will thank you 😉
t.es: Toma un vaso de agua, y tu cuerpo te lo agradecerá 😉
t.fr: Bois un verre d'eau et ton corps te remerciera 😉
t.hi: एक गिलास पानी पियो और तुम्हारा शरीर तुम्हें धन्यवाद देगा 😉
t.id: Minum segelas air, tubuhmu akan berterima kasih 😉
t.it: Bevi un bicchiere d'acqua e il tuo corpo ti ringrazierà 😉
t.ja: グラス一杯の水を飲みましょう。きっと体が喜びますよ 😉
t.ko: 물 한 잔을 드세요. 몸이 고마워할 거예요 😉
t.ms: Minum segelas air, tubuh awak akan berterima kasih 😉
t.nb: Ta et glass vann, og kroppen din vil takke deg 😉
t.nl: Neem een glas water, je lichaam zal je bedanken 😉
t.pl: Napij się wody, a twoje ciało ci podziękuje 😉
t.pt_BR: Tome um copo de água e seu corpo vai te agradecer 😉
t.ru: Выпей стакан воды, твой организм будет благодарен 😉
t.sv: Ta ett glas vatten, och din kropp kommer att tacka dig 😉
t.tr: Bir bardak su iç, vücudun sana minnettar olacak 😉
t.vi: Hãy uống một cốc nước, và cơ thể bạn sẽ cảm ơn vì điều đó 😉
t.zh_CN: 喝一杯白开水，你的身体会很感谢你的 😉

en: Lead an active lifestyle and drink water!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Pairs an active lifestyle with regular water intake.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: اتبع أسلوب حياة نشط واشرب الماء!
t.da: Før en aktiv livsstil og drik vand!
t.en: Lead an active lifestyle and drink water!
t.es: ¡Lleva un estilo de vida activo y bebe agua!
t.fr: Adopte un mode de vie actif et bois de l'eau!
t.hi: सक्रिय जीवनशैली अपनाओ और पानी पियो!
t.id: Jalani gaya hidup aktif dan minum air!
t.it: Conduci una vita attiva e bevi tanta acqua!
t.ja: 活発な生活を送って水を飲みましょう！
t.ms: Amalkan cara hidup aktif dan minum air!
t.nb: Ha en aktiv livsstil og drikk vann!
t.nl: Leef een actieve levensstijl en drink water!
t.pl: Prowadź aktywny tryb życia i pij wodę!
t.pt_BR: Leve um estilo de vida ativo e beba água!
t.ru: Веди активный образ жизни и пей воду!
t.sv: Ha en aktiv livsstil och drick vatten!
t.vi: Hãy sống năng động và uống nước nhé!
t.zh_CN: 坚持积极生活方式，多喝水！

en: To send email, please set up an account in the iOS Mail app
context:
Surface: Settings → Contact / feedback flow — error alert when the user taps a "Contact us" / "Suggest a feature" entry but the iOS Mail app has no email account configured.
Type: error message
Context: iOS's MFMailComposeViewController cannot present without a configured email account; this alert instructs the user to add an account in the standard iOS Mail app. Tone is polite and action-oriented. "iOS Mail app" refers to Apple's built-in Mail.app.

t.ar: لإرسال البريد الإلكتروني، يُرجى إعداد حساب في تطبيق Mail على iOS
t.da: Hvis du vil sende en e-mail, skal du tilføje din e-mail-konto til standard iOS Mail-appen
t.de: Richte bitte ein Konto in der iOS-Mail-App ein, um E-Mails zu senden
t.en: To send email, please set up an account in the iOS Mail app
t.es: Para enviar correos, añade una cuenta en la app Mail de iOS.
t.fr: Pour envoyer un e-mail, configure un compte dans l'application Mail
t.hi: ईमेल भेजने के लिए iOS के Mail ऐप में एक खाता सेट करो
t.id: Silakan tambahkan akun email ke aplikasi "Mail" bawaan iOS untuk mengirim email
t.it: Per inviare email, configura un account nell'app Mail di iOS
t.ja: メールを送信するには、標準のiOSのメールアプリにメールアカウントを追加してください
t.ko: 이메일을 보내려면 기본 iOS Mail 앱에 이메일 계정을 추가해 주세요
t.ms: Sila tambah akaun e-mel ke aplikasi standard iOS "E-mel" untuk menghantar e-mel
t.nb: For å sende e-post må du legge til en e-postkonto i iOS Mail-appen.
t.nl: Voeg je e-mailaccount toe aan de standaard iOS Mail-app om e-mails te kunnen versturen
t.pl: Aby wysłać wiadomość e-mail, dodaj swoje konto mailowe do standardowej aplikacji pocztowej iOS
t.pt_BR: Para enviar e-mails, adicione sua conta de e-mail ao aplicativo Mail padrão do iOS
t.ru: Добавь учётную запись почты в приложение «Почта» на iPhone, чтобы отправлять письма.
t.sv: För att skicka e-post, lägg till ditt e-postkonto i den vanliga iOS Mail-appen
t.tr: E-posta göndermek için standart iOS "E-posta" uygulamasına bir e-posta hesabı ekle
t.vi: Để gửi email, vui lòng thêm tài khoản email vào trong ứng dụng Mail tiêu chuẩn của iOS
t.zh_CN: 要发送电子邮件，请先在 iOS 邮件应用中添加你的邮箱账户。

en: Time for another glass of water 😊
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Friendly nudge that it's time to drink another glass of water. Includes a smiley ":)" — preserve a culturally appropriate playful smiley in translation.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).
Tone: playful.

t.ar: حان الوقت لكوب آخر من الماء 😊
t.da: Tid til endnu et glas vand 😊
t.de: Zeit dafür, ein weiteres Glas Wasser zu trinken 😊
t.en: Time for another glass of water 😊
t.es: Hora para otro vaso de agua 😊
t.fr: C'est le moment de boire un autre verre d'eau 😊
t.hi: एक और गिलास पानी का समय हो गया 😊
t.it: È il momento di bere un altro bicchiere d'acqua 😊
t.ja: もう一杯の水を飲む時間です😊
t.ko: 물을 한 잔 더 마실 시간이에요 😊
t.nb: På tide med nok et glass vann 😊
t.nl: Tijd voor nog een glas water 😊
t.pt_BR: Hora de tomar outro copo de água 😊
t.ru: Пора выпить ещё один стакан воды 😊
t.sv: Dags för ännu ett glas vatten 😊
t.tr: Bir bardak daha su içme zamanı😊
t.vi: Đã đến lúc uống một cốc nước khác 😊
t.zh_CN: 是时候该再喝一杯水了 😊

en: You don’t have any active subscriptions yet. Subscribe to unlock all the app’s features and drink more water 😉
context:
Surface: Subscription / paywall flow — alert body shown after the user taps "Restore purchases" and no eligible past purchases are found.
Type: error message
Context: Informs the user that no active subscription was restored and gently invites them to subscribe to unlock all premium features. Includes a winking emoji 😉 — preserve it as is (universal emoji, do not replace with a localised alternative).
Tone: playful (apologetic but warm).

t.ar: ليس لديك أي اشتراكات نشطة. اشترك للاستفادة من جميع ميزات التطبيق وشرب المزيد من الماء 😉
t.da: Du har ingen aktive abonnementer endnu. Tegn et abonnement for at bruge alle appens funktioner og drikke mere vand 😉
t.de: Du hast noch kein aktives Abonnement. Mit einem Abo schaltest du alle App-Funktionen frei und trinkst mehr Wasser 😉
t.en: You don’t have any active subscriptions yet. Subscribe to unlock all the app’s features and drink more water 😉
t.es: Actualmente no cuentas con ninguna suscripción. Puedes suscribirte para usar todas las funciones de la aplicación y beber más agua 😉
t.fr: Tu n'as aucun abonnement en cours ; tu peux t'abonner pour utiliser toutes les fonctions de l'application et boire plus d'eau 😉
t.hi: तुम्हारे पास अभी कोई चालू सदस्यता नहीं है। ऐप की सारी सुविधाएँ पाने और ज़्यादा पानी पीने के लिए सदस्यता लो 😉
t.id: Kamu belum punya langganan aktif. Berlangganan yuk biar bisa pakai semua fitur aplikasi dan minum lebih banyak air 😉
t.it: Non hai ancora un abbonamento attivo. Abbonati per sbloccare tutte le funzioni dell'app e bere più acqua 😉
t.ja: 現在何も購読されていません。購読すればアプリの全機能が使えるので、もっと水を飲むことができます😉
t.ko: 현재 구독 중인 서비스가 없어요. 구독하면 앱의 모든 기능을 사용하고 물을 더 많이 마실 수 있어요 😉
t.ms: Awak belum mempunyai langganan aktif. Langgan untuk membuka semua fungsi aplikasi dan minum lebih banyak air 😉
t.nb: Du har ingen aktive abonnementer ennå. Abonner for å låse opp alle funksjonene i appen og drikke mer vann 😉
t.nl: Je hebt nog geen actief abonnement. Abonneer je om alle functies van de app te ontgrendelen en meer water te drinken 😉
t.pl: Nie masz aktualnej subskrypcji. Możesz skorzystać z subskrypcji, aby móc używać wszystkich funkcji aplikacji i pić więcej wody 😉
t.pt_BR: Você não tem nenhuma assinatura ativa, mas pode fazer uma para usar todas as funções do aplicativo e beber mais água 😉
t.ru: У тебя нет ни одной действующей подписки. Ты можешь оформить её, чтобы использовать все функции приложения и пить больше воды 😉
t.sv: Du har inga aktiva prenumerationer än. Prenumerera för att låsa upp alla appens funktioner och dricka mer vatten 😉
t.tr: Geçerli bir aboneliğin yok, uygulamanın tüm özelliklerini kullanmak ve daha fazla su içmek için abone olabilirsin 😉
t.vi: Bạn chưa có gói đăng ký nào đang hoạt động. Hãy đăng ký để mở khóa mọi tính năng và uống nhiều nước hơn 😉
t.zh_CN: 你当前还没有任何订阅。订阅后即可解锁应用的全部功能，喝更多水 😉

context:
Surface: app-wide — Default volumes screen row label; reusable container name across app, widget and watch.
Type: container name
Context: Display name for a regular drinking glass used as a preset drink volume option. Lowercase noun. A smaller shot-sized glass uses a separate key `shotGlass`.
Constraints: Keep short (single common word); use the everyday name for a drinking glass in the target language.

Surface: Tips stories format screen — share button label below a tip story card.
Type: button label
Context: Tapping shares the currently displayed tip with friends via system share sheet.

Surface: Settings → Notifications sound picker / add-drink sound picker — sound option row title.
Type: settings row title
Context: Display name for the "Water" notification sound preset (water-drop audio cue). Resolved via AppSounds.localizedTitle and paired with a `.caf` audio asset. Not the beverage water — purely the sound's name. Distinct from soundWater2 ("Plop"), a different water-themed tone.
Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) for sound picker row.

en: Will you drink 8 glasses of water today?
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Rhetorical question challenging the user to drink the commonly cited "8 glasses of water" amount today. The "8 glasses" figure is a colloquial benchmark; keep the numeric reference intact.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: هل ستشرب 8 أكواب من الماء اليوم؟
t.da: Kan du drikke 8 glas vand i dag?
t.de: Kannst du 8 Gläser Wasser auch heute trinken?
t.en: Will you drink 8 glasses of water today?
t.es: ¿Vas a beber 8 vasos de agua hoy?
t.fr: Arriveras-tu à boire 8 verres d'eau aujourd'hui?
t.hi: क्या आज 8 गिलास पानी पी पाओगे?
t.id: Hari ini kamu akan minum 8 gelas air?
t.it: Oggi riuscirai a bere 8 bicchieri d'acqua?
t.ja: 今日は水を8杯飲めますか？
t.ms: Hari ini awak akan minum 8 gelas air?
t.nb: Kommer du til å drikke 8 glass vann i dag?
t.nl: Zal je vandaag 8 glazen water drinken?
t.pt_BR: Você vai beber 8 copos de água hoje?
t.ru: А сегодня ты выпьешь 8 стаканов воды?
t.sv: Kommer du att dricka 8 glas vatten idag?
t.vi: Bạn sẽ uống 8 cốc nước hôm nay chứ?

en: With our app, being healthy and fit is easy!
context:
Surface: Onboarding intro carousel — slide 1 (app intro) description, paired with tutTitle1.
Type: tutorial step
Context: Subtitle on the very first carousel slide. Pitches the app as making a healthy and slim lifestyle effortless. "Slender" is body-positive framing tied to a healthy habit — translate with the equivalent positive lifestyle term in the target language; avoid clinical / weight-loss wording.

t.ar: مع تطبيقنا، سيصبح من السهل البقاء رشيقاً وبصحة جيدة!
t.da: Med vores app er det nemt at være sund og i form!
t.de: Mit unserer App ist es einfach, gesund und schlank zu sein!
t.en: With our app, being healthy and fit is easy!
t.es: Con nuestra app, estar sano y en forma es fácil.
t.fr: Avec notre application, être en forme et en bonne santé devient facile!
t.hi: हमारे ऐप से स्वस्थ और फिट रहना आसान है!
t.id: Dengan aplikasi kami, mudah untuk tetap sehat dan bugar!
t.it: Con la nostra app, essere sani e in forma è facile!
t.ja: My Water を使えば、健康的でスリムな毎日を簡単に続けられます！
t.ko: 우리 앱을 이용하면 쉽게 건강하고 날씬해질 수 있어요!
t.ms: Dengan aplikasi kami, mudah untuk tetap sihat dan lampai!
t.nb: Med appen vår er det enkelt å være sunn og slank!
t.nl: Met onze app is gezond en fit zijn eenvoudig!
t.pl: Dzięki naszej aplikacji bycie zdrowym i w formie jest łatwe!
t.pt_BR: Com o nosso app, é fácil se manter saudável e em forma!
t.ru: С нашим приложением быть здоровым и стройным легко!
t.sv: Med vår app är det enkelt att vara frisk och i form!
t.tr: Uygulamamızla formda ve sağlıklı kalmak çok kolay!
t.vi: Với ứng dụng của chúng tôi, bạn sẽ trở nên khỏe mạnh và dễ dàng có vóc dáng thon gọn!
t.zh_CN: 使用我们的应用，轻松获得健康苗条的身材！

en: Drink water! Be healthy and happy!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Links drinking water with health and happiness.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Drik vand! Vær sund og glad!
t.de: Trinke Wasser! Bleib gesund und glücklich!
t.en: Drink water! Be healthy and happy!
t.fr: Bois de l'eau! Sois en bonne santé et heureux!
t.hi: पानी पियो! स्वस्थ और खुश रहो!
t.id: Minum air! Jadilah sehat dan bahagia!
t.it: Bevi tanta acqua! Sii in salute e felice!
t.ja: 水を飲みましょう！健康でハッピーな人になりましょう！
t.ms: Minum air! Jadilah sihat dan ceria!
t.nb: Drikk vann! Vær sunn og glad!
t.nl: Drink water! Wees gezond en gelukkig!
t.pl: Pij wodę! Poznaj radość płynącą z dbania o zdrowie!
t.pt_BR: Beba água! Seja saudável e feliz!
t.ru: Пей воду! Это путь к здоровью и хорошему настроению!
t.sv: Drick vatten! Var frisk och glad!
t.tr: Su iç! Sağlıklı insanlar arasına katıl!
t.vi: Hãy uống nước! Hãy sống khỏe mạnh và hạnh phúc!
t.zh_CN: 多喝水，成为健康快乐的人！

context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / progress label, shown when the user is close to reaching the daily water goal but hasn't yet (progress 75% to <100%).
Type: motivational text
Context: Brief call to action urging the user to finish reaching the daily water goal. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ja: 目標を達成しましょう！
t.vi: Hãy đạt đến mục tiêu của bạn!

context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Short celebratory acknowledgment that the user reached today's goal. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with text4_13M for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / progress label, shown when the user is close to reaching the daily water goal but hasn't yet (progress 75% to <100%).
Type: motivational text
Context: Brief encouragement that the user has almost completed the daily water goal. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.de: Du hast dein Ziel fast erreicht!
t.fr: Tu as presque atteint ton objectif!
t.hi: तुमने लगभग अपना लक्ष्य पूरा कर लिया!
t.it: Hai quasi raggiunto il tuo obiettivo!
t.ja: 目標達成まであと少し！
t.nl: Je hebt bijna je doel bereikt!
t.sv: Du har nästan nått ditt mål!
t.vi: Bạn sắp đạt được mục tiêu rồi!

en: Please sign in to your account again
context:
Surface: Authentication / session-expired flow — error alert shown when the stored credentials are no longer valid and the user must sign in again.
Type: error message
Context: Tells the user their saved session / password is no longer accepted and they must re-enter account credentials. "Enter your account again" = sign in again, not "type your account name once more". Key name implies a wrong-password scenario but the user-facing text frames it as a session re-login prompt; translator should follow the value (sign-in-again wording), not the key name. Currently no live Swift call-sites; preserved for legacy / re-introduced auth flows.

t.ar: يجب تسجيل الدخول إلى حسابك مرة أخرى
t.da: Log ind på din konto igen
t.en: Please sign in to your account again
t.hi: अपने खाते में फिर से साइन इन करो
t.id: Silakan masuk kembali ke akun Anda
t.it: Accedi di nuovo al tuo account
t.ja: もう一度サインインしてください。
t.ms: Sila log masuk semula ke akaun anda
t.nb: Logg inn på kontoen din på nytt
t.nl: Log opnieuw in op je account.
t.sv: Logga in på ditt konto igen
t.vi: Vui lòng đăng nhập lại vào tài khoản của bạn

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog — standard beverage row title; used in the drink picker, statistics, and similar surfaces.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for milk in the standard beverage catalog (capitalized, used as standalone label). Lowercase mid-sentence variant lives in "Milk2".

Surface: Main screen — motivational text label rotated daily through MotivationalText.swift, shown when daily progress is 0 (text1 group, percent == 0) — any time of day, not only the morning.
Type: motivational text
Context: Reminds the user that the body needs liquid, framing hydration as self-care. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with text1_7M (male form) for agreement in languages with grammatical gender.
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Din krop har brug for væske
t.fr: Ton corps a besoin de liquide
t.it: Il tuo corpo ha bisogno di acqua
t.ja: 体は水分を必要としています
t.vi: Cơ thể của bạn cần nước

context:
Surface: Widget — quick-add widget empty state when the user has not logged any drinks yet.
Type: paragraph (empty state)
Context: Placeholder text inside the widget explaining that recently logged drinks will appear there once the user starts adding them. "Last drinks" means most-recent drinks, not final drinks.

t.es: Las últimas bebidas se mostrarán aquí
t.id: Minuman terbaru akan muncul di sini
t.it: Le ultime bevande verranno visualizzate qui
t.ja: 最近の飲み物がここに表示されます
t.ms: Minuman terkini akan dipaparkan di sini
t.nb: De siste drikkene vil vises her
t.pt_BR: As últimas bebidas serão exibidas aqui
t.vi: Đồ uống gần đây sẽ hiển thị tại đây
t.zh_CN: 最近饮品信息将在此处显示

context:
Surface: Achievements list / award detail — description line.
Type: achievement description
Context: Award id=12 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.description(forDescriptionKey:). Unlock condition: log drinks for 21 days. Pairs with ach_name12.
Register: casual T-form — achievement descriptions celebrate the user in casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.de: Notiere, was du innerhalb von 21 Tagen getrunken hast
t.hi: 21 दिन तक अपने पेय दर्ज करो
t.it: Registra le tue bevande per 21 giorni
t.pl: Zapisz ilość płynów wypitych w ciągu 21 dni
t.sv: Skriv ner dina drycker i 21 dagar
t.vi: Ghi lại đồ uống của bạn trong 21 ngày

context:
Surface: Local scheduled drink-reminder notification — body text; one entry from a 51-string pool (notification1_1…notification1_51) picked at random per reminder. The notification title is the app name, not this string.
Type: notification body
Context: Gentle nudge reminding the user not to forget their water intake. One of many interchangeable reminder lines — keep it short and self-contained.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.fr: N'oublie pas de boire de l'eau!
t.ja: 水を飲むのを忘れないように！
t.nl: Vergeet niet om water te drinken!
t.pt_BR: Não se esqueça de beber água!

context:
Surface: Change password screen — validation error alert when the "new password" and "repeat new password" fields differ.
Type: error message
Context: Client-side validation message shown when the two new-password fields don't match each other on the change-password form (not when the new password is rejected by the server). Tone is informative.

t.da: De nye adgangskoder er ikke ens
t.de: Das neue Passwort stimmt nicht überein
t.fr: Le nouveau mot de passe ne correspond pas
t.ja: 新しいパスワードが一致しません。
t.nl: Het nieuwe wachtwoord komt niet overeen
t.sv: De nya lösenorden stämmer inte överens

context:
Surface: Main screen awards section / Awards screen header — prefix preceding the most recent award name (e.g. "You got Plop").
Type: label prefix
Context: Short past-tense prefix introducing the name of the user's latest unlocked award. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with haveAward1F for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.; the past-tense verb "got" agrees with subject gender in those languages).

Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
Type: achievement title
Context: Award id=1 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after the user adds the very first glass of water (paired with ach_descr1); "Plop" evokes the sound of a drop landing in water.
Constraints: Keep short (1-3 words for compact card display).

en: Your brain and blood vessels need water to work well, so stay hydrated through the day.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
Type: tip
Context: Plain-language hydration tip — maintaining water balance supports proper brain and blood vessel function.
Register: casual T-form — tips are friendly health-conscious companion voice, not medical lecture (default for non-formal surfaces, see § Brand voice § Pronouns).

t.ar: يحتاج دماغك وأوعيتك الدموية إلى الماء ليعملا بشكل جيد، لذا اشرب الماء طوال اليوم.
t.da: Din hjerne og dine blodkar har brug for vand for at fungere godt - så husk at drikke vand i løbet af dagen.
t.de: Dein Gehirn und deine Blutgefäße brauchen Wasser, um gut zu funktionieren. Trink über den Tag verteilt genug.
t.en: Your brain and blood vessels need water to work well, so stay hydrated through the day.
t.es: Tu cerebro y tus vasos sanguíneos necesitan agua para funcionar bien, así que mantente hidratado durante el día.
t.fr: Ton cerveau et tes vaisseaux sanguins ont besoin d'eau pour bien fonctionner, alors pense à bien t'hydrater tout au long de la journée.
t.hi: पानी की कमी से दिमाग़ और नसें ठीक से काम नहीं करतीं। इसलिए दिनभर पानी पीते रहो।
t.id: Otak dan pembuluh darahmu butuh air agar berfungsi dengan baik, jadi minum air sepanjang hari.
t.it: Il cervello e i vasi sanguigni hanno bisogno di acqua per funzionare bene: bevi durante la giornata.
t.ja: 水が不足すると脳や血管の働きが鈍ります。一日を通してこまめに水分をとりましょう。
t.ko: 물이 부족하면 뇌와 혈관이 제대로 기능하기 어려워요. 하루 동안 수분 균형을 잘 유지해 보세요.
t.ms: Otak dan saluran darah perlukan air untuk berfungsi dengan baik, jadi minum air sepanjang hari.
t.nb: Hjernen og blodårene dine trenger vann for å fungere godt, så drikk jevnlig gjennom dagen.
t.nl: Je hersenen en bloedvaten hebben water nodig om goed te werken. Drink daarom de hele dag door genoeg.
t.pl: Twój mózg i naczynia krwionośne potrzebują wody, by dobrze działać, więc pij wodę przez cały dzień.
t.pt_BR: Os vasos sanguíneos e cerebrais funcionam mal com a falta de água. Para evitar isso, mantenha-se bem hidratado ao longo do dia.
t.ru: Мозгу и сосудам нужна вода, чтобы хорошо работать, поэтому пей воду в течение всего дня.
t.sv: Hjärnan och blodkärlen behöver vatten för att fungera bra, så drick vatten under hela dagen.
t.tr: Beynin ve damarların iyi çalışması için gün boyu su iç.
t.vi: Não bộ và mạch máu cần nước để hoạt động tốt, vì vậy hãy uống đủ nước trong suốt cả ngày.
t.zh_CN: 大脑和血管都需要水分才能正常运转，记得一整天都补补水。

context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Self-care framing that prompts the user to drink water to support their body.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.fr: Aide ton corps! Bois de l'eau!
t.hi: अपने शरीर की मदद करो! पानी पियो!
t.it: Aiuta il tuo corpo! Bevi un bicchiere d’acqua!

en: My Water Balance - Daily hydration tracker & water reminder

t.hi: नोटिफिकेशन के लिए एक खास टोन चुनो ताकि कुछ छूटे नहीं
t.id: Pilih suara pemberitahuan khusus agar kamu tidak melewatkannya
t.it: Scegli un suono speciale per le notifiche, così non ti perdi nulla
t.ja: 何も見逃さないように、特別な通知音を選びましょう
t.ko: 특별한 알림톤을 선택하여 중요한 순간을 놓치지 않도록 하세요

t.ru: Выбери особый звук уведомлений, чтобы ничего не пропустить

context:

Context: Lets the user proceed into the app without creating an account. Two-word phrase; "Skip" is the verb, "registration" is the action being skipped.
Constraints: Keep short to fit the button; no trailing punctuation.

en: Drink water if you want to be healthy!
context:

Type: notification body

context:

t.vi: Hãy duy trì thói quen uống nước của bạn nhé!

Note: key name contains a typo ("achivment" instead of "achievement") — legacy identifier, do not rename.

Tone: positive, brief.

t.pt_BR: Seu post foi publicado com sucesso

context:

Context: Generic "Error" alert title used as the headline above various error message bodies (sharing errors, app icon change failure, favorite drink save failure, etc.). Noun form, capitalized as a title. Not a verb. Accessed in code as `R.string.localizable.error()` despite the capitalized key.
Constraints: Keep short; single word in most languages.

Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for the wine beverage (alcoholic) in the standard beverage catalog. Title-case per beverage display name convention.

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / progress label, shown when the user is close to reaching the daily water goal but hasn't yet (progress 75% to <100%).

t.de: Du hast dein Ziel fast erreicht!
t.fr: Tu as presque atteint ton objectif!
t.hi: तुमने लगभग अपना लक्ष्य पूरा कर लिया!

t.ja: あと少しで目標達成です！

context:

Type: error message
Context: Form-validation prompt asking the user to enter a non-zero volume value before leaving. "Volume" = drink amount (e.g. ml / fl oz). Tone is polite. Key name has a legacy typo ("Writted" instead of "Written") — do not "fix" the key spelling.

t.ja: 量を記入してください

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for kvass (traditional fermented rye-bread drink) in the standard beverage catalog. Title-case per beverage display name convention; keep "Kvass" as the recognised loanword in target language unless a more common local equivalent exists.

en: Live an active and healthy life, drink more water!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Pairs active and healthy life with drinking more water.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: عش حياة نشطة وصحية، اشرب المزيد من الماء!
t.da: Lev et aktivt og sundt liv, drik mere vand!
t.de: Lebe gesund und aktiv, trinke Wasser!
t.en: Live an active and healthy life, drink more water!
t.es: Vive una vida activa y saludable, ¡bebe más agua!
t.fr: Mène une vie active et saine, bois plus d'eau!
t.hi: सक्रिय और स्वस्थ जीवन जियो, ज़्यादा पानी पियो!
t.id: Jalani gaya hidup sehat dan aktif, minum air!
t.it: Conduci una vita sana e attiva e bevi tanta acqua!
t.ja: 活発で健康的な生活を送って、もっと水を飲みましょう！
t.ko: 건강하고 활동적으로 생활하고 물을 더 마셔요!
t.ms: Amalkan cara hidup sihat dan aktif, minum air!
t.nb: Lev et aktivt og sunt liv og drikk mer vann!
t.nl: Leef een actief en gezond leven, drink meer water!
t.pl: Prowadź aktywne i zdrowe życie, pij więcej wody!
t.pt_BR: Tenha uma vida ativa e saudável. Beba mais água!
t.ru: Веди здоровый и активный образ жизни, пей воду!
t.sv: Lev ett aktivt och hälsosamt liv och drick mer vatten!
t.tr: Sağlıklı ve aktif bir yaşam tarzı sürdür, su iç!
t.vi: Sống một cuộc sống khỏe mạnh và tích cực, hãy uống nhiều nước hơn!
t.zh_CN: 积极健康生活还要多喝水！

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for the "Mors" beverage (морс) — a traditional East-Slavic non-carbonated berry drink (crushed berries, water, sugar), made from ANY berry, not specifically cranberry. Render as the locale's generic "berry drink" — not cranberry, not "juice" (морс is diluted), not a generic "fruit drink"; keep the native name only where морс is itself recognized. Title-case per beverage display name convention.

en: This email is already in use
context:
Surface: Login / registration screen — server validation error message shown when the entered email is already registered to another account.
Type: error message
Context: Server-side error mapped from the `email_taken` API error code. Tells the user the email address they entered is already in use; they should sign in or use a different address.

t.da: Denne e-mailadresse er allerede i brug
t.de: Diese Adresse ist bereits im Gebrauch
t.en: This email is already in use
t.es: Esa dirección ya está en uso

t.hi: यह ईमेल पहले से इस्तेमाल में है
t.ja: このメールアドレスは既に使用されています。
t.nb: Denne adressen er allerede i bruk
t.nl: Dit e-mailadres is al in gebruik
t.pl: Ten adres e-mail jest już używany.
t.pt_BR: Este e-mail já está em uso
t.vi: Địa chỉ email này đã được sử dụng

context:
Surface: Onboarding → Notifications interval screen / Settings → Notifications — interval row unit suffix label for exactly 1 hour.
Type: row value suffix (unit)
Context: Singular hour suffix used only for exactly 60 minutes / 1 hour. Other hour-based intervals use TwoHours or FiveHours.
Constraints: Lowercase, no trailing period; keep short to fit a compact row value.

Surface: app-wide — app brand name. Used as local notification title (NotificationsService), New Year digest screen logo label, and tab title (lowercased + capitalized).
Type: brand name
Context: The app's brand name (en "My Water"). Brand — most markets ship a localized brand (ru «Моя вода», de "Mein Wasser", es "Mi agua", fr "Mon eau", it "La mia acqua", nl "Mijn Water", da "Mit vand", nb "Mitt Vann", sv "Mitt Vatten"); use the locale's established localized brand and keep the English "My Water" verbatim only where a market has not localized it. Do not re-translate or re-Anglicize a locale's established brand. Wrap in locale-appropriate quotation marks only when the surrounding copy emphasizes the brand. Brand spans the iOS, Android, watchOS and widget apps.
Constraints: Use the market's established brand form (localized where shipped, else English "My Water"); consistent with sibling keys CFBundleDisplayName / CFBundleName. Keep short (used as a label).

Surface: app-wide — VoiceOver accessibility label for the navigation bar back button (UIViewController+NavigationButtons, SubscriptionWoman, accessibility identifier helper).
Type: accessibility label
Context: Noun. Spoken by VoiceOver when focus reaches the standard back / dismiss button at the top-left of a screen. Not visible on screen.
Constraints: Single short word; no trailing period.

Surface: Settings → Units of measure picker / onboarding measurement-system selector — option row label.
Type: settings row title
Context: Display name for the US customary system option (fl oz / lb) in the volume / weight units selector. Resolved via VolumeUnitsOfMeasure. Not a beverage.
Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) for selector row.

Surface: Subscription / paywall one-month tier and price line.
Type: subscription period unit
Context: Singular month unit used with value 1, e.g. "1 month" or "$X / month"; not part of a live hand-rolled month plural helper.
Constraints: Keep short; lowercase when used after a number or price.

Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
Type: achievement title
Context: Award id=12 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after logging drinks for 21 days (paired with ach_descr12); celebrates consistency.
Constraints: Keep short (1-3 words for compact card display).

t.vi: Bậc thầy về độ ổn định

en: Share that you reached your goal three times
context:
Surface: Awards screen / award detail card — achievement description below achievement name.
Type: achievement description
Context: Achievement unlocked after the user shares, three times, that they completed their daily water goal. Here "your goal" means the accomplishment of reaching the daily goal ("I hit my goal today"), NOT the goal target / amount (e.g. 2000 ml). Do not render it as sharing the target number; keep the "reached / completed" predicate, since a bare "share your goal" wrongly reads as sharing the target. One-time version: ach_descr5.
Register: casual T-form — achievement descriptions celebrate the user in casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: شارك أنك حققت هدفك ثلاث مرات
t.da: Del tre gange, at du nåede dit mål
t.de: Erzähle dreimal, dass du dein Tagesziel erreicht hast
t.en: Share that you reached your goal three times
t.es: Comparte tres veces que has alcanzado tu objetivo
t.fr: Partage trois fois que tu as atteint ton objectif
t.hi: तुमने लक्ष्य पूरा किया, यह तीन बार शेयर करो
t.id: Pamer kalau kamu capai targetmu tiga kali
t.it: Racconta tre volte che hai raggiunto l'obiettivo
t.ja: 目標を3回達成したことを友達に知らせる
t.ko: 목표를 세 번 달성했다고 자랑해 보세요
t.ms: Kongsi yang awak capai matlamat tiga kali
t.nb: Fortell at du nådde målet ditt tre ganger
t.nl: Deel drie keer dat je je doel hebt gehaald
t.pl: Trzy razy pochwal się osiągnięciem celu
t.pt_BR: Conte que você atingiu sua meta três vezes
t.sv: Dela att du nått ditt mål tre gånger
t.vi: Khoe rằng bạn đã đạt mục tiêu ba lần
t.zh_CN: 三次分享你已达成目标

context:

Context: Asks the user to fill in their profile information in the app before the feature can be used. "In the app" refers to in-app profile settings. Tone is polite. Currently no live Swift call-sites; preserved for legacy / re-introduced profile-required flows.

context:

Context: Generic completion / dismiss action used in pickers, editors, and modal screens to confirm changes and close the screen. Sentence-case.
