t.fr: L'eau, c'est la source de la vie!
t.nl: Water is de bron van leven!
t.pt_BR: A água é a fonte da vida!
t.vi: Nước là cội nguồn của sự sống!

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / add-drink screen / drink picker / paywall beverage showcase — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for the soda beverage (carbonated soft drink) in the standard catalog. Title-case per beverage display name convention.

en: Cool, I achieved \"[%s]\" in \"My Water\" app! [%s] #mywater
context:
Surface: VKontakte (VK) share sheet — prefilled post body when the user shares an unlocked achievement to VK (Russia-region social network; routed to ru.strings).
Type: paragraph (social share)
Context: First-person brag post naming the unlocked achievement and linking back to the app. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with achivmentTextShareVkF for subject-gender agreement (ru, ar, he, etc.; the verb "achieved" agrees with subject gender). Key name keeps the legacy "achivment" typo — do not rename.
Placeholders:
  [%s] (first) — achievement / award title (e.g. "Good habit")
  [%s] (second) — share link back to the app (URL)
Constraints: Both placeholders are non-indexed [%s] — keep them in source order (the bare form cannot reorder). Preserve the #mywater hashtag and the "My Water" brand quotes verbatim.
Tone: friendly, casual first person.

t.ar: رائع، لقد حققت \"[%s]\" في تطبيق \"My Water\"! [%s] #mywater
t.da: Fedt, jeg nåede \"[%s]\" i \"Mit vand\" appen! [%s] #mywater
t.de: Hurra, ich habe eine Auszeichnung \"[%s]\" in der App \"Mein Wasser\" erhalten! [%s] #mywater
t.en: Cool, I achieved \"[%s]\" in \"My Water\" app! [%s] #mywater
t.fr: Cool, j'ai obtenu la récompense « [%s] » dans l'application « Mon eau » ! [%s] #mywater
t.hi: वाह, मैंने \"My Water\" ऐप में \"[%s]\" प्राप्त किया है! [%s] #mywater
t.id: Hore, saya dapat prestasi "[%s]" di aplikasi "My Water"! [%s] #mywater
t.it: Urrà, ho ottenuto "[%s]" nell’applicazione "La mia acqua"! [%s] #mywater
t.ja: やった、「My Water」アプリで「[%s]」を達成したよ！[%s] #mywater
t.ms: Hore, saya dapat pencapaian "[%s]" dalam aplikasi "Air saya"! [%s] #mywater
t.nl: Cool, ik heb \"[%s]\" behaald in \"My water app\"! [%s] #mywater
t.pl: Rewelacja, udało mi się osiągnąć \"[%s]\" w \"aplikacji Moja woda\"! [%s] #mywater
t.pt_BR: Legal, eu consegui \"[%s]\" no \"aplicativo My Water\"! [%s] #mywater
t.ru: Ура, я получил достижение \"[%s]\" в приложении \"Моя вода\"! [%s] #mywater
t.vi: Tuyệt, tôi đã đạt được "[%s]" trong ứng dụng "My Water"! [%s] #mywater
t.zh_CN: 耶！我在 My Water 中达成了“[%s]”！[%s] #mywater

en: No Internet connection. Please check your connection and try again.
context:
Surface: Generic offline / no-network error alert or inline message shown when an action requiring the network fails because the device has no Internet connection.
Type: error message
Context: Standard offline copy — informs the user that the device is offline and asks them to check their connection and retry the request. Tone is polite and action-oriented. Sibling keys "connectionErrorTitle" / "connectionErrorSubtitle" carry the split title+subtitle variant used in the empty-state on the Friends screen; this key is the single-line variant. Currently no live Swift call-sites for this exact key; preserved for legacy / re-introduced offline alerts.

t.ar: لا يوجد اتصال بالإنترنت. يرجى التحقق من اتصالك ثم المحاولة مرة أخرى.
t.da: Ingen internetforbindelse. Kontroller venligst din forbindelse, og prøv igen.
t.de: Keine Internetverbindung. Bitte überprüfe deine Verbindung und versuche es erneut.
t.en: No Internet connection. Please check your connection and try again.
t.es: No hay conexión a internet. Comprueba tu conexión y vuelve a intentarlo.
t.fr: Pas de connexion Internet. Veuillez vérifier votre connexion et réessayer.
t.hi: इंटरनेट कनेक्शन नहीं है। अपना कनेक्शन जाँचो और फिर कोशिश करो।
t.id: Tidak ada akses internet. Periksa koneksi dan ulangi permintaan.
t.it: Nessuna connessione internet. Controlla la connessione e riprova.
t.ja: インターネットに接続されていません。接続を確認して、再リクエストしてください。
t.ko: 인터넷에 연결되어 있지 않습니다. 연결을 확인한 후 다시 시도해 주세요.
t.ms: Tiada sambungan internet. Sila semak sambungan dan cuba lagi.
t.nb: Ingen internettforbindelse. Kontroller tilkoblingen og prøv igjen.
t.nl: Geen internetverbinding. Controleer je verbinding en probeer het opnieuw.
t.pl: Brak połączenia z internetem. Sprawdź połączenie i spróbuj ponownie.
t.pt_BR: Sem conexão à internet. Por favor, verifique a sua conexão e tente de novo.
t.ru: Нет доступа к интернету. Проверь соединение и повтори запрос.
t.sv: Ingen internetanslutning. Kontrollera din anslutning och försök igen.
t.tr: İnternet erişimi yok. Lütfen bağlantınızı kontrol edip tekrar deneyin.
t.vi: Không có kết nối Internet. Vui lòng kiểm tra kết nối và thử lại.
t.zh_CN: 无网络连接。请检查网络连接后重试。

context:
Surface: Paywall — premium benefit row title used in the paywall benefit list.
Type: paywall benefit title
Context: Promotes the past-day drink logging feature ("backfill drinks you forgot to log"). NOT a forgot-password prompt — this is a premium feature entry point that lets the user add drinks to previous days.
Constraints: Keep concise to fit a benefit row title.

t.da: Har du glemt at registrere en drik?
t.fr: Tu as oublié d'enregistrer quelque chose?
t.ja: 飲み物を記録し忘れましたか？
t.nb: Har du glemt å legge til noe?
t.vi: Bạn quên ghi lại điều gì đó?

en: Water can boost your metabolism. For a healthier lifestyle, drink more water.
context:
Surface: Tips screen — single tip card / tip-of-the-day notification body.
Type: tip
Context: Plain-language hydration tip — drinking water can support metabolism and a healthier lifestyle.
Register: casual T-form — tips are friendly health-conscious companion voice, not medical lecture (default for non-formal surfaces, see § Brand voice § Pronouns).

t.ar: يمكن للماء أن يعزز عملية الأيض لديك. لأسلوب حياة أكثر صحة، اشرب المزيد من الماء.
t.da: Vand kan sætte gang i dit stofskifte. Drik mere vand for en sundere livsstil.
t.de: Wasser kann deinen Stoffwechsel ankurbeln. Für einen gesünderen Lebensstil trink mehr Wasser.
t.en: Water can boost your metabolism. For a healthier lifestyle, drink more water.
t.es: El agua puede aumentar tu metabolismo. Para un estilo de vida más saludable, aumenta tu consumo de agua.
t.fr: L'eau peut stimuler ton métabolisme. Pour un mode de vie plus sain, bois plus d'eau.
t.hi: पानी मेटाबॉलिज़्म बढ़ा सकता है। सेहतमंद जीवनशैली के लिए ज़्यादा पानी पियो।
t.id: Air dapat meningkatkan metabolismemu. Untuk gaya hidup yang lebih sehat, perbanyak minum air.
t.it: L'acqua può stimolare il tuo metabolismo. Per uno stile di vita più sano, bevi più acqua.
t.ja: 水は新陳代謝を高めてくれます。より健康的なライフスタイルのために、もっと水を飲みましょう。
t.ko: 물은 신진대사를 촉진할 수 있어요. 더 건강한 생활을 위해 물을 더 마셔요.
t.ms: Air boleh meningkatkan metabolisme awak. Untuk gaya hidup yang lebih sihat, minum lebih banyak air.
t.nb: Vann kan øke stoffskiftet ditt. For en sunnere livsstil, drikk mer vann.
t.nl: Water kan je stofwisseling stimuleren. Drink meer water voor een gezondere levensstijl.
t.pl: Woda może przyspieszyć twój metabolizm. Dla zdrowszego stylu życia pij więcej wody.
t.pt_BR: A água pode impulsionar seu metabolismo. Para um estilo de vida mais saudável, aumente sua ingestão de água.
t.ru: Вода может улучшить твой обмен веществ. Для более здорового образа жизни пей больше воды.
t.sv: Vatten kan öka din ämnesomsättning. Drick mer vatten för en hälsosammare livsstil.
t.tr: Su, metabolizmanı hızlandırabilir. Daha sağlıklı bir yaşam için daha fazla su iç.
t.vi: Nước có thể tăng cường chuyển hóa của bạn. Để có lối sống khỏe mạnh hơn, hãy uống nhiều nước hơn.
t.zh_CN: 水能促进新陈代谢。想要更健康的生活，就多喝点水吧。

context:
Surface: Paywall / subscription screen and Settings → Help — "Restore purchases" button used to recover previously bought subscriptions on a new device or after reinstall.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative phrase. Tapping triggers the App Store / Apphud restore-purchases flow. Standard iOS app store terminology — translate as the equivalent platform-conventional phrase ("Restore purchases", not "Renew" or "Reactivate").
Constraints: Keep short — single-line restore CTA (font auto-shrinks to fit); use the platform-conventional 'Restore purchases' wording (not 'Renew'/'Reactivate').

Surface: Account view / Account editing screen / login + registration form — field section header, placeholder and accessibility label for the username (login) text field.
Type: form field label
Context: Noun. Label for the account username / login field — the user's unique handle used to sign in (distinct from `userName`, which is the display name). Displayed uppercased in some surfaces.
Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) — fits a form section header and text-field placeholder.

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Combined achievement acknowledgment and praise for reaching today's water goal. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with text4_10F for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.de: Du hast es geschafft! Gut gemacht!
t.ja: やりましたね、よくできました！
t.nb: Du har gjort det. Godt jobba!
t.nl: Het is je gelukt, goed gedaan!
t.sv: Du har klarat det. Bra jobbat!
t.vi: Bạn đã làm được - tốt lắm!

en: Your password must be at least 6 characters
context:
Surface: Login / registration screen — server validation error message shown when the entered password is too short.
Type: error message
Context: Server-side error mapped from the `short_password` API error code. Tells the user their password is too short and must be at least 6 characters.

t.ar: يجب أن تتكوّن كلمة المرور من 6 أحرف على الأقل
t.de: Das Passwort muss mindestens 6 Zeichen lang sein
t.en: Your password must be at least 6 characters
t.es: La contraseña debe tener al menos 6 caracteres
t.fr: Ton mot de passe doit comporter au moins 6 caractères
t.hi: पासवर्ड कम से कम 6 अक्षर का होना चाहिए
t.id: Kata sandi harus berisi minimal 6 karakter
t.it: La password deve contenere almeno 6 caratteri
t.ja: パスワードは6文字以上にしてください
t.nl: Je wachtwoord moet ten minste 6 tekens lang zijn
t.pl: Hasło musi mieć co najmniej 6 znaków
t.pt_BR: Sua senha deve ter pelo menos 6 caracteres
t.ru: Пароль должен содержать не менее 6 символов
t.vi: Mật khẩu phải có ít nhất 6 ký tự
t.zh_CN: 密码长度不能少于 6 个字符

en: One more glass of water won’t hurt!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Playful nudge that an additional glass of water won't hurt — encourages logging another drink.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).
Tone: playful.

t.ar: كوب آخر من الماء لن يضرك!
t.da: Et glas vand mere skader ikke!
t.de: Noch ein Glas Wasser schadet nicht!
t.en: One more glass of water won’t hurt!
t.es: ¡Un vaso más de agua no te hará daño!
t.fr: Un verre d'eau supplémentaire ne peut pas faire de mal!
t.hi: एक और गिलास पानी नुकसान नहीं पहुँचाएगा!
t.it: Un bicchiere d’acqua in più non fa mai male!
t.ja: もう一杯水を飲んでも損はありませんよ！
t.ko: 물 한 잔 더 마셔도 괜찮아요!
t.ms: Tak salah minum segelas air lagi!
t.nb: Et glass vann til skader ikke!
t.nl: Één glas water meer kan geen kwaad!
t.pl: Jeszcze jedna szklanka wody nie zaszkodzi!
t.pt_BR: Mais um copo de água não vai fazer mal!
t.ru: Ещё один стакан воды не повредит!
t.sv: Ännu ett glas vatten skadar inte!
t.tr: Fazladan bir bardak su zarar vermez!
t.vi: Thêm một cốc nước sẽ không gây hại!

context:
Surface: Settings / Paywall — toast / alert message shown after the user taps "Restore purchases" and at least one previous purchase is successfully restored to the current Apple ID.
Type: confirmation message
Context: Confirms to the user that their previously bought subscription(s) have been re-applied to this install. Key name contains a typo ("Successed" instead of "Succeeded") — legacy identifier, do not rename.
Constraints: Keep short — fits in a toast / alert body.

t.es: Las compras se han restaurado correctamente
t.hi: खरीद को सफ़लतापूर्वक रिस्टोर कर दिया गया
t.ja: 購入が無事復元されました
t.vi: Đã khôi phục thành công giao dịch mua

en: Don't let us down, reach your goal today!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Light teasing partner-voice nudge ("don't let us down") asking the user to reach today's water goal.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).
Tone: Light teasing — keep the friendly partner-voice register, do not turn it into a guilt trip.

t.da: Skuf os ikke, nå dit mål i dag!
t.de: Lass uns nicht im Stich, erreiche das Tagesziel heute!
t.en: Don't let us down, reach your goal today!
t.fr: Ne nous laisse pas tomber, atteins ton objectif aujourd'hui!
t.hi: हमें निराश मत करो, आज अपना लक्ष्य पूरा करो!
t.id: Jangan kecewakan kami, capai targetmu hari ini!
t.it: Non ci deludere, raggiungi il tuo obiettivo oggi!
t.ja: ガッカリさせないで、目標を達成しましょう！
t.ko: 실망시키지 마요, 오늘 목표를 달성해 봐요!
t.ms: Jangan kecewakan kami, capai matlamat hari ini!
t.nb: Ikke skuff oss, nå målet ditt i dag!
t.nl: Stel ons niet teleur, haal vandaag je doel!
t.pl: Nie zawiedź nas, osiągnij dziś swój cel!
t.pt_BR: Não nos decepcione, alcance sua meta hoje!
t.ru: Не подведи нас, достигни цели сегодня!
t.sv: Gör oss inte besvikna, nå ditt mål idag!
t.tr: Bizi hayal kırıklığına uğratma, bugün hedefine ulaş!
t.vi: Đừng làm chúng tôi thất vọng, hãy đạt mục tiêu hôm nay nhé!
t.zh_CN: 别让我们失望，今天达成目标哦！

context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Praise affirming that today's water intake is a good result. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with text4_15M for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Godt klaret! Flot indsats i dag!
t.fr: Bien joué! Voilà un excellent résultat!
t.hi: बहुत अच्छे! आज बढ़िया काम किया!
t.it: Ottimo lavoro! È proprio un buon risultato!
t.ja: よくできました！今日はいい結果ですね！
t.nb: Godt jobba! Det er et godt resultat!
t.pl: Dobra robota! To się nazywa niezły wynik!
t.pt_BR: Muito bem! Esse é um bom resultado!
t.sv: Bra jobbat! Det är ett bra resultat!
t.vi: Tốt lắm! Đó là một kết quả tốt!

en: Will you reach your daily water goal today?
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Rhetorical question challenging the user to reach today's daily water intake.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Vil du nå dit daglige mål i dag?
t.de: Kannst du dein Tagesziel heute erreichen?
t.en: Will you reach your daily water goal today?
t.es: ¿Llegarás hoy a tu meta de agua?
t.hi: क्या आज तुम्हारा रोज़ का लक्ष्य पूरा होगा?
t.id: Bisa nggak kamu capai target hari ini?
t.it: Ce la farai a raggiungere il tuo obiettivo oggi?
t.ja: 今日は一日の目標を達成できますか？
t.nb: Når du det daglige vannmålet ditt i dag?
t.nl: Haal je vandaag je dagelijkse waterdoel?
t.pl: Osiągniesz dziś swój dzienny cel wody?
t.pt_BR: Você vai alcançar sua meta de água hoje?
t.sv: Kommer du att nå ditt dagliga mål idag?
t.tr: Bugün günlük su hedefini tutturabilecek misin?
t.vi: Hôm nay bạn sẽ đạt mục tiêu uống nước hàng ngày chứ?
t.zh_CN: 今天能达成每日饮水目标吗？

en: Well done, you've earned all the awards!
context:
Surface: Main screen awards section / Awards screen header — celebratory line shown when the user has unlocked every available award.
Type: paragraph (celebratory)
Context: Praise message confirming the user has collected the full set of awards. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with allAwardsF for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).

t.ar: أحسنت! لقد حصلت على كل الجوائز!
t.da: Godt klaret, du har alle belønningerne!
t.de: Gut gemacht! Du hast alle Preise erhalten!
t.en: Well done, you've earned all the awards!
t.es: ¡Buen trabajo, has ganado todos los premios!
t.fr: Bien joué, tu as obtenu toutes les récompenses!
t.hi: बहुत अच्छे, तुम्हें सभी अवॉर्ड मिल गए!
t.it: Bravo, hai ottenuto tutte le conquiste!
t.ja: 全てのアワードをゲットしました！
t.ms: Bagus, awak telah menerima semua hadiah!
t.nb: Godt jobba, du har mottatt alle prisene!
t.nl: Goed gedaan, je hebt alle onderscheidingen verdiend!
t.pl: Dobra robota, masz już wszystkie nagrody!
t.pt_BR: Muito bem, você ganhou todos os prêmios!
t.sv: Bra jobbat, du har fått alla utmärkelser!
t.vi: Thật tuyệt, bạn đã nhận được tất cả phần thưởng!
t.zh_CN: 做得好，你已获得所有奖励！

en: Congratulations, you now have access to all premium features
context:
Surface: Subscription / paywall screen — post-purchase confirmation paragraph shown when the user already has premium.
Type: paragraph (confirmation)
Context: Confirms to an already-subscribed user that all features of the app are unlocked.
Tone: encouraging.

t.ar: تهانينا، يمكنك الآن الوصول إلى كافة ميزات التطبيق
t.da: Tillykke, du har nu adgang til alle appens funktioner
t.de: Glückwunsch! Jetzt hast du Zugang zu allen Funktionen der App
t.en: Congratulations, you now have access to all premium features
t.es: Enhorabuena, ahora tienes acceso a todas las características de la aplicación
t.fr: Félicitations, tu as maintenant accès à toutes les fonctionnalités premium
t.hi: बधाई हो, अब तुम्हारे पास ऐप के सारे प्रीमियम फ़ीचर्स हैं
t.id: Selamat, sekarang semua fitur aplikasi tersedia untukmu
t.it: Congratulazioni, ora hai accesso a tutte le funzioni dell'applicazione
t.ja: おめでとうございます、このアプリの全ての機能が利用できるようになりました
t.ko: 축하해요. 이제 모든 프리미엄 기능을 사용할 수 있어요
t.ms: Tahniah, sekarang semua fungsi aplikasi tersedia untuk awak
t.nb: Gratulerer, du har nå tilgang til alle funksjonene i appen
t.nl: Gefeliciteerd, je hebt nu toegang tot alle functies van de app
t.pl: Gratulacje, masz teraz dostęp do wszystkich funkcji aplikacji
t.pt_BR: Parabéns, agora você tem acesso a todos os recursos do app
t.ru: Поздравляем, теперь тебе доступны все возможности приложения
t.sv: Grattis, du har nu tillgång till alla funktioner i appen
t.tr: Tebrikler, artık uygulamanın tüm özelliklerine erişimin var
t.vi: Xin chúc mừng, bây giờ bạn có quyền truy cập vào tất cả các tính năng của ứng dụng
t.zh_CN: 恭喜，你现在可以使用该应用的所有功能了。

context:
Surface: Password reset screen — primary CTA button label that triggers sending the password reset email.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb meaning "restore (password)" — submits the password reset request. NOT a paywall "restore purchases" button (that is `restoreButton`).
Constraints: Keep very short (1 word) — fits a compact CTA button.

en: No drinks added during this period
context:
Surface: Statistics screen — empty-state message shown when the selected period (day / week / month) has no logged drinks.
Type: empty state
Context: Tells the user that the selected statistics range is empty (no drink entries). Neutral observation, not an error.
Tone: gentle.

t.ar: لم تُضَف أي مشروبات خلال هذه الفترة
t.da: Ingen drikkevarer tilføjet i denne periode
t.de: In diesem Zeitraum wurden keine Getränke hinzugefügt
t.en: No drinks added during this period
t.es: No se han añadido bebidas en este período
t.fr: Aucune boisson ajoutée pendant cette période
t.hi: इस दौरान कोई पेय नहीं जोड़ा गया
t.id: Belum ada minuman yang ditambahkan pada periode ini
t.it: Nessuna bevanda aggiunta durante questo periodo
t.ja: この期間中に追加された飲み物はありません
t.ko: 이 기간 동안 추가된 음료가 없어요

context:
Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
Type: achievement title
Context: Award id=9 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after reaching the daily goal seven times (paired with ach_descr9). Celebratory exclamation is intentional.
Constraints: Keep short — this one is a full short phrase, OK to keep as is.

t.vi: Cơ thể của bạn nói cảm ơn!

context:
Surface: Account header (HeaderAccountCell) — prefix label shown above a user stat such as "In the application: 14 days" / "In the application: 3 months".
Type: section header / stat label prefix
Context: Standalone label describing the "time since install" metric on the user's account header. Concatenated at runtime with a localized plural day / month value (dayPlural / monthPlural) — reads in target language as "In the application 14 days" / "In the application 3 months". Translate as the leading phrase that introduces an elapsed-since-install duration.
Constraints: Keep short (≤25 chars) — fits as a label preceding a number; no trailing punctuation (runtime appends value).

Surface: Awards screen / Awards header / Main screen — trailing word of the gendered awards count sentence (AwardsViewModel, HeaderAwardsCellViewModel, MainViewModel).
Type: sentence fragment / word
Context: Last word of a runtime-composed sentence with two numeric values, rendered as e.g. "I got 5 of 13 awards!". Concatenated in Swift as "<haveAward1M|F> <gotCount> <of> <totalCount> <haveAward2>". Translator must shape this fragment so the full sentence reads naturally in target language when placed after a number (singular / plural handled by sibling keys haveAward1M / haveAward1F if needed); exclamation is intentional (celebratory tone).
Constraints: No leading space; keep short — runtime appends after a number.
Tone: celebratory.

Surface: Beverage catalog row title; also used as the source key for the drink-name formatter.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for an energy drink in the standard beverage catalog. Sentence case per i18n style for non-proper-noun beverage names.

Surface: Settings / Reminders — notification sound picker row label (also used in the in-app add-drink sound picker). One of the AppSounds preset rows.
Type: section row label / sound preset name
Context: Display name of the "Magic" notification sound preset (a sparkly / chime-like sfx). Translate as the locale's natural noun evoking a magical / sparkle sound.
Constraints: Keep short (single word) — fits a narrow picker row.

Surface: Settings / Reminders — notification sound picker row label (also used in the in-app add-drink sound picker). One of the AppSounds preset rows.
Type: section row label / sound preset name
Context: Display name of the "Message" notification sound preset (a phone / messenger-style alert tone). Key is "soundCall" but the user-facing label is "Message" — use the locale's natural noun for an incoming message / chat notification sound.
Constraints: Keep short (single word) — fits a narrow picker row.

en: Cool, I achieved \"[%s]\" in \"My Water\" app! [%s] #mywater
context:
Surface: VKontakte (VK) share sheet — prefilled post body when the user shares an unlocked achievement to VK (Russia-region social network; routed to ru.strings).
Type: paragraph (social share)
Context: First-person brag post naming the unlocked achievement and linking back to the app. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with achivmentTextShareVkM for subject-gender agreement (ru, ar, he, etc.; the verb "achieved" agrees with subject gender). Key name keeps the legacy "achivment" typo — do not rename.
Placeholders:
  [%s] (first) — achievement / award title (e.g. "Good habit")
  [%s] (second) — share link back to the app (URL)
Constraints: Both placeholders are non-indexed [%s] — keep them in source order (the bare form cannot reorder). Preserve the #mywater hashtag and the "My Water" brand quotes verbatim.
Tone: friendly, casual first person.

t.ar: رائع، لقد حققت \"[%s]\" في تطبيق \"My Water\"! [%s] #mywater

t.ms: Hore, saya dapat pencapaian "[%s]" dalam aplikasi "Air saya"! [%s] #mywater
t.nl: Cool, ik heb \"[%s]\" behaald in de \"My water\" app! [%s] #mywater
t.pl: Rewelacja, udało mi się osiągnąć \"[%s]\" w aplikacji \"Moja woda\"! [%s] #mywater
t.pt_BR: Legal, eu consegui \"[%s]\" no aplicativo \"My Water\"! [%s] #mywater
t.ru: Ура, я получила достижение \"[%s]\" в приложении \"Моя вода\"! [%s] #mywater

context:

context:

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).

Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

en: Well done! Start tomorrow with a glass of water again!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Praise plus encouragement to begin tomorrow the same way — with a glass of water. M variant — male grammatical form, paired with text4_14F for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: أحسنت، ابدأ غدًا بكوب ماء مرة أخرى!
t.da: Godt klaret, start med et glas vand igen i morgen!
t.de: Gut gemacht! Fange morgen deinen Tag mit einem Glas Wasser an!
t.en: Well done! Start tomorrow with a glass of water again!
t.es: Buen trabajo, ¡mañana empieza el día con otro vaso de agua!
t.fr: Bravo, demain commence à nouveau avec un verre d'eau!
t.hi: बहुत अच्छे! कल फिर एक गिलास पानी से शुरू करना!
t.id: Bagus sekali, mulai besok juga dengan segelas air!
t.it: Ottimo lavoro, domani comincia di nuovo la tua giornata con un bicchiere d’acqua!
t.ja: よくできました、明日も一日を一杯の水で始めましょう！
t.ko: 잘했어요. 내일도 물 한 잔으로 다시 시작해요!
t.ms: Syabas, esok mulakan hari dengan segelas air lagi!
t.nb: Godt jobba, start i morgen med et glass vann igjen!
t.nl: Goed gedaan, begin morgen opnieuw met een glas water!
t.pl: Dobra robota, jutro znów zacznij dzień od szklanki wody!
t.pt_BR: Muito bem, amanhã comece de novo com um copo de água!
t.ru: Молодец, начни и завтра свой день со стакана воды!
t.sv: Bra jobbat, börja morgondagen med ett glas vatten igen!
t.tr: Aferin, yarın da güne bir bardak su ile başla!
t.vi: Làm tốt lắm, ngày mai lại bắt đầu với một cốc nước!
t.zh_CN: 做得好，明天也用一杯水开启新的一天吧！

context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Habit-framing reminder to drink water daily.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.fr: Bois de l'eau tous les jours!
t.ja: 毎日水を飲みましょう！

en: Cool, I achieved "[%s]" in the "My Water" app! #mywater
context:
Surface: Award detail share sheet — Facebook share text template prefilled when the user shares an unlocked achievement.
Type: paragraph (social share)
Context: Brag-style share copy mentioning the unlocked award by name and tagging the app. F variant — female grammatical form, paired with achivmentTextShareFacebookM for agreement in languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.; the past-tense verb "achieved" agrees with subject gender in those languages). Note: key name contains a typo ("achivment" instead of "achievement") — legacy identifier, do not rename.
Placeholders:
  [%s] — achievement title (e.g. "Plop", "Good habit")

t.ar: رائع، لقد حققت "[%s]" في تطبيق "My Water"! #mywater
t.da: Så sejt, jeg fik "[%s]" i "Mit vand" appen! #mywater
t.de: Hurra, ich habe "[%s]" in der App "Mein Wasser" erreicht! #mywater
t.en: Cool, I achieved "[%s]" in the "My Water" app! #mywater
t.fr: Cool, j'ai obtenu la récompense « [%s] » dans l'application My Water ! #mywater
t.hi: वाह, मैंने "My Water" ऐप में "[%s]" हासिल किया! #mywater
t.id: Hore, saya dapat prestasi "[%s]" dalam aplikasi "My Water"! #mywater
t.it: Urrà, ho ottenuto "[%s]" nell’applicazione "La mia acqua"! #mywater
t.ja: やった！「My Water」アプリで「[%s]」を達成しました #mywater
t.ms: Hore, saya dapat pencapaian "[%s]" dalam aplikasi "Air saya"! #mywater
t.nl: Cool, ik heb "[%s]" behaald in de "My Water"-app! #mywater
t.pl: Rewelacja, udało mi się osiągnąć "[%s]" w aplikacji "Moja woda"! #mywater
t.pt_BR: Legal, eu consegui "[%s]" no aplicativo "My Water"! #mywater
t.ru: Ура, я получила достижение "[%s]" в приложении "Моя вода"! #mywater
t.tr: Yaşasın, ben "Benim suyum" uygulamasında "[%s]" başarısını aldım! #mywater
t.vi: Tuyệt, tôi đã đạt được "[%s]" trong ứng dụng "My Water"! #mywater
t.zh_CN: 耶！我在 My Water 中达成了“[%s]”！#mywater

context:
Surface: Account view / Account editing screen — field section header, placeholder and accessibility label for the user's display name text field.
Type: form field label
Context: Noun. Label for the account display name field — the user's human-readable name shown to friends (distinct from `userLogin`, which is the unique sign-in handle). Displayed uppercased in some surfaces.
Constraints: Keep short (1 word) — fits a form section header and text-field placeholder.

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / progress label, shown when the user is close to reaching the daily water goal but hasn't yet (progress 75% to <100%).
Type: motivational text
Context: Brief call to action urging the user to finish reaching the daily water goal. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ja: 目標を達成しましょう！
t.vi: Hãy đạt đến mục tiêu của bạn!

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for sports / isotonic / electrolyte drink in the standard beverage catalog. Note: the key is "Isotonic" but the English value uses the more common consumer term "Sports drink"; translate using the natural consumer term in target language (not the chemistry term "isotonic").

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / progress label, shown when the user is close to reaching the daily water goal but hasn't yet (progress 75% to <100%).
Type: motivational text
Context: Brief encouragement urging the user not to give up partway to the daily water goal. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.de: Bleib nicht auf halbem Weg stehen!
t.ja: 途中であきらめないで！
t.pl: Nie zatrzymuj się w połowie drogi!
t.pt_BR: Não pare no meio do caminho!

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for mineral water in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label.

en: Reach your goal for the first time
context:
Surface: Awards screen / award detail card — achievement description below achievement name.
Type: achievement description
Context: Description for the achievement awarded when the user reaches the daily water goal for the first time.
Register: casual T-form — achievement descriptions celebrate the user in casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Nå dit mål for første gang
t.de: Erreiche dein Tagesziel zum ersten Mal
t.en: Reach your goal for the first time
t.es: Alcanza tu meta por primera vez
t.fr: Atteins ton objectif pour la première fois
t.hi: पहली बार अपना लक्ष्य पूरा करो
t.it: Raggiungi il tuo obiettivo per la prima volta
t.ja: はじめて目標を達成する
t.nb: Nå målet ditt for første gang
t.nl: Haal je doel voor de eerste keer
t.pl: Osiągnij swój cel po raz pierwszy
t.pt_BR: Atinja sua meta pela primeira vez
t.sv: Nå ditt mål för första gången
t.vi: Đạt mục tiêu lần đầu tiên

context:
Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for kompot — traditional Slavic fruit drink (boiled fruit beverage). Capitalized as a label. In English the transliteration "Kompot" is used; translate to the local equivalent or keep transliteration if there is no common name in target language.

en: Well done, you reached your goal!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Praise that the user finished the daily water amount. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Godt klaret, du nåede dit mål!
t.de: Gut gemacht, du hast dein Tagesziel erreicht!
t.en: Well done, you reached your goal!
t.fr: Bravo, tu as atteint ton objectif!
t.hi: बहुत अच्छे, तुमने अपना लक्ष्य पूरा किया!
t.it: Brava, hai raggiunto il tuo obiettivo!
t.ja: よくできました、目標達成です！
t.nb: Godt jobba, du nådde målet ditt!
t.nl: Goed gedaan, je hebt je doel gehaald!
t.pt_BR: Muito bem, você atingiu sua meta!
t.sv: Bra jobbat, du nådde ditt mål!
t.vi: Tốt lắm, bạn đã đạt mục tiêu!

context:
Surface: watchOS — Drink select screen navigation title.
Type: screen title
Context: Title of the screen where the user picks which beverage to log on Apple Watch.

en: Keep going and you'll reach your goal
context:
Surface: Award detail card — motivational subtitle shown for a not-yet-unlocked award (empty / locked state) and on streak popups.
Type: paragraph (encouraging)
Context: Friendly nudge encouraging the user to keep going to unlock the award. Used as the empty-state line beneath a locked award visual.

t.da: Bliv ved, så når du dit mål
t.de: Bleib dran, dann erreichst du dein Ziel
t.en: Keep going and you'll reach your goal
t.fr: Continue, et tu atteindras ton objectif
t.hi: कोशिश करते रहो, लक्ष्य ज़रूर पूरा होगा
t.id: Teruslah berusaha dan kamu akan mencapai targetmu
t.it: Continua così, raggiungerai il tuo obiettivo
t.ja: 頑張れば目標を達成できるはずです
t.ms: Berusaha dan awak akan mencapai matlamat
t.nb: Fortsett, så når du målet ditt
t.nl: Blijf volhouden, dan bereik je je doel
t.pt_BR: Tente, você vai alcançar a meta
t.sv: Fortsätt så når du ditt mål
t.vi: Hãy cố gắng và bạn sẽ đạt được mục tiêu
t.zh_CN: 继续努力，就能达成目标

context:
Surface: Achievements list / award detail — description line.
Type: achievement description
Context: Award id=13 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.description(forDescriptionKey:). Unlock condition: log drinks for 90 days. Pairs with ach_name13.
Register: casual T-form — achievement descriptions celebrate the user in casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.de: Notiere, was du innerhalb von 90 Tagen getrunken hast
t.hi: 90 दिन तक अपने पेय दर्ज करो
t.it: Registra le tue bevande per 90 giorni
t.pl: Zapisz ilość płynów wypitych w ciągu 90 dni
t.sv: Skriv ner dina drycker i 90 dagar
t.vi: Ghi lại đồ uống trong 90 ngày

context:
Surface: Registration screen — server validation error message shown when the chosen username (login) is already used by another account.
Type: error message
Context: Server-side error mapped from the `login_taken` API error code. Tells the user the username they chose is already taken; they should pick a different one. "Username" here refers to the `userLogin` handle, not the display name.

t.da: Dette brugernavn er allerede i brug
t.de: Dieser Benutzername ist bereits in Gebrauch
t.es: Ese nombre de usuario ya está ocupado
t.hi: यह यूज़रनेम पहले से इस्तेमाल में है
t.it: Questo nome utente è già utilizzato
t.ja: このユーザー名はすでに使用されています。
t.nb: Dette brukernavnet er allerede i bruk
t.nl: Deze gebruikersnaam is al in gebruik
t.pl: Ta nazwa użytkownika jest już zajęta
t.pt_BR: Esse nome de usuário já está em uso
t.vi: Tên người dùng này đã được sử dụng

context:
Surface: Onboarding intro carousel — slide 3 (Drinks) title, paired with tutSubtitle3.
Type: tutorial step
Context: Title on the carousel slide that introduces logging non-water drinks with a hydration coefficient. "Various drinks" = "different kinds of drinks / beverages", not "miscellaneous".

Surface: Settings / Reminders — notification sound picker row label (also used in the in-app add-drink sound picker). One of the AppSounds preset rows.
Type: section row label / sound preset name
Context: Display name of the "Spring" notification sound preset (a bouncy / springy boing sfx). Key is "soundMessage" but the user-facing label is "Spring" — translate as the locale's natural noun for a springy / boing sound (the mechanical-spring sense, not the season).
Constraints: Keep short (single word) — fits a narrow picker row.

Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / progress label, shown when the user is close to reaching the daily water goal but hasn't yet (progress 75% to <100%).
Type: motivational text
Context: Brief encouragement praising the user's current effort and asking them to continue at the same pace. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.vi: Cứ tiếp tục phát huy nhé!

context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Short pairing of drinking water with being active.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ja: 水を飲んで、活発に生きましょう！
t.vi: Uống nước, vận động lên nào!

context:
Surface: Statistics tab / navigation title across iOS and watchOS; also used in Spotlight, Siri hydration snippet, weight/stat segmented controls, and friend profile segmented control.
Type: screen title
Context: Title of the Statistics screen (where the user views their hydration history and totals). Short noun phrase naming the screen.
Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) for navigation bar title / tab.

Surface: app-wide.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb. Generic add action used across the app to insert a new item (e.g. add a drink, add a friend, add a custom beverage).
Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens).

Surface: Settings screen — success confirmation alert body shown after a support / contact email is sent successfully (e.g. "Contact us" form submitted).
Type: alert message
Context: Confirms to the user that their email was sent through successfully.

t.hi: ईमेल सफलतापूर्वक भेजा जा चुका है
t.ja: メールの送信に成功しました
t.pt_BR: O e-mail foi enviado com sucesso
t.vi: Email đã được gửi thành công

context:
Surface: Settings → Notifications sound picker (and onboarding subscription sound card preview) — row label for the first option.
Type: button label
Context: Name of the sound preset that uses the iOS system default notification sound (no custom in-app sound). Short noun phrase, title-case.
Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars).

en: It's not just water that counts. Other drinks do too, each with its own coefficient
context:
Surface: Onboarding intro carousel — slide 3 (Drinks) description, paired with tutTitle3.
Type: tutorial step
Context: Subtitle on the carousel slide that introduces logging non-water drinks. Explains that other beverages (tea, coffee, juice, etc.) count toward the daily goal but with a hydration coefficient. "Simple water" = plain / pure water; "coefficient" refers to the per-beverage hydration factor used in the drink catalog.

t.ar: لا تحتسب الماء العادي وحده، بل المشروبات الأخرى أيضًا، ولكل منها معامله الخاص.
t.da: Det er ikke kun vand, der tæller - andre drikke gør det også, hver med sin egen koefficient
t.de: Zähl nicht nur reines Wasser, sondern auch andere Getränke mit einem Koeffizienten
t.en: It's not just water that counts. Other drinks do too, each with its own coefficient
t.es: Además del agua normal, ten en cuenta otras bebidas con un coeficiente
t.fr: Il n'y a pas que l'eau qui compte : les autres boissons aussi, chacune avec son coefficient.
t.hi: सिर्फ़ पानी ही नहीं, बाकी पेय भी गिने जाते हैं - हर एक अपने गुणांक के साथ।
t.id: Perhatikan tidak hanya air putih, tetapi juga minuman lain dengan koefisien
t.it: Conta non solo l'acqua: anche le altre bevande hanno il loro coefficiente
t.ja: 水だけでなく、その他の係数付きの飲み物も考慮しましょう
t.ko: 물뿐만 아니라 다른 음료도 각자의 계수로 함께 반영돼요
t.ms: Kira bukan sahaja air biasa, tetapi juga minuman lain dengan pekali
t.nb: Ikke bare vann teller - andre drikker teller også, hver med sin egen koeffisient
t.nl: Niet alleen water telt mee - andere dranken ook, elk met een eigen coëfficiënt
t.pl: Liczy się nie tylko zwykła woda, ale też inne napoje, każdy ze swoim współczynnikiem
t.pt_BR: Não é só a água que conta: outras bebidas também entram no cálculo, cada uma com seu coeficiente
t.ru: Учитывай не только простую воду, но и другие напитки с коэффициентом
t.sv: Ta inte bara hänsyn till vanligt vatten utan även till andra drycker med en koefficient
t.tr: Yalnızca sade suyu değil, katsayılı diğer içecekleri de hesaba kat
t.vi: Tính cả các đồ uống khác kèm hệ số, không chỉ nước thông thường
t.zh_CN: 不只考虑纯水，也考虑一定系数的其他饮料

en: Unfortunately, you do not have an Instagram account set up
context:
Surface: Achievement / progress sharing flow — alert body shown when the user tries to share to Instagram but the Instagram app is not installed or no Instagram account is configured on the device.
Type: alert message
Context: Apologetic message explaining that the share-to-Instagram action cannot proceed because the user has no Instagram account set up.

t.ar: للأسف، لم تقم بإعداد حساب Instagram
t.da: Desværre har du ikke oprettet en Instagram-konto
t.de: Du hast leider kein Instagram-Konto eingerichtet
t.en: Unfortunately, you do not have an Instagram account set up
t.es: Desafortunadamente no has configurado tu cuenta de Instagram
t.fr: Malheureusement, tu n'as pas configuré de compte Instagram
t.hi: दुर्भाग्य से, तुम्हारा Instagram अकाउंट सेटअप नहीं है
t.id: Sayangnya, akun Instagram kamu belum diatur.
t.it: Purtroppo non hai impostato l’account Instagram
t.ja: 残念ながらInstagramアカウントが設定されていません
t.ms: Malangnya, akaun Instagram awak tidak dipasang
t.nb: Beklager, du har ikke en Instagram-konto
t.nl: Helaas heb je geen Instagram-account ingesteld
t.pl: Niestety, nie masz skonfigurowanego konta na Instagramie
t.pt_BR: Infelizmente, você não tem uma conta do Instagram configurada
t.ru: К сожалению, у тебя не настроен аккаунт Instagram
t.tr: Üzgünüz, yapılandırılmış bir Instagram hesabın yok
t.vi: Rất tiếc, bạn chưa thiết lập tài khoản Instagram
t.zh_CN: 不好意思，你还未设置Instagram账号

en: The password is incorrect. Please check it and try again
context:
Surface: Login / change-password screens — error message shown when the entered password does not match the account.
Type: error message
Context: Server-side error indicating the password is incorrect. Asks the user to verify and re-enter it.

t.ar: كلمة المرور غير صحيحة، يرجى التحقق منها والمحاولة ثانية
t.da: Adgangskoden er forkert. Tjek den, og prøv igen
t.de: Das Passwort ist nicht korrekt. Bitte gib es noch einmal richtig ein
t.en: The password is incorrect. Please check it and try again
t.es: La contraseña no es correcta, compruébala e inténtalo de nuevo
t.fr: Le mot de passe est incorrect, vérifie-le et réessaie
t.hi: पासवर्ड सही नहीं है, इसे जाँचो और फिर कोशिश करो
t.id: Kata sandi salah, silakan periksa kembali
t.it: La password non è corretta. Controllala e riprova
t.ja: パスワードが正しくありません。確認してもう一度入力してください。
t.ko: 비밀번호가 올바르지 않아요. 다시 확인해 주세요
t.ms: Kata laluan salah. Sila semak dan cuba lagi.
t.nb: Passordet er feil. Sjekk det og prøv igjen
t.nl: Het wachtwoord is niet correct. Controleer het en probeer het opnieuw
t.pl: Hasło jest nieprawidłowe. Sprawdź je i spróbuj ponownie.
t.pt_BR: Senha incorreta. Verifique e tente novamente
t.ru: Пароль неверный. Проверь его и попробуй снова.
t.sv: Lösenordet är felaktigt. Kontrollera det och försök igen
t.tr: Şifre yanlış. Lütfen kontrol edip tekrar deneyin
t.vi: Mật khẩu không đúng, vui lòng kiểm tra và thử lại
t.zh_CN: 密码错误，请检查后重试

en: You should be proud of yourself!
context:
Surface: Main screen — motivational text card / congratulatory label, shown after the user has reached or exceeded the daily water goal (progress 100%+).
Type: motivational text
Context: Encouraging praise directed at the user for reaching the goal. M / F variants for grammatical-gender agreement in target languages with grammatical gender (ru, ar, he, etc.).
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.da: Du skal være stolt af dig selv!
t.de: Du kannst stolz auf dich sein!
t.en: You should be proud of yourself!
t.fr: Tu devrais être fier de toi!
t.hi: तुम्हें अपने आप पर गर्व होना चाहिए!
t.ja: 自分を褒めてあげてください！
t.ms: Awak harus bangga dengan diri sendiri!
t.nb: Du burde være stolt av deg selv!
t.sv: Du borde vara stolt över dig själv!
t.vi: Bạn nên tự hào về chính mình!

context:
Surface: Reminder notifications time-window picker — sheet title for the end-of-window time picker (Settings → Notifications interval, Onboarding notifications step).
Type: section header / sheet title
Context: Preposition "To" introducing the end time of the daily hydration reminder window (paired with the start "From" time — see key "From"). Not a beverage. Translate as the preposition meaning "until" / "to" in the time-range sense.
Constraints: Keep short (single word, fits sheet header).

Surface: Achievements list / achievement unlock popup — award title.
Type: achievement title
Context: Award id=7 (DefaultAwards). Resolved via AwardDisplayFormat.title(forNameKey:). Unlocks after the user reaches the daily goal for the first time (paired with ach_descr7).
Constraints: Keep short (1-3 words for compact card display).

en: Reach your daily goal! Keep up the good work!
context:
Surface: Local scheduled reminder notification — body text, one entry from the rotating reminder pool.
Type: notification body
Context: Encourages the user to reach the daily water goal and praises ongoing progress.
Register: casual T-form — push reminders use casual partner voice (default for non-formal surfaces).

t.ar: حقق هدفك اليومي من الماء! أحسنت، واصل!
t.da: Nå dit daglige mål! Bliv ved sådan!
t.de: Erreiche heute dein Tagesziel! Mach weiter so!
t.en: Reach your daily goal! Keep up the good work!
t.es: ¡Llega hoy a tu meta de agua! ¡Sigue así!
t.fr: Bois assez d'eau aujourd'hui! Continue comme ça!
t.hi: पानी पीने का रोज़ का लक्ष्य हासिल करो! ऐसे ही आगे बढ़ते रहो!
t.it: Raggiungi il tuo obiettivo d'acqua di oggi! Continua così!
t.ja: 目標を達成しましょう！その調子！
t.ko: 목표를 달성해 봐요! 계속 잘하고 있어요!

context:

Sentence-case, no trailing punctuation; an animated ellipsis is added by the UI when needed. The source key spelling "load" is legacy — do not rename; the user-facing value is "Loading".
Constraints: Keep short (≤15 chars).

Surface: Friends list screen — navigation bar title.
Type: screen title
Context: Screen showing the user's list of in-app friends (with pending requests section above).

Surface: Find friends screen — text field placeholder for the friend search input.
Type: placeholder
Context: Hint text in the find-friends search field telling the user to enter a friend's username (login) or email address to look them up.
Constraints: Keep concise to fit a single-line search-field placeholder.

context:

Surface: app-wide.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb. Generic search / find action used as a CTA across the app (e.g. find a friend, find a user). The source key spelling "search" is legacy — do not rename; the user-facing value is "Find" (chosen as the action verb rather than the noun "Search"). Translate as the imperative "find" in target language, not "search field" placeholder.
Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens).

Surface: app-wide.
Type: button label (alert confirmation)
Context: Affirmative confirmation in yes/no alert dialogs (e.g. "Are you sure? — Yes / No"). Paired with the "No" key. Sentence-case, single word.
Constraints: Keep short (≤5 chars).

Surface: Statistics → Edit added drink screen — confirmation alert title shown after the user taps the destructive "delete" action on a previously logged drink.
Type: error message (confirmation alert title)
Context: Asks the user to confirm removing one already-logged drink entry from the day's statistics. "Beverage" here refers to a single logged drink entry (not the beverage catalog row). Paired with the "Delete" / "Cancel" alert buttons.

t.ja: この飲み物を削除しますか？

context:

t.hi: डिफ़ॉल्ट पर वापस सेट करना है?
t.ja: デフォルトに戻しますか？

Type: screen title / row title / accessibility label
Context: Noun. Generic label for the volume amount of a drink (e.g. 250 ml).

Surface: Settings → Default volumes screen — title of the bottom "Add volume" button that opens the add-volume sheet, and also the accessibility label for that button.
Type: button label / accessibility label
Context: Imperative verb phrase. Opens a dialog where the user adds a new default drink volume (in ml / oz) to their quick-add list. Despite the key id mentioning "edit", the current use is for adding a new volume (not editing existing ones).
Constraints: Keep short to fit a bottom CTA button. No trailing period.

Surface: app-wide — Settings screen row title, Account header button, Spotlight nav item.
Type: section / row title
Context: Noun. Generic "Friends" label used as the entry point to the friends list section.
Constraints: Keep short — 1 word.

Surface: app-wide.
Type: button label / row title
Context: Generic "More" affordance used to reveal additional options, expand a truncated list, or open a secondary menu. Sentence-case, single word.
Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars).

en: Detailed statistics are only available in the full version
context:
Surface: Statistics screen — premium gate footnote shown when a non-premium user opens a detailed statistics view that is gated behind My Water Premium.
Type: paragraph (paywall gate notice)
Context: Explains that detailed (drill-down) statistics are reserved for the premium tier. Uses the legacy phrasing "the full application version" (matches the surrounding watch / older paywall copy) rather than the newer "My Water Premium" label. Note: the English source says "Details statistics" (legacy phrasing for "detailed statistics"); render naturally in target language ("detailed statistics", "статистика по деталям" etc.) without copying the slightly awkward English noun stack.
Constraints: 1 sentence; no trailing period in the English source — keep target locale punctuation conventions natural.
Tone: informative, neutral.

t.ar: تتوفر إحصاءات تفصيلية فقط في الإصدار الكامل من التطبيق
t.da: Detaljeret statistik er kun tilgængelig i den fulde version

t.hi: विस्तृत आँकड़े सिर्फ़ फुल वर्ज़न में मिलते हैं
t.id: Statistik detail hanya tersedia dalam versi lengkap aplikasi
t.it: Le statistiche dettagliate sono disponibili solo nella versione completa dell'applicazione

t.pt_BR: As estatísticas detalhadas estão disponíveis apenas na versão completa do aplicativo

t.sv: Detaljerad statistik är endast tillgänglig i den fullständiga versionen av appen

context:

Constraints: Keep short to fit a small status button — 1 word.

Surface: app-wide. Premium upsell cells / popups (FullVersionCell, StreakPopup primary action, WeightNewViewModel placeholder), info button accessibility label on drink-create parameter rows (DrinkInfoParamView), widget "need premium" accessibility label (NeedPremium widget).

Context: Imperative verb phrase "Learn more" used as a generic CTA opening a follow-up screen with more details (premium info / introductory offer fallback when not eligible / parameter explanation popup / widget premium info). Translate as the equivalent short call-to-action; no implied subject.

en: Create an account, find your friends, challenge them, and drink more water!
context:
Surface: Friends list screen — empty state subtitle shown when the user is not signed in.
Type: empty state body
Context: Encourages the unauthenticated user to create an in-app account so they can use the friends feature (find friends, challenge them, drink more water). Paired with sign-up / sign-in CTAs.
Tone: encouraging.

t.ar: أنشئ حساباً، وابحث عن أصدقائك، وتحدَّهم، واشرب المزيد من الماء!
t.da: Opret en app-konto, find dine venner, udfordr dem og drik mere vand!
t.de: Erstelle ein Konto in der App, finde deine Freunde, fordere sie heraus und trink mehr Wasser!
t.en: Create an account, find your friends, challenge them, and drink more water!
t.es: ¡Crea una cuenta en la aplicación, encuentra a tus amigos, desafíales y bebe más agua!
t.fr: Crée un compte, trouve tes amis, défie-les et bois plus d'eau!
t.hi: ऐप में ही अकाउंट बनाओ, अपने दोस्तों को खोजो, उन्हें चैलेंज करो और ज़्यादा पानी पियो!
t.id: Buat akun di aplikasi, cari teman, tantang mereka, dan minum lebih banyak air!
t.it: Crea un account in-app, trova i tuoi amici, sfidali e bevi più acqua!
t.ja: アプリ内アカウントを作成し、友だちを見つけ、一緒にチャレンジして、もっと水を飲みましょう！
t.ko: 계정을 만들어 친구를 찾고, 함께 경쟁하며 물을 더 많이 마셔 보세요!
t.ms: Buat akaun dalam aplikasi, cari rakan, cabar mereka dan minum lebih banyak air!
t.nb: Opprett en konto i appen, finn vennene dine, utfordre dem og drikk mer vann!
t.nl: Maak een account aan, vind je vrienden, daag ze uit en drink meer water!
t.pl: Utwórz konto w aplikacji, znajdź znajomych, rzuć im wyzwanie, żeby pili więcej wody!
t.pt_BR: Crie uma conta no app, encontre seus amigos, desafie-os e beba mais água!
t.ru: Создай аккаунт в приложении, найди друзей, соревнуйся с ними и пей больше воды!
t.sv: Skapa ett konto i appen, hitta dina vänner, utmana dem och drick mer vatten!
t.tr: Uygulamada bir hesap oluştur, arkadaşlarını bul, onlarla yarış ve daha fazla su iç!
t.vi: Tạo tài khoản trong ứng dụng, tìm bạn bè, thách đấu với họ và uống nhiều nước hơn!
t.zh_CN: 创建应用内的账户、寻找你的好友、向他们发起挑战并喝更多的水！

en: You haven't added anyone yet. Find and add your first friend
context:
Surface: Friends list screen — empty state subtitle shown when the signed-in user has no friends yet.
Type: empty state body
Context: Tells the user the friends list is empty and invites them to find their first friend. Paired with "Invite friends" (primary CTA) and "Find friends" (secondary CTA).
Tone: gentle, action-prompting.

t.id: Kamu belum menambahkan siapa pun. Cari dan tambahkan teman pertamamu
t.it: Non hai ancora aggiunto nessuno. Trova e aggiungi il tuo primo amico

t.ko: 아직 아무도 추가하지 않았어요. 친구를 찾아 추가해 보세요.
t.ms: Awak belum tambah sesiapa lagi. Cari dan tambah rakan pertama awak
t.nb: Du har ikke lagt til noen ennå. Finn og legg til din første venn
t.nl: Je hebt nog niemand toegevoegd. Zoek en voeg je eerste vriend toe
t.pl: Nie masz jeszcze żadnych znajomych. Znajdź i dodaj swojego pierwszego znajomego

t.sv: Du har inte lagt till någon än. Hitta och lägg till din första vän

t.vi: Bạn chưa thêm bất kỳ ai. Hãy tìm và thêm người bạn đầu tiên của mình.
t.zh_CN: 你还没有添加任何人。查找并添加你的第一个好友

en: Unfortunately, we couldn’t find them, but you can invite them to try the app 😊
context:
Surface: Find friends screen — alert title shown when a search by login/email finds no matching user.
Type: alert title
Context: Tells the user that the searched account was not found, then softens the result with a suggestion to invite that person to the app. Paired with the "Invite" action button (key "invite") and a "Close" cancel button. The ":)" smiley is intentional friendly tone — keep an equivalent friendly closer in target language if natural, otherwise drop it.
Tone: gentle, apologetic but encouraging.

t.ar: للأسف، لم نعثر على هذا المستخدم، ولكن يمكنك دعوته لتجربة التطبيق 😊
t.da: Desværre kunne vi ikke finde denne bruger, men du kan invitere dem til at prøve appen 😊
t.de: Leider konnten wir diesen Benutzer nicht finden, aber du kannst ihn in diese App einladen 😊
t.en: Unfortunately, we couldn’t find them, but you can invite them to try the app 😊
t.es: Desafortunadamente no hemos podido encontrar a este usuario, pero puedes invitarle a unirse a la aplicación 😊
t.fr: Malheureusement, nous n'avons pas trouvé cet utilisateur, mais tu peux l'inviter à essayer l'application 😊
t.hi: दुर्भाग्य से, हम इस यूज़र को नहीं ढूँढ पाए, पर तुम उन्हें इस ऐप में बुला सकते हो 😊
t.id: Sayangnya, kami tidak menemukan pengguna ini, tetapi kamu dapat mengundang dia ke aplikasi 😊
t.it: Purtroppo non abbiamo potuto trovare questo utente ma puoi invitarlo in questa app 😊
t.ja: 残念ながら、このユーザーは見つかりませんでしたが、このアプリに招待できます 😊
t.ko: 안타깝게도 사용자를 찾을 수 없었어요. 대신 이 앱으로 친구를 초대해 보세요 😊
t.ms: Malangnya, kami tidak menemui pengguna ini, tetapi awak boleh mengundangnya ke aplikasi ini 😊
t.nb: Beklager, vi kunne ikke finne denne brukeren, men du kan invitere dem til denne appen 😊
t.nl: We konden deze gebruiker helaas niet vinden, maar je kunt deze persoon uitnodigen om de app te proberen 😊
t.pl: Niestety nie udało nam się znaleźć tego użytkownika, ale możesz go zaprosić do korzystania z aplikacji 😊
t.pt_BR: Não conseguimos encontrar esse usuário, mas você pode convidar essa pessoa para o app 😊
t.ru: К сожалению, мы не нашли этого пользователя, но ты можешь пригласить его в приложение 😊
t.sv: Tyvärr kunde vi inte hitta den här användaren, men du kan bjuda in hen till den här appen 😊
t.tr: Üzgünüz, bu kullanıcıyı bulamadık ama onu uygulamaya davet edebilirsin 😊
t.vi: Rất tiếc, chúng tôi không thể tìm thấy người dùng này nhưng bạn có thể mời họ tham gia vào ứng dụng này 😊
t.zh_CN: 我们没找到该用户，不过你可以邀请他使用我们的应用 😊

en: Add this person as a friend to see their profile and statistics.
context:

Context: Explains why the profile and statistics are hidden until the user adds this person as a friend. Paired with "Add friend" button (key addFriendButton). Note: the key name contains a typo ("youShuld" instead of "youShould") — legacy identifier, do not rename.

t.es: Añade a este usuario como amigo para ver su perfil y estadísticas.
t.fr: Ajoute cet utilisateur en ami pour voir son profil et ses statistiques
t.hi: इस यूज़र की प्रोफ़ाइल और आँकड़े देखने के लिए उसे दोस्त बना लो।
t.id: Tambahkan pengguna ini sebagai teman untuk melihat profil dan statistiknya
t.it: Aggiungi questo utente agli amici per vedere il suo profilo e le sue statistiche.
t.ja: このユーザーを友だちに追加すると、プロフィールと統計を見られます。
t.ko: 이 사용자의 프로필과 통계를 보려면 친구로 추가해 주세요.
t.ms: Tambah pengguna sebagai rakan untuk melihat statistik dan profilnya
t.nb: Legg til denne personen som venn for å se profilen og statistikken.
t.nl: Voeg deze gebruiker toe aan je vrienden om hun profiel en statistieken te bekijken.
t.pl: Dodaj tego użytkownika do znajomych, aby zobaczyć jego profil i statystyki
t.pt_BR: Adicione este usuário aos amigos para ver o perfil e estatísticas dele.
t.ru: Добавь пользователя в друзья, чтобы видеть его статистику и профиль
t.sv: Lägg till den här användaren som vän för att se användarens profil och statistik.
t.tr: İstatistiklerini ve profilini görmek için kullanıcıyı arkadaş olarak ekle
t.vi: Thêm người dùng này vào bạn bè để xem hồ sơ và số liệu thống kê của họ.
t.zh_CN: 将此用户添加为好友可查看资料和统计数据。

context:
Surface: Find friends screen — primary action button label in the "user not found" / "no friends from social network registered" confirmation alerts (paired with "nobodyFound" or "nobodyFoundSocial" title and a "Close" cancel button).
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb. Tapping opens the share sheet so the user can invite the searched person / their social network friends to the app.
Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars). No trailing period.

Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for coconut water in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label. Note: the key name contains a typo ("cocnutWater" instead of "coconutWater") — legacy identifier, do not rename; the user-facing value is correct.
