Context: Display name for kombucha — fermented tea beverage — in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label. Note: the key name uses the spelling "combucha" — legacy identifier, do not rename; the user-facing value uses the standard English spelling "Kombucha".

Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title; also used as a label in promo card examples.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for hot chocolate beverage in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label.

Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for lemonade in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label. Note: the key name contains a typo ("limonade" instead of "lemonade") — legacy identifier, do not rename; the user-facing value is correct.

Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for non-alcoholic beer in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label.

t.ja: ノンアルコールビール

en: We need access to your photos so you can choose a profile picture.
context:
Surface: System iOS permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests access to the Photo Library (Info.plist `NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription`).
Type: permission prompt
Context: Justifies why the app needs Photo Library access — to let the user pick a photo as their profile avatar. Shown by iOS in the standard authorization sheet on first request; user can grant or deny.
Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
Register: casual T-form — a routine permission prompt is brand-voice «ты» (reserved/reasoned tone) across all T-V / honorific languages; it is NOT a legally-binding consent contract (§ Brand voice § Юридический carve-out). Legacy «вы» here is grandfathered, not a must-fix.
Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: نحتاج إلى إذن للوصول إلى صورك لاختيار صورتك الشخصية.
t.da: Vi har brug for adgang til dine fotos, så du kan vælge et profilbillede.
t.de: Wir brauchen Zugriff auf deine Fotos, damit du ein Profilbild auswählen kannst.
t.en: We need access to your photos so you can choose a profile picture.
t.es: Danos permiso para acceder a tus fotos para configurar tu avatar
t.fr: Autorise-nous à accéder à tes photos pour définir ton avatar
t.hi: अवतार सेट करने के लिए हमें अपनी तस्वीरों का एक्सेस दो
t.id: Tolong beri kami izin untuk mengakses fotomu untuk mengatur avatarmu
t.it: Ci serve l'accesso alle foto per scegliere l'immagine del profilo
t.ja: プロフィール写真を選ぶために、写真へのアクセスを許可してください。
t.ko: 프로필 사진을 선택하려면 사진 접근 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Sila benarkan kami mengakses foto awak untuk menetapkan avatar awak
t.nb: Gi oss tillatelse til å få tilgang til bildene dine for å velge profilbildet ditt
t.nl: We hebben toegang tot je foto's nodig zodat je een profielfoto kunt kiezen.
t.pl: Potrzebujemy dostępu do twoich zdjęć, aby ustawić twój awatar
t.pt_BR: Precisamos acessar suas fotos para você escolher uma foto de perfil.
t.ru: Разреши доступ к фотографиям, чтобы выбрать аватар.
t.sv: Vi behöver åtkomst till dina foton så att du kan välja en profilbild.
t.tr: Profil fotoğrafını ayarlayabilmen için fotoğraflarına erişmemiz gerekiyor.
t.vi: Vui lòng cho phép chúng tôi truy cập vào ảnh của bạn để đặt ảnh đại diện của bạn
t.zh_CN: 我们需要访问你的照片，以便你选择个人头像。

en: We need access to your camera so you can take a profile picture.
context:
Surface: System iOS permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests access to the Camera (Info.plist `NSCameraUsageDescription`).
Type: permission prompt
Context: Justifies why the app needs Camera access — to let the user take a photo for their profile avatar. Shown by iOS in the standard authorization sheet on first request; user can grant or deny.
Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
Register: casual T-form — a routine permission prompt is brand-voice «ты» (reserved/reasoned tone) across all T-V / honorific languages; it is NOT a legally-binding consent contract (§ Brand voice § Юридический carve-out). Legacy «вы» here is grandfathered, not a must-fix.
Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: نحتاج إلى إذن للوصول إلى الكاميرا لالتقاط صورتك الشخصية.
t.da: Vi har brug for adgang til dit kamera, så du kan tage et profilbillede.
t.de: Wir brauchen Zugriff auf deine Kamera, damit du ein Profilbild aufnehmen kannst.
t.en: We need access to your camera so you can take a profile picture.
t.es: Danos permiso para acceder a tu cámara para tomar una foto al avatar
t.fr: Autorise-nous à accéder à ton appareil photo pour prendre une photo de profil
t.hi: प्रोफ़ाइल फ़ोटो लेने के लिए हमें अपने कैमरे का एक्सेस दो
t.id: Tolong beri kami izin untuk mengakses kameramu untuk mengambil foto avatar
t.it: Ci serve l'accesso alla fotocamera per scattare una foto del profilo
t.ja: プロフィール写真を撮影するために、カメラへのアクセスを許可してください。
t.ko: 프로필 사진을 촬영하려면 카메라 접근 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Sila benarkan kami mengakses kamera awak untuk mengambil foto avatar
t.nb: Gi oss tillatelse til å få tilgang til kameraet ditt for å ta et profilbilde
t.nl: We hebben toegang tot je camera nodig zodat je een profielfoto kunt maken.
t.pl: Potrzebujemy dostępu do aparatu, aby zrobić zdjęcie do twojego awatara
t.pt_BR: Precisamos acessar sua câmera para você tirar uma foto de perfil.
t.ru: Разреши доступ к камере, чтобы сделать фото для аватара.
t.sv: Vi behöver åtkomst till din kamera så att du kan ta en profilbild.
t.tr: Profil fotoğrafı çekebilmen için kamerana erişmemiz gerekiyor.
t.vi: Vui lòng cho phép chúng tôi truy cập vào máy ảnh của bạn để chụp ảnh đại diện cho bạn
t.zh_CN: 我们需要访问你的相机，以便你拍摄个人头像照片。

en: We need read access to Apple Health water, weight, and profile data so we can import your hydration history and calculate your daily goal.
context:
Surface: System HealthKit permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests read access to Apple Health data.
Type: permission prompt
Context: Justifies why the app reads Apple Health data (water intake, weight, body/profile parameters) — to import hydration history and compute the user's recommended daily water goal. Shown by iOS in the standard HealthKit authorization sheet; user can grant or deny.
Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
Register: casual T-form — a routine permission prompt is brand-voice «ты» (reserved/reasoned tone) across all T-V / honorific languages; it is NOT a legally-binding consent contract (§ Brand voice § Юридический carve-out). Legacy «вы» here is grandfathered, not a must-fix.
Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: نحتاج إلى إذن قراءة بيانات الماء والوزن والملف الشخصي من Apple Health لاستيراد سجل الترطيب الخاص بك وحساب هدفك اليومي.
t.da: Vi har brug for læseadgang til vand-, vægt- og profildata i Apple Health for at importere din hydreringshistorik og beregne dit daglige mål.
t.de: Wir brauchen Lesezugriff auf Wasser-, Gewichts- und Profildaten in Apple Health, damit wir deinen Trinkverlauf importieren und dein Tagesziel berechnen können.
t.en: We need read access to Apple Health water, weight, and profile data so we can import your hydration history and calculate your daily goal.
t.es: Necesitamos acceso de lectura a los datos de agua, peso y perfil de Apple Health para importar tu historial y calcular tu meta diaria.
t.fr: Nous avons besoin d'un accès en lecture aux données d'eau, de poids et de profil d'Apple Health pour importer ton historique et calculer ton objectif quotidien.
t.hi: तुम्हारा इतिहास आयात करने और दैनिक लक्ष्य की गणना करने के लिए हमें Apple Health के पानी, वज़न और प्रोफ़ाइल डेटा का रीड एक्सेस चाहिए।
t.id: Kami memerlukan akses baca ke data air, berat, dan profil di Apple Health untuk mengimpor riwayat dan menghitung target harianmu.
t.it: Ci serve l'accesso in lettura ai dati di acqua, peso e profilo di Apple Health per importare la cronologia e calcolare il tuo obiettivo giornaliero.
t.ja: 履歴のインポートと1日の目標の計算のため、Apple Health の水分・体重・プロフィールデータへの読み取りアクセスが必要です。
t.ko: 기록을 가져오고 일일 목표를 계산하기 위해 Apple Health의 물, 체중, 프로필 데이터에 대한 읽기 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Kami memerlukan akses baca kepada data air, berat dan profil dalam Apple Health untuk mengimport sejarah dan mengira matlamat harian awak.
t.nb: Vi trenger lesetilgang til vann-, vekt- og profildata i Apple Health for å importere historikken din og beregne det daglige målet.
t.nl: We hebben leestoegang tot water-, gewichts- en profielgegevens in Apple Health nodig om je geschiedenis te importeren en je dagdoel te berekenen.
t.pl: Potrzebujemy dostępu do odczytu danych o wodzie, wadze i profilu w Apple Health, aby zaimportować historię i obliczyć twój dzienny cel.
t.pt_BR: Precisamos de acesso de leitura aos dados de água, peso e perfil do Apple Health para importar seu histórico e calcular sua meta diária.
t.ru: Нам нужен доступ на чтение данных Apple Health о воде, весе и профиле, чтобы импортировать твою историю и рассчитать дневную цель.
t.sv: Vi behöver läsåtkomst till vatten-, vikt- och profildata i Apple Health för att importera din historik och beräkna ditt dagliga mål.
t.tr: Hidrasyon geçmişini içe aktarmak ve günlük hedefini hesaplamak için Apple Health'deki su, kilo ve profil verilerini okuyabilmemiz gerekiyor.
t.vi: Chúng tôi cần quyền đọc dữ liệu nước, cân nặng và hồ sơ trong Apple Health để nhập lịch sử và tính mục tiêu hằng ngày của bạn.
t.zh_CN: 我们需要读取 Apple Health 中的水分、体重和个人资料数据，以导入你的历史记录并计算每日目标。

en: We need permission to save water, caffeine, weight, and alcohol-related entries you log in My Water to Apple Health.
context:
Surface: System HealthKit permission prompt — purpose string shown when the app requests write access to Apple Health (Info.plist `NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription`).
Type: permission prompt
Context: Justifies why the app writes to Apple Health — to save water, caffeine, weight, and alcohol-related entries logged in My Water into the system Health database. Shown by iOS in the standard HealthKit authorization sheet; user can grant or deny.
Constraints: Apple guideline — describe purpose specifically and concisely; first-person plural ("we") matches app voice.
Register: casual T-form — a routine permission prompt is brand-voice «ты» (reserved/reasoned tone) across all T-V / honorific languages; it is NOT a legally-binding consent contract (§ Brand voice § Юридический carve-out). Legacy «вы» here is grandfathered, not a must-fix.
Tone: reasoned and direct.

t.ar: نحتاج إلى إذن لحفظ بيانات الماء والكافيين والوزن والكحول التي تسجّلها في My Water إلى Apple Health.
t.da: Vi har brug for tilladelse til at gemme vand-, koffein-, vægt- og alkoholregistreringer, du registrerer i Mit vand, i Apple Health.
t.de: Wir brauchen die Berechtigung, Wasser-, Koffein-, Gewichts- und Alkoholeinträge, die du in My Water erfasst, in Apple Health zu speichern.
t.en: We need permission to save water, caffeine, weight, and alcohol-related entries you log in My Water to Apple Health.
t.es: Necesitamos permiso para guardar en Apple Health los registros de agua, cafeína, peso y alcohol que anotas en My Water.
t.fr: Nous avons besoin de l'autorisation d'enregistrer dans Apple Health les entrées d'eau, de caféine, de poids et d'alcool que tu notes dans My Water.
t.hi: My Water में तुम्हारे दर्ज किए गए पानी, कैफ़ीन, वज़न और शराब से जुड़े रिकॉर्ड Apple Health में सहेजने की अनुमति हमें चाहिए।
t.id: Kami memerlukan izin untuk menyimpan catatan air, kafein, berat, dan alkohol yang kamu catat di My Water ke Apple Health.
t.it: Ci serve l'autorizzazione per salvare in Apple Health le voci relative ad acqua, caffeina, peso e alcol che registri in My Water.
t.ja: My Water で記録した水分・カフェイン・体重・アルコールのデータを Apple Health に保存する許可が必要です。
t.ko: My Water에 기록한 물, 카페인, 체중, 알코올 항목을 Apple Health에 저장하기 위한 권한이 필요합니다.
t.ms: Kami memerlukan kebenaran untuk menyimpan rekod air, kafein, berat dan alkohol yang awak rekodkan dalam My Water ke Apple Health.
t.nb: Vi trenger tillatelse til å lagre vann-, koffein-, vekt- og alkoholoppføringene du registrerer i Mitt Vann, i Apple Health.
t.nl: We hebben toestemming nodig om de water-, cafeïne-, gewichts- en alcoholgegevens die je in My Water vastlegt op te slaan in Apple Health.
t.pl: Potrzebujemy zezwolenia na zapisywanie w Apple Health wpisów dotyczących wody, kofeiny, wagi i alkoholu, które rejestrujesz w My Water.
t.pt_BR: Precisamos de permissão para salvar no Apple Health os registros de água, cafeína, peso e álcool que você registra no My Water.
t.ru: Нам нужно разрешение, чтобы сохранять записи о воде, кофеине, весе и алкоголе из «Моя вода» в Apple Health.
t.sv: Vi behöver behörighet att spara vatten-, koffein-, vikt- och alkoholposter som du registrerar i My Water i Apple Health.
t.tr: My Water'da kaydettiğin su, kafein, kilo ve alkol verilerini Apple Health'e kaydetmek için iznine ihtiyacımız var.
t.vi: Chúng tôi cần quyền lưu các mục về nước, caffeine, cân nặng và rượu bia mà bạn ghi trong My Water vào Apple Health.
t.zh_CN: 我们需要权限，以将你在 My Water 中记录的水分、咖啡因、体重和酒精相关数据保存到 Apple Health。

en: Please enable notifications for our app in your phone settings.
context:
Surface: In-app message shown when notifications are disabled at the iOS level — asks the user to re-enable notifications via phone Settings (legacy key; no active call sites in current Swift code, but kept for non-en locales and potential reactivation).
Type: error message
Context: Tells the user that local / push notifications need to be enabled in iOS Settings for the app to deliver reminders. Not the system permission prompt itself — this is the app's own copy shown after the system-level toggle has been turned off.
Tone: polite, action-oriented ("Please enable ... in your phone settings.").

t.ar: يرجى تفعيل الإشعارات لهذا التطبيق من إعدادات هاتفك.
t.da: Aktivér venligst notifikationer for vores app i dine telefonindstillinger.
t.de: Bitte aktiviere in deinen Telefoneinstellungen die Benachrichtigungen für unsere App.
t.en: Please enable notifications for our app in your phone settings.
t.es: Activa las notificaciones de nuestra app en los ajustes de tu teléfono.
t.fr: Veuillez autoriser l'accès pour l'envoi de notifications dans les paramètres de votre téléphone.
t.hi: अपने फ़ोन की सेटिंग में हमारी ऐप के नोटिफिकेशन चालू करो।
t.id: Harap izinkan pengiriman pemberitahuan untuk aplikasi kami di pengaturan sistem telepon.
t.it: Attiva le notifiche per la nostra app nelle impostazioni del telefono.
t.ja: スマートフォンの設定で、通知を許可してください。
t.ms: Sila benarkan pemberitahuan untuk aplikasi kami dalam tetapan telefon anda.
t.nb: Aktiver varsler for appen vår i telefoninnstillingene.
t.nl: Zet meldingen voor onze app aan in de instellingen van je telefoon.
t.pl: Zezwól na dostęp do wysyłania powiadomień poprzez zmianę ustawień telefonu.
t.pt_BR: Por favor, permita o acesso para enviar notificações nas configurações do seu telefone.
t.ru: Разреши уведомления для нашего приложения в системных настройках телефона.
t.sv: Aktivera aviseringar för vår app i dina telefoninställningar.
t.tr: Lütfen telefonun sistem ayarlarında uygulamamız için bildirim gönderme özelliğini etkinleştirin.
t.vi: Vui lòng bật thông báo cho ứng dụng của chúng tôi trong cài đặt điện thoại của bạn.
t.zh_CN: 请在手机设置中允许发送通知。

en: you can find friends through social networks
context:
Surface: Find friends screen — description label beneath the "or" separator, above the social network sign-in buttons (VK, Facebook).
Type: paragraph (hint)
Context: Tells the user that, as an alternative to searching by login/email, they can find friends by connecting their social network accounts. Sentence-case (lowercase first letter) is intentional in source — a continuation of the visual flow under the "or" divider.

t.ar: يمكنك البحث عن أصدقائك من خلال شبكات التواصل
t.da: du kan finde venner via sociale netværk
t.de: du kannst Freunde über soziale Netzwerke finden
t.en: you can find friends through social networks
t.es: puedes encontrar amigos a través de las redes sociales
t.fr: tu peux aussi trouver des amis via les réseaux sociaux
t.hi: तुम सोशल नेटवर्क से अपने दोस्तों को खोज सकते हो
t.id: kamu bisa menemukan teman lewat media sosial
t.it: puoi trovare amici tramite i social network
t.ja: SNSで友だちを見つけることもできます。
t.ko: 소셜 네트워크에서도 친구를 찾을 수 있어요
t.ms: awak boleh mencari rakan melalui media sosial
t.nb: du kan finne venner via sosiale nettverk
t.nl: je kunt vrienden vinden via je sociale netwerken
t.pl: możesz też znaleźć znajomych przez sieci społecznościowe
t.pt_BR: você pode encontrar amigos nas redes sociais
t.ru: ты можешь найти друзей через социальные сети
t.sv: så kan du hitta vänner via sociala nätverk
t.vi: bạn có thể tìm bạn bè qua mạng xã hội
t.zh_CN: 你可以通过社交网络找到好友

en: Unfortunately, none of your friends use our app yet. Would you like to invite them?
context:
Surface: Find friends screen — alert title shown after the user connected a social network (VK / Facebook) and no friends from that network are registered in the app yet. Variant of "nobodyFound" for the social-network search path.
Type: alert title
Context: Tells the user no social-network friend has the app yet, then asks whether they'd like to invite them. Paired with the "Invite" action button (key "invite") and a "Close" cancel button.
Tone: gentle, apologetic but encouraging.

t.ar: للأسف، لا يوجد أيٌّ من أصدقائك مسجّلاً في التطبيق بعد. هل ترغب في دعوتهم؟
t.da: Desværre er ingen af dine venner endnu registreret i vores app. Vil du invitere dem?
t.de: Leider ist noch keiner deiner Freunde bei unserer App registriert. Möchtest du deine Freunde einladen?
t.en: Unfortunately, none of your friends use our app yet. Would you like to invite them?
t.es: Lamentablemente, ninguno de tus amigos está registrado en nuestra aplicación. ¿Quieres invitar a tus amigos?
t.fr: Malheureusement, aucun de tes amis n'utilise encore notre application. Veux-tu les inviter?
t.hi: दुर्भाग्य से, तुम्हारा कोई भी दोस्त अभी तक हमारे ऐप पर रजिस्टर्ड नहीं है। क्या तुम अपने दोस्तों को बुलाना चाहोगे?
t.id: Sayangnya, belum ada temanmu yang terdaftar di aplikasi kami. Mau mengundang teman-temanmu?
t.it: Purtroppo nessuno dei tuoi amici si è ancora registrato alla nostra app. Vuoi invitare i tuoi amici?
t.ja: まだこのアプリに登録している友だちはいません。友だちを招待しませんか？
t.ko: 안타깝게도 아직 My Water를 쓰는 친구가 없어요. 친구를 초대해 볼까요?
t.ms: Malangnya, tiada rakan awak yang menggunakan aplikasi kami lagi. Mahu jemput mereka?
t.nb: Dessverre er ingen av vennene dine registrert i appen vår ennå. Vil du invitere vennene dine?
t.nl: Helaas is nog geen enkele vriend van je geregistreerd bij onze app. Wil je je vrienden uitnodigen?
t.pl: Niestety, nikt z twoich znajomych jeszcze nie korzysta z naszej aplikacji. Chcesz kogoś zaprosić?
t.pt_BR: Nenhum dos seus amigos usa nosso app ainda. Quer convidá-los?
t.ru: К сожалению, никто из твоих друзей пока не зарегистрирован в нашем приложении. Хочешь их пригласить?
t.sv: Tyvärr är ingen av dina vänner registrerad i vår app än. Vill du bjuda in dina vänner?
t.tr: Üzgünüz, hiçbir arkadaşın henüz uygulamamıza kaydolmadı. Arkadaşlarını davet etmek ister misin?
t.vi: Rất tiếc, chưa có người bạn nào của bạn đăng ký trong ứng dụng của chúng tôi. Bạn có muốn mời bạn bè của mình không?
t.zh_CN: 很遗憾，你的好友还没有在我们的应用注册。想邀请他们吗？

context:
Surface: app-wide. Used on onboarding norm screen, weight tracking screen (current/initial goal cards), statistics charts (weight goal line label), accessibility labels for edit-goal buttons.
Type: section label / chart label / accessibility label
Context: Noun. The user's target value (daily water intake or weight goal). Often appears as a prefix with a colon, e.g. "Goal: 2000 ml" or "Goal: 70 kg".
Constraints: Keep short (≤8 chars on narrow screens / charts).

Surface: Beverage catalog / drink coefficients screen — beverage row title.
Type: beverage name
Context: Display name for herbal tea in the standard beverage catalog. Capitalized as a label. Lowercase inline variant lives in key "herbalTea2".

Surface: Main screen caffeine summary row, statistics screens (daily / per-beverage), beverage editor "Caffeine" parameter label, Spotlight quick-nav, App Style screen, accessibility labels.
Type: section label / parameter label / accessibility label
Context: Noun. Refers to the caffeine content / consumption tracker — for example, displayed next to today's logged caffeine amount or as the "Caffeine (mg)" parameter on a beverage. Not a beverage name. Capitalized as a label.
Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens / chart legends).

Surface: Main screen alcohol summary row, statistics screens (daily / per-beverage), beverage editor "Alcohol %" parameter label, Spotlight quick-nav.
Type: section label / parameter label / accessibility label
Context: Noun. Refers to the alcohol content / consumption category — for example, displayed next to today's logged alcohol amount or as the "Alcohol %" parameter on a beverage. Capitalized as a label.
Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars on narrow screens).

Surface: Settings screen — "Integrations" row label; Integrations settings screen navigation title.
Type: navigation title / settings row label
Context: Noun (plural). Refers to connections with other apps and platforms (Apple Health, Fitbit, Samsung Health) where the user can enable data sync between MyWater and the external app. Translate as the standard "integrations" term used in settings UI.
Constraints: Keep reasonably short (fits in a navigation bar and a settings row).

Surface: Friends comparison statistics — used as the current user's display name (in place of their login/name) in the friends statistics list and per-day breakdown to mark "this is me" rows.
Type: row label
Context: First-person singular pronoun referring to the signed-in user. Title-cased as a label.
Constraints: Keep very short (≤6 chars) to fit alongside friend names in compact stat rows.

Surface: Integration setup screen (Fitbit / Samsung Health / Apple Health) — primary CTA button.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb. Tapping connects the MyWater app to the selected external integration so the apps can sync data. Paired with "Disconnect" on the same screen for the opposite action.
Constraints: Keep short (≤10 chars). No trailing period.

Surface: Integration setup screen (Fitbit / Samsung Health / Apple Health) — primary CTA button when an integration is already connected.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb. Tapping disconnects MyWater from the previously connected external integration and stops data sync. Paired with "Connect" on the same screen for the opposite action.
Constraints: Keep short (primary CTA button; wraps to a second line if long). No trailing period.

en: Connect [%1$s] and our app will automatically retrieve your water data from [%2$s]
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations setup screen (IntegrationSetupViewController) — explanatory paragraph below the integration logo, shown for "read"-style integrations (currently H2OPal hardware).
Type: paragraph
Context: Tells the user what enabling the integration will do — the app will pull water consumption records from the external provider. Both placeholders receive the same provider name (e.g. "H2OPal", "H2OPal") from Swift.
Placeholders:
  [%1$s] — integration provider name (e.g. "H2OPal")
  [%2$s] — same integration provider name repeated (e.g. "H2OPal")

t.ar: قم بتوصيل [%1$s] وسيقوم التطبيق الخاص بنا تلقائيًا باسترداد بيانات الماء الخاصة بك من [%2$s]

t.de: Verbinde [%1$s]. Unsere App ruft deine Trinkdaten automatisch von [%2$s] ab
t.en: Connect [%1$s] and our app will automatically retrieve your water data from [%2$s]
t.es: Conecta [%1$s] y nuestra aplicación recuperará automáticamente los datos de tu consumo de agua de [%2$s]
t.fr: Connecte [%1$s] et notre application récupérera automatiquement tes données d'hydratation depuis [%2$s]

t.id: Sambungkan [%1$s] dan aplikasi kami secara otomatis akan menerima data air yang kamu minum dari [%2$s]
t.it: Collega [%1$s], e la nostra app riceverà automaticamente da [%2$s] i dati sull'acqua bevuta
t.ja: [%1$s] を接続すると、水分摂取データを [%2$s] から自動で取得します。
t.ko: [%1$s] 연결 시 앱이 [%2$s]에서 수분 섭취 데이터를 자동으로 가져와요
t.ms: Sambungkan [%1$s] dan aplikasi kami akan menerima data air yang awak minum daripada [%2$s] secara automatik
t.nb: Koble til [%1$s], og appen vår vil automatisk hente dataene dine om vannforbruk fra [%2$s]
t.nl: Verbind [%1$s] en onze app ontvangt automatisch informatie over je waterconsumptie van [%2$s]
t.pl: Podłącz [%1$s], a nasza aplikacja będzie automatycznie uzyskiwać dane o wypitej wodzie z [%2$s]
t.pt_BR: Conecte [%1$s] e o app vai buscar automaticamente seus dados de consumo de água em [%2$s]
t.ru: Подключи [%1$s], и наше приложение будет автоматически получать данные о выпитой воде из [%2$s]
t.sv: Anslut [%1$s] så hämtar vår app automatiskt dina uppgifter kring vattenförbrukning från [%2$s]
t.tr: [%1$s]'yi bağla, uygulamamız da [%2$s]'den içme suyu verilerini otomatik olarak alsın
t.vi: Kết nối [%1$s] và ứng dụng của chúng tôi sẽ tự động truy xuất dữ liệu nước của bạn từ [%2$s]
t.zh_CN: 连接[%1$s]，我们的应用就会自动从[%2$s]获取你的饮水数据

en: Connect [%1$s] and our app will automatically save your water balance to [%2$s]
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations setup screen (IntegrationSetupViewController) — explanatory paragraph below the integration logo, shown for "write"-style integrations (currently Apple Health, FitBit).
Type: paragraph
Context: Tells the user what enabling the integration will do — the app will push their water balance into the external provider. Both placeholders receive the same provider name (e.g. "Apple Health", "Apple Health") from Swift.
Placeholders:
  [%1$s] — integration provider name (e.g. "Apple Health", "FitBit")
  [%2$s] — same integration provider name repeated

t.ar: قم بتوصيل [%1$s] وسيقوم التطبيق الخاص بنا تلقائيًا بالاحتفاظ بسجل توازن الماء لديك في [%2$s]
t.da: Tilslut [%1$s], så registrerer vores app automatisk din vandbalance i [%2$s]
t.de: Verbinde [%1$s]. Unsere App speichert deine Trinkdaten automatisch in [%2$s]
t.en: Connect [%1$s] and our app will automatically save your water balance to [%2$s]
t.es: Conecta [%1$s] y nuestra aplicación registrará automáticamente tu equilibrio hídrico en [%2$s]
t.fr: Connecte [%1$s] et notre application enregistrera automatiquement ton équilibre hydrique sur [%2$s]
t.hi: [%1$s] कनेक्ट करो और हमारी ऐप अपने आप [%2$s] में तुम्हारे पिए गए पानी की जानकारी रिकॉर्ड कर लेगी
t.id: Sambungkan [%1$s] dan aplikasi kami secara otomatis akan mencatat data keseimbangan air di [%2$s]
t.it: Collega [%1$s], e la nostra app registrerà automaticamente in [%2$s] i dati sul bilancio idrico
t.ja: [%1$s] を接続すると、水分バランスのデータを [%2$s] に自動で記録します。
t.ko: [%1$s] 연결 시 앱이 [%2$s]에 수분 균형을 자동으로 기록해요
t.ms: Sambungkan [%1$s] dan aplikasi kami akan merakam keseimbangan air awak dalam [%2$s] secara automatik
t.nb: Koble til [%1$s], så registrerer appen vår vannbalansen automatisk i [%2$s]
t.nl: Verbind [%1$s] en onze app houdt automatisch gegevens bij over je waterbalans in [%2$s]
t.pl: Podłącz [%1$s], a nasza aplikacja będzie automatycznie zapisywać dane dotyczące bilansu wodnego w [%2$s]
t.pt_BR: Conecte [%1$s] e o app vai salvar automaticamente seus dados de balanço hídrico em [%2$s]
t.ru: Подключи [%1$s], и наше приложение будет автоматически записывать данные о водном балансе в [%2$s]

t.tr: [%1$s]'yi bağla, uygulamamız su dengesi verilerini otomatik olarak [%2$s]'ye yazsın
t.vi: Kết nối [%1$s] và ứng dụng của chúng tôi sẽ tự động lưu cân bằng nước của bạn vào [%2$s]
t.zh_CN: 连接[%1$s]，我们的应用就会自动将你的水分平衡数据记录到[%2$s]

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations — success alert message shown after the user enables an external integration (H2OPal, FitBit).
Type: confirmation message
Context: Confirms that the connection between the app and the named external integration provider is now active.
Placeholders:
  [%s] — integration provider name (e.g. "H2OPal", "FitBit")

t.fr: L'intégration avec [%s] a été activée avec succès.
t.ja: [%s] との連携が完了しました
t.vi: Tích hợp với [%s] được kích hoạt thành công

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → H2OPal setup screen (IntegrationSetupViewController) — button label below the H2OPal logo that opens the external H2OPal product website.
Type: button label
Context: Link / button title for the H2OPal manufacturer's website. "H2OPal" is a product name — keep untranslated. The translatable part is the word "website".
Constraints: Keep short — fits a single-line button below the logo.

Surface: app-wide — caffeine value labels on the main screen, statistics screens, beverage editor, drink parameters.
Type: unit abbreviation
Context: Standard SI abbreviation for "milligram". Used as the unit for caffeine amounts (e.g. "80 mg" of caffeine per cup of coffee).
Constraints: Keep as the locally-conventional short abbreviation (do not expand to "milligrams").

Surface: Settings → Account editing screen — destructive red button title at the bottom of the screen, title of the delete-account confirmation popup, and title of the destructive popup action. Also used as the button's accessibility label.
Type: button label / alert title
Context: Imperative verb phrase for the destructive "delete user account" action. Sentence-case as a screen button; same string is reused as the alert title and the destructive button inside that alert.
Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~20 chars) for the button row.

en: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All your added drinks and saved data will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
context:
Surface: Settings → Account editing screen — body of the confirmation popup shown after the user taps the "Delete account" button.
Type: paragraph (alert message)
Context: Asks the user to confirm permanent deletion of their account and warns that all added drinks and saved data will be lost forever. Paired with the "Delete account" / "Cancel" popup buttons. Wording is intentionally cautious — destructive irreversible action.

t.ar: هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد حذف حسابك مع جميع المشروبات المضافة والبيانات المحفوظة؟ لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.
t.da: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette din konto med alle tilføjede drikkevarer og gemte data? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes.
t.de: Möchtest du dein Konto wirklich löschen? Alle hinzugefügten Getränke und gespeicherten Daten gehen verloren. Diese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
t.en: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All your added drinks and saved data will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
t.es: ¿Seguro que quieres borrar tu cuenta con todas las bebidas añadidas y datos guardados? Esta acción no se puede revertir.
t.fr: Veux-tu vraiment supprimer ton compte, toutes les boissons que tu as ajoutées et tes données sauvegardées ? Cette action est irréversible.
t.hi: क्या तुम अपना अकाउंट डिलीट करना चाहते हो? तुम्हारे जोड़े गए सभी पेय और सेव किया गया डेटा खो जाएगा। यह कार्रवाई वापस नहीं की जा सकती।
t.id: Yakin ingin menghapus akunmu, minuman yang ditambahkan, dan semua data yang disimpan? Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.
t.it: Vuoi davvero eliminare il tuo account con tutte le bevande aggiunte e i dati salvati? Questa azione non può essere annullata.
t.ja: 本当にアカウントを削除しますか？追加した飲み物や保存したデータはすべて失われます。この操作は元に戻せません。
t.ko: 정말 계정을 삭제할까요? 추가한 모든 음료와 저장된 데이터가 사라지고, 이 작업은 되돌릴 수 없어요.
t.ms: Adakah awak benar-benar mahu memadam akaun awak, minuman yang ditambah dan semua data yang disimpan? Tindakan ini tidak boleh dibatalkan.
t.nb: Er du sikker på at du vil slette kontoen din med alle drikker og lagrede data? Denne handlingen kan ikke angres.
t.nl: Weet je zeker dat je je account wilt verwijderen? Al je toegevoegde drankjes en opgeslagen gegevens worden verwijderd. Deze actie kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.
t.pl: Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć swoje konto wraz ze wszystkimi dodanymi napojami i zapisanymi danymi? Tej operacji nie można cofnąć.
t.pt_BR: Tem certeza de que quer apagar sua conta? Todos os seus dados salvos e bebidas adicionadas serão perdidos. Essa ação não pode ser desfeita.
t.ru: Удалить аккаунт со всеми добавленными напитками и сохранёнными данными? Действие нельзя отменить.
t.sv: Är du säker på att du vill radera ditt konto med alla dina drycker och din sparade data? Denna åtgärd kan inte ångras.
t.tr: Hesabını, eklenen içecekleri ve kaydedilen tüm verileri silmek istediğinden emin misin? Bu işlem geri alınamaz.
t.vi: Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa tài khoản với tất cả đồ uống đã thêm và dữ liệu đã lưu của mình không? Hành động này sẽ không thể hoàn tác.
t.zh_CN: 确定要删除你的账户吗？所有添加的饮品和保存的数据都会丢失。此操作无法撤销。

en: Your account and all your saved data have been deleted.
context:
Surface: Settings → Account editing screen — confirmation alert message shown after the user successfully deletes their account.
Type: paragraph (alert message / info popup body)
Context: Final success message confirming that the account and all related stored data (drinks, statistics) have been deleted. Displayed in an info alert presented on top of the onboarding intro screen the app falls back to after deletion.

t.ar: لقد تم حذف حسابك وجميع بياناتك المحفوظة بنجاح.
t.da: Din konto og alle dine gemte data blev slettet.
t.de: Dein Konto und alle deine gespeicherten Daten wurden gelöscht.
t.en: Your account and all your saved data have been deleted.
t.es: Tu cuenta y todos los datos guardados se han borrado con éxito.
t.fr: Ton compte et toutes tes données sauvegardées ont bien été supprimés.
t.hi: तुम्हारा अकाउंट और सारा सेव किया गया डेटा डिलीट हो चुका है।
t.id: Akun dan semua data yang disimpan berhasil dihapus.
t.it: Il tuo account e tutti i dati salvati sono stati eliminati con successo.
t.ja: アカウントと保存されたすべてのデータが削除されました。
t.ms: Akaun awak dan semua data yang disimpan berjaya dipadam.
t.nb: Kontoen din og alle lagrede data er slettet.
t.nl: Je account en al je opgeslagen gegevens zijn verwijderd.
t.pl: Pomyślnie usunięto twoje konto i wszystkie zapisane dane.
t.pt_BR: Sua conta e todos os seus dados salvos foram apagados com sucesso.
t.ru: Аккаунт и все сохранённые данные были успешно удалены.
t.sv: Ditt konto och all din sparade data har raderats.
t.tr: Hesap ve kaydedilen tüm veriler başarıyla silindi.
t.vi: Tài khoản và toàn bộ dữ liệu đã lưu của bạn đã được xóa thành công.
t.zh_CN: 你的账户和所有保存的数据已成功删除。

context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — destructive button title that opens the "reset stats" confirmation alert (DailyNormViewController). Also reused as the alert's title.
Type: button label / alert title
Context: Button / title for the destructive "Reset statistics" action that deletes all the user's logged drinks and resets statistics. Short imperative verb phrase. "Stats" is the casual short form of "statistics" — keep that register.
Constraints: Keep short (settings button / alert title; wraps to a second line if long).

en: Are you sure you want to delete all your added drinks and start over? This action cannot be undone.
context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — body of the confirmation alert before resetting statistics (DailyNormViewController).
Type: error message / confirmation alert body
Context: Confirmation alert body shown before the destructive "Reset stats" action. Warns that all logged drinks will be deleted and the action is irreversible. Mirrors the wording used for the Delete Account confirmation. Note: the key has a historical typo (`Confoformation` instead of `Confirmation`); the typo is preserved across all locales — do not rename the key.
Constraints: One-two sentences; preserve the explicit "cannot be undone" warning.

t.ar: هل أنت متأكد من أنك تريد حذف جميع المشروبات المضافة والبدء من جديد؟ لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء.
t.da: Er du sikker på, at du vil slette alle dine tilføjede drikkevarer og starte forfra? Denne handling kan ikke fortrydes.
t.de: Möchtest du wirklich alle hinzugefügten Getränke löschen und neu beginnen? Dieser Schritt kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
t.en: Are you sure you want to delete all your added drinks and start over? This action cannot be undone.
t.es: ¿Seguro que quieres borrar todas las bebidas añadidas y empezar de nuevo? Esta acción no se puede revertir.
t.fr: Veux-tu vraiment supprimer toutes les boissons que tu as ajoutées et recommencer ? Cette action est irréversible.
t.hi: जोड़े गए सभी पेय हटाकर फिर से शुरुआत करनी है? यह कार्रवाई वापस नहीं की जा सकती।
t.id: Yakin ingin menghapus semua minuman yang ditambahkan dan mulai dari awal lagi? Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.
t.it: Sei sicuro di voler eliminare tutte le bevande aggiunte e ricominciare? Questa azione non può essere annullata.
t.ja: 本当に追加した飲み物をすべて削除して、やり直しますか？この操作は元に戻せません。
t.ko: 추가한 음료를 모두 삭제하고 처음부터 다시 시작할까요? 이 작업은 되돌릴 수 없어요.
t.ms: Adakah awak benar-benar mahu memadam semua minuman yang ditambah dan mula semula? Tindakan ini tidak boleh dibatalkan.
t.nb: Er du sikker på at du vil slette alle drikkene du har lagt til og starte på nytt? Denne handlingen kan ikke angres.
t.nl: Weet je zeker dat je al je toegevoegde drankjes wilt verwijderen en opnieuw wilt beginnen? Deze actie kan niet ongedaan worden gemaakt.
t.pl: Czy na pewno chcesz usunąć wszystkie dodane napoje i zacząć od nowa? Tej operacji nie można cofnąć.
t.pt_BR: Tem certeza de que quer apagar todas as bebidas adicionadas e começar de novo? Essa ação não pode ser desfeita.
t.ru: Удалить все добавленные напитки и начать всё заново? Действие нельзя отменить.
t.sv: Är du säker på att du vill ta bort alla tillagda drycker och börja om? Denna åtgärd kan inte ångras.
t.tr: Eklenen tüm içecekleri silip baştan başlamak istediğinden emin misin? Bu işlem geri alınamaz.
t.vi: Bạn có chắc chắn muốn xóa tất cả đồ uống đã thêm của mình và bắt đầu lại không? Hành động này sẽ không thể hoàn tác.
t.zh_CN: 确认想要删除所有添加的饮料并重新开始吗？该操作无法撤销。

en: Apple Health integration is now active. From now on, every drink you add will also be saved to Apple Health.
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Apple Health — success alert body shown after the user enables the Apple Health integration (AppleHealthService).
Type: confirmation message
Context: Confirms the Apple Health integration is now active and explains that every drink the user adds will from now on be exported to Apple Health. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — keep untranslated.
Constraints: Two sentences; preserve the meaning that future drinks (not historical ones) are exported.

t.ar: لقد تم تمكين تكامل Apple Health بنجاح. من الآن فصاعداً، سيتم تصدير جميع المشروبات الجديدة التي تقوم بإضافتها إلى Apple Health.
t.da: Integration med Apple Health er aktiveret. Fra nu af eksporteres alle nye drikkevarer, som du tilføjer, til Apple Health.
t.de: Die Apple-Health-Integration ist jetzt aktiv. Von nun an wird jedes Getränk, das du hinzufügst, auch in Apple Health gespeichert.
t.en: Apple Health integration is now active. From now on, every drink you add will also be saved to Apple Health.
t.es: La integración con Apple Health se ha habilitado correctamente. A partir de ahora, todas las nuevas bebidas que añadas se exportarán a Apple Health.
t.fr: L'intégration d'Apple Health a été activée avec succès. Désormais, toutes les nouvelles boissons que tu ajoutes seront exportées vers Apple Health.
t.hi: Apple Health इंटेग्रेशन चालू हो चुका है। अब से हर नया पेय Apple Health में भी सेव हो जाएगा।
t.id: Integrasi dengan Apple Health berhasil diaktifkan, semua minuman baru akan diekspor ke Apple Health.
t.it: L'integrazione con Apple Health è stata abilitata con successo. D'ora in avanti, tutte le nuove bevande che aggiungerai verranno esportate su Apple Health.
t.ja: Apple Health との連携が有効になりました。今後追加する飲み物はすべて、Apple Health にも保存されます。
t.ko: Apple Health 통합이 활성화됐어요. 이제부터 추가하는 모든 새 음료가 Apple Health로 내보내져요.
t.ms: Integrasi dengan Apple Health berjaya diaktifkan. Selepas ini, semua minuman baharu yang awak tambah akan dieksport ke Apple Health.
t.nb: Integrasjon med Apple Health har blitt aktivert. Fra nå av vil alle nye drikker du legger til, eksporteres til Apple Health.
t.nl: De integratie met Apple Health is succesvol ingeschakeld. Vanaf nu worden alle nieuwe dranken die je toevoegt geëxporteerd naar Apple Health.
t.pl: Włączenie integracji Apple Health powiodło się. Od teraz wszystkie nowo dodane napoje będą eksportowane do Apple Health.
t.pt_BR: A integração com o Apple Health foi habilitada com sucesso. De agora em diante, todas as novas bebidas que você adicionar serão exportadas para o Apple Health.
t.ru: Интеграция с Apple Health успешно включена. Все новые добавляемые напитки будут экспортироваться в Apple Health.
t.sv: Integration med Apple Health har aktiverats. Från och med nu kommer alla nya drycker som du lägger till att exporteras till Apple Health.
t.tr: Apple Health ile entegrasyon başarıyla etkinleştirildi, yeni eklenen tüm içecekler Apple Health'e aktarılacak.
t.vi: Tích hợp Apple Health đã được kích hoạt thành công. Từ bây giờ, tất cả đồ uống mới mà bạn thêm vào sẽ được xuất sang Apple Health.
t.zh_CN: Apple Health 集成已启用。从现在开始，你添加的所有饮品都会同步保存到 Apple Health。

en: All added drinks have been deleted
context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — success toast / alert message shown after the "Reset stats" action completes (DailyNormViewController).
Type: confirmation message
Context: Confirms to the user that all their logged drinks have been deleted as part of the "Reset stats" flow. Key name reads "stat reset(t)ed" — past tense of "reset". Single short statement.
Constraints: One sentence, ≤ ~60 chars; ends without a period as the existing English source does.

t.ar: تم حذف جميع المشروبات المُضافة بنجاح
t.de: Alle hinzugefügten Getränke wurden erfolgreich gelöscht
t.en: All added drinks have been deleted
t.es: Todas las bebidas añadidas se han eliminado con éxito
t.fr: Toutes les boissons ajoutées ont été supprimées avec succès
t.hi: जोड़े गए सभी पेय डिलीट हो चुके हैं
t.id: Semua minuman yang ditambahkan berhasil dihapus
t.it: Tutte le bevande aggiunte sono state rimosse correttamente
t.ja: 追加された飲み物全ての削除が完了しました
t.ms: Semua minuman yang ditambah telah berjaya dipadam
t.nb: Alle drikkene du har lagt til er fjernet
t.pt_BR: Todas as bebidas adicionadas foram apagadas com sucesso.
t.ru: Все добавленные напитки были успешно удалены
t.sv: Alla tillagda drycker har tagits bort
t.vi: Tất cả đồ uống đã thêm đã được xóa thành công
t.zh_CN: 添加的所有饮品都已成功删除

context:
Surface: Paywall subscription tier card — "BEST" badge / discount label on the recommended subscription option (Subscription / PurchaseOffer cells). Also concatenated into the VoiceOver value of the recommended offer button.
Type: badge label
Context: Superlative adjective. Highlights the recommended subscription plan as the best value among the available offers. Usually rendered uppercased ("BEST"); follow target-language convention for highlight badges.
Constraints: Keep very short (≤6 chars) — must fit a small ribbon / badge on a tier button. No trailing punctuation.

Surface: Paywall — subscription tier button / label on the monthly subscription option.
Type: subscription tier label
Context: Names the monthly subscription plan (recurring every month). Picks the most natural short word for the monthly billing period in the target language.
Constraints: Keep to one short word; fits a narrow tier button.

Surface: Paywall / subscription plan picker — yearly tier duration label (1-year plan, paired with siblings like "monthly" / "weekly" / "threeMonths").
Type: subscription tier label
Context: Names the 12-month / annual subscription option in the plan picker. Use the locale-natural short phrase for "12 months" or "1 year"; keep the number-based form ("12 months") rather than the abstract "Yearly" to match the en source style.
Constraints: Keep short; fits a plan-tier label.

Surface: Subscription / paywall headline for non-intro-offer users — savings prefix before the computed yearly discount text.
Type: headline prefix / badge label
Context: Verb meaning "save money" — concatenated with `discountLabel(percent)` to form a yearly-savings headline. NOT the generic form-save action (see separate "Save" key).
Constraints: Keep short (≤6 chars), no exclamation.

en: Privacy policy and Terms of service
context:
Surface: Paywall — link / button below the subscription options that opens the privacy policy and terms of service. Also used as accessibility label.
Type: button label / link label
Context: Combined link text "Privacy policy and Terms of service". Tapping opens the legal documents required for subscription disclosure. Keep both clauses connected by the natural conjunction in the target language.

t.en: Privacy policy and Terms of service
t.es: Política de privacidad y Términos de uso
t.fr: Politique de confidentialité et conditions d'utilisation
t.it: Informativa sulla privacy e Termini del servizio
t.ja: 個人情報保護方針と利用規約
t.pl: Polityka prywatności i Warunki korzystania z usługi
t.pt_BR: Política de Privacidade e Termos de Serviço
t.vi: Chính sách quyền riêng tư và Điều khoản dịch vụ

en: Your subscription will renew automatically unless auto-renewal is disabled at least 24 hours prior to the end of the current subscription period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period, and the cost of the renewal will be shown. To disable this feature, simply navigate to your iTunes account and turn off auto-renewal. The subscription fee is charged to the iTunes account used when confirming the purchase.
context:
Surface: Paywall — auto-renewal disclosure paragraph shown alongside the subscription options (required iTunes / App Store subscription terms text).
Type: paragraph (subscription terms / legal disclosure)
Context: Mandatory iTunes auto-renewable subscription disclosure: renewal cadence, the 24-hour pre-renewal window for cancellation, where to manage auto-renewal (iTunes account settings), and that the iTunes account is charged. Wording is dictated by App Store guidelines — translate using locale-standard formal legal phrasing for auto-renewable subscriptions; do not soften or shorten the legal points.
Register: formal — legally-binding subscription / disclosure text; impersonal-first, V-form («вы» / Sie / vous / usted / …) only as a direct-address fallback (TRANSLATION_STYLE.md § Brand voice § Юридический carve-out).
Tone: formal, legal/disclosure.

t.ar: سوف يتم تجديد اشتراكك تلقائيًا ما لم يتم تعطيل التجديد التلقائي قبل 24 ساعة على الأقل من نهاية فترة الاشتراك الحالية. وسيتم تحصيل رسوم التجديد من حسابك خلال 24 ساعة قبل نهاية الفترة الحالية، مع تحديد تكلفة التجديد. لتعطيل هذه الميزة، ما عليك سوى الانتقال إلى حساب iTunes وإيقاف التجديد التلقائي. يتم تحصيل رسوم الاشتراك من حساب iTunes المُستخدم عند تأكيد الشراء.
t.da: Dit abonnement fornyes automatisk, medmindre automatisk fornyelse er deaktiveret mindst 24 timer inden afslutningen af den aktuelle abonnementsperiode. Du vil blive opkrævet for fornyelse inden for 24 timer inden udgangen af den nuværende periode. For at deaktivere denne funktion skal du blot navigere til din iTunes-konto og deaktivere automatisk fornyelse. Abonnementsgebyret opkræves på den iTunes-konto, der bruges, når du bekræfter købet.
t.de: Dein Abonnement verlängert sich automatisch, sofern die automatische Verlängerung nicht mindestens 24 Stunden vor Ablauf des aktuellen Abonnementzeitraums deaktiviert wird. Die Verlängerung wird innerhalb von 24 Stunden vor Ablauf des aktuellen Zeitraums über dein Konto abgerechnet; dabei wird der Verlängerungspreis angezeigt. Um diese Funktion zu deaktivieren, öffne einfach dein iTunes-Konto und schalte die automatische Verlängerung aus. Die Abo-Gebühr wird dem iTunes-Konto berechnet, das du beim Bestätigen des Kaufs verwendet hast.
t.en: Your subscription will renew automatically unless auto-renewal is disabled at least 24 hours prior to the end of the current subscription period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period, and the cost of the renewal will be shown. To disable this feature, simply navigate to your iTunes account and turn off auto-renewal. The subscription fee is charged to the iTunes account used when confirming the purchase.
t.es: Tu suscripción se renovará automáticamente salvo si se desactiva la renovación automática al menos 24 horas antes de que acabe el período de suscripción actual. Para deshabilitar esta función, solo tienes que acceder a tu cuenta de iTunes y desactivar la renovación automática. La tarifa de suscripción se carga a la cuenta de iTunes al confirmar la compra.
t.fr: Ton abonnement sera renouvelé automatiquement sauf si le renouvellement automatique est désactivé au moins 24 heures avant la fin de la période d'abonnement en cours. Pour désactiver cette fonctionnalité, accède simplement à ton compte iTunes et désactive le renouvellement automatique. Les frais d'abonnement sont imputés au compte iTunes utilisé lors de la confirmation d'achat.
t.hi: ऑटो-रिन्यूअल मौजूदा सब्स्क्रिप्शन अवधि खत्म होने से कम से कम 24 घंटे पहले बंद नहीं हुआ, तो सब्स्क्रिप्शन अपने आप रिन्यू हो जाएगा। मौजूदा अवधि खत्म होने से 24 घंटे के भीतर रिन्यूअल शुल्क लिया जाएगा और रिन्यूअल की कीमत बताई जाएगी। इसे बंद करने के लिए अपने iTunes अकाउंट में जाकर ऑटो-रिन्यूअल बंद करो। खरीद की पुष्टि करते समय इस्तेमाल किए गए iTunes अकाउंट से सब्स्क्रिप्शन शुल्क लिया जाता है।
t.id: Periode berlangganan akan diperbarui secara otomatis kecuali pembaruan otomatis dinonaktifkan setidaknya 24 jam sebelum akhir periode berlangganan. Akun akan ditagih untuk pembaruan dalam 24 jam sebelum akhir periode saat ini, dan biaya pembaruan akan ditampilkan. Untuk menonaktifkan fitur ini, buka akun iTunes-mu dan nonaktifkan pembaruan otomatis. Pembayaran dilakukan melalui akun iTunes yang digunakan saat mengonfirmasi pembelian.
t.it: L'abbonamento verrà rinnovato automaticamente a meno che il rinnovo automatico non venga disabilitato almeno 24 ore prima della fine del periodo di abbonamento corrente. L'importo del rinnovo verrà addebitato sul tuo account entro 24 ore prima della fine del periodo corrente e ne verrà mostrato il costo. Per disabilitare questa funzione, accedi semplicemente al tuo account iTunes e disattiva il rinnovo automatico. La quota di iscrizione viene addebitata sull'account iTunes utilizzato al momento della conferma dell'acquisto.
t.ja: 現在の定期購読期間終了の24時間以上前に自動更新を無効にしない限り、定期購読は自動的に更新されます。自動更新を無効にするには、iTunesアカウントで自動更新をオフにしてください。購読料は、購入確認時に使用したiTunesアカウントに請求されます。
t.ko: 현재 구독 기간이 끝나기 최소 24시간 전에 자동 갱신을 끄지 않으면 구독이 자동으로 갱신돼요. 자동 갱신은 iTunes 계정에서 끌 수 있어요. 구독료는 구매를 확인할 때 사용한 iTunes 계정으로 청구돼요.
t.ms: Tempoh langganan akan diperbaharui secara automatik kecuali pembaharuan automatik dinyahaktifkan sekurang-kurangnya 24 jam sebelum akhir tempoh langganan. Akaun awak akan dicaj untuk pembaharuan dalam tempoh 24 jam sebelum akhir tempoh semasa, dan kos pembaharuan akan dipaparkan. Untuk mematikannya, pergi ke akaun iTunes awak dan matikan pembaharuan automatik. Pembayaran dibuat melalui akaun iTunes yang digunakan semasa mengesahkan pembelian.
t.nb: Abonnementet ditt fornyes automatisk med mindre automatisk fornyelse er deaktivert minst 24 timer før slutten av den nåværende abonnementsperioden. Kontoen belastes for fornyelse innen 24 timer før slutten av den nåværende perioden og identifiserer kostnaden for fornyelsen. For å deaktivere denne funksjonen, bare naviger til iTunes-kontoen din og slå av automatisk fornyelse. Abonnementsgebyret belastes iTunes-kontoen som ble brukt til å bekrefte kjøpet.
t.nl: Je abonnement wordt automatisch verlengd, tenzij automatische verlenging ten minste 24 uur vóór het einde van de huidige abonnementsperiode is uitgeschakeld. Je account wordt binnen 24 uur vóór het einde van de huidige periode belast voor de verlenging en de verlengingskosten worden getoond. Om deze functie uit te schakelen, navigeer je eenvoudig naar je iTunes-account en schakel je automatisch verlengen uit. De abonnementskosten worden in rekening gebracht op het iTunes-account dat wordt gebruikt bij het bevestigen van de aankoop.
t.pl: Twoja subskrypcja zostanie automatycznie odnowiona, chyba że funkcja automatycznego odnawiania zostanie wyłączona co najmniej 24 godziny przed zakończeniem aktualnego okresu subskrypcji. Opłata za odnowienie zostanie pobrana w ciągu 24 godzin przed zakończeniem bieżącego okresu, a jej wysokość zostanie wskazana. Aby wyłączyć tę funkcję, wystarczy przejść do konta iTunes i wyłączyć funkcję automatycznego odnawiania. Opłata za subskrypcję jest naliczana na koncie iTunes użytym do potwierdzenia zakupu.
t.pt_BR: Sua assinatura será renovada automaticamente, a não ser que a renovação automática seja desabilitada pelo menos 24 horas antes do final do período de assinatura atual. Para cancelar esse recurso, basta acessar sua conta iTunes e desativar a renovação automática. O custo da assinatura é cobrado na conta iTunes utilizada depois da confirmação da compra.
t.ru: Подписка продлевается автоматически, если автопродление не отключено минимум за 24 часа до окончания текущего периода. Оплата за продление списывается в течение 24 часов до окончания периода, сумма будет указана. Автопродление можно отключить в настройках учётной записи iTunes. Оплата подписки списывается с учётной записи iTunes, использованной при подтверждении покупки.
t.sv: Din prenumeration förnyas automatiskt om inte automatisk förnyelse inaktiveras minst 24 timmar före slutet av den nuvarande prenumerationsperioden. Kontot debiteras för förnyelsen inom 24 timmar före slutet av den aktuella perioden. För att inaktivera den här funktionen, navigera helt enkelt till ditt iTunes-konto och stäng av automatisk förnyelse. Prenumerationsavgiften debiteras det iTunes-konto som användes vid bekräftelse av köpet.
t.tr: Mevcut abonelik süresinin bitiminden en az 24 saat önce otomatik yenilemeyi kapatmazsan aboneliğin otomatik olarak yenilenir. Yenileme ücreti, mevcut dönemin bitiminden önceki 24 saat içinde satın almayı onayladığın iTunes hesabından tahsil edilir. Bu özelliği kapatmak için iTunes hesabına gidip otomatik yenilemeyi kapatman yeterli.
t.vi: Việc đăng ký của bạn sẽ tự động gia hạn trừ khi tính năng tự động gia hạn bị tắt ít nhất 24 giờ trước khi kết thúc giai đoạn đăng ký hiện tại. Tài khoản sẽ bị tính phí gia hạn trong vòng 24 giờ trước khi kết thúc giai đoạn hiện tại và chi phí gia hạn sẽ được hiển thị. Để tắt tính năng này, chỉ cần đi đến tài khoản iTunes của bạn và tắt tính năng tự động gia hạn. Phí đăng ký được tính vào tài khoản iTunes mà bạn sử dụng khi xác nhận mua hàng.
t.zh_CN: 除非在当前订阅期结束前至少 24 小时关闭自动续订，否则你的订阅将自动续期。续订费用会在当前订阅期结束前 24 小时内从你的 iTunes 账户扣除，并显示续订费用。若要关闭自动续订，请前往你的 iTunes 账户设置。订阅费用将从确认购买时使用的 iTunes 账户扣除。

en: For extended features such as different beverages, detailed statistics, custom volumes and other useful features, get My Water Premium. Two different plans: 1 month/1$ and 12 months/12$ with discount price. My Water Premium subscription: the purchase will be charged to your iTunes account. The subscription will be auto-renewed 24 hours prior to it running out. Manage your subscription from User Settings in iTunes after purchasing. Cancel the auto-renewing subscription from there at any time. Terms and Privacy Policy: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
context:
Surface: App Store Connect listing — subscription terms / promotional text section.
Type: paragraph (subscription terms)
Context: Promotional + legal subscription disclosure shown on the App Store product page. Lists premium features, the two subscription plans (1-month and 12-month), iTunes billing terms, auto-renewal disclosure, and the Privacy Policy URL. Note: the legacy key has a typo ("Tems" instead of "Terms") — do not rename the key. Prices "1$" and "12$" are placeholders for App Store display, not literal — replace with locale-relevant subscription price strings. Not used in app code — uploaded as ASC metadata.
Constraints: ≤4000 chars in ASC; preserve URL https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/ exactly. Keep brand "My Water Premium" untranslated as a proper noun.
Register: formal — legally-binding subscription / disclosure text; impersonal-first, V-form («вы» / Sie / vous / usted / …) only as a direct-address fallback (TRANSLATION_STYLE.md § Brand voice § Юридический carve-out).
Tone: warm but legally-clear; not aggressive.

t.ar: لاستخدام الميزات الإضافية، كميزة المشروبات المختلفة والإحصائيات التفصيلية والأحجام المُخصَّصة وغير ذلك من الميزات المفيدة، اشترك في خطة My Water Premium. خطتان مختلفتان: سعر مخفض، شهر واحد مقابل دولار واحد، و12 شهراً مقابل 12 دولاراً. خطة اشتراك My Water Premium: سيتم تحميل تكلفة الشراء على حساب iTunes الخاص بك. سيتم تجديد الاشتراك تلقائياً قبل انتهاء مدته بـ 24 ساعة. تحكَّم في اشتراكك من "إعدادات المستخدم" في iTunes بعد الشراء. يمكنك إلغاء التجديد التلقائي للاشتراك من هناك في أي وقت. الشروط وسياسة الخصوصية: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.da: For udvidede funktioner, såsom forskellige drikkevarer, detaljeret statistik, tilpassede mængder og andre nyttige funktioner, skal du få My Water Premium. To forskellige abonnementer: 1 måned/1$ og 12 måneder/12$ med rabatpris. My Water Premium-abonnement: Købet debiteres din iTunes-konto Abonnementet fornyes automatisk 24 timer inden det løber ud Administrer dit abonnement fra brugerindstillingerne i iTunes efter købet. Annuller den automatiske fornyelse af abonnementet derfra når som helst. Vilkår og privatlivspolitik: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.de: Hol dir My Water Premium, um erweiterte Funktionen wie verschiedene Getränke, ausführliche Statistiken, benutzerdefinierte Mengen und weitere nützliche Features zu nutzen. Zwei verschiedene Abo-Pläne: 1 Monat für 1 $ und 12 Monate für 12 $ zum Rabattpreis. My-Water-Premium-Abonnement: Der Kauf wird deinem iTunes-Konto in Rechnung gestellt. Das Abonnement verlängert sich 24 Stunden vor Ablauf automatisch. Verwalte dein Abonnement nach dem Kauf in den iTunes-Benutzereinstellungen. Dort kannst du das sich automatisch verlängernde Abonnement jederzeit kündigen. Geschäftsbedingungen und Datenschutzerklärung: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.en: For extended features such as different beverages, detailed statistics, custom volumes and other useful features, get My Water Premium. Two different plans: 1 month/1$ and 12 months/12$ with discount price. My Water Premium subscription: the purchase will be charged to your iTunes account. The subscription will be auto-renewed 24 hours prior to it running out. Manage your subscription from User Settings in iTunes after purchasing. Cancel the auto-renewing subscription from there at any time. Terms and Privacy Policy: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.es: Para tener más funcionalidades, como bebidas diferentes, estadísticas detalladas, volúmenes a medida y otras funcionalidades útiles, consigue My Water Premium. Dos planes diferentes: 1 mes/1 $ y 12 meses/12 $ con descuento. Suscripción a My Water Premium: La compra se cobrará en tu cuenta de iTunes. La suscripción se renovará automáticamente 24 horas antes de que termine. Gestiona tu suscripción desde los ajustes de usuario de iTunes tras la compra. Cancela la renovación automática desde allí en cualquier momento. Condiciones y política de privacidad: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.fr: Pour obtenir plus de fonctionnalités pratiques, comme, entre autres, différentes boissons, des statistiques détaillées et des volumes personnalisés, obtenez My Water Premium. Deux forfaits différents : 1 mois/1 $ et 12 mois/12 $ avec réduction. Abonnement My Water Premium : L'achat sera débité de votre compte iTunes L'abonnement sera renouvelé automatiquement 24 heures avant son épuisement. Gérez votre abonnement à partir des paramètres utilisateur dans iTunes après l'achat. Annulez à tout moment l'abonnement à renouvellement automatique à partir de là. Conditions générales et politique de confidentialité : https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.hi: अलग-अलग पेय पदार्थ, विस्तृत आँकड़े, कस्टम मात्रा जैसे फीचर्स पाने के लिए आज ही My Water Premium लो। 2 प्लान: 1$/1 महीना और 12$ 12 महीनों के लिए डिस्काउंट के साथ। My Water Premium सब्स्क्रिप्शन: खरीदने पर तुम्हारा iTunes अकाउंट चार्ज किया जाएगा। खत्म होने से 24 घंटे पहले सब्स्क्रिप्शन ऑटो-रिन्यू हो जाएगा। खरीदने के बाद User Settings में जाकर अपना सब्स्क्रिप्शन मैनेज करो और वहीं से ऑटो-रिन्यूअल बंद करो। शर्तें और गोपनीयता पॉलिसी: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.id: Untuk fitur lanjutan seperti berbagai minuman, statistik detail, volume khusus dan fitur-fitur berguna lain, dapatkan My Water Premium. Dua rencana yang berbeda: 1 bulan/1$ dan 12 bulan/12$. My Water Premium: Pembelian akan ditambahkan ke akun iTunes Anda. Langganan otomatis diperbarui 24 jam sebelum kadaluarsa. Kelola langganan Anda pada pengaturan pengguna di iTunes setelah pembelian. Batalkan pembaruan otomatis kapan pun. Ketentuan dan Kebijakan Privasi: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.it: Per funzionalità estese come bevande diverse, statistiche dettagliate, quantità personalizzate ed altre utili funzioni, acquista My Water Premium. Sono disponibili due differenti piani: 1 mese / 1 $ e 12 mesi / 12 $ con prezzo scontato. Abbonamento My Water Premium: l'acquisto verrà addebitato sul tuo account iTunes. L'abbonamento si rinnoverà automaticamente 24 ore prima della scadenza. Dopo l'acquisto potrai gestire il tuo abbonamento dalle impostazioni utente di iTunes. Da lì potrai annullare in qualsiasi momento il rinnovo automatico dell'abbonamento. Termini e politica sulla privacy: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.ja: My Water Premium で、さらに幅広い機能を利用しよう。色々な種類の飲料、詳細な記録データ、自由な量設定ほか便利な機能がいっぱい。 2つの異なるプラン:1か月（1ドル）、12か月（12ドルのところを割引価格に） My Water Premium サブスクリプション: 料金はiTunes のアカウントにご請求いたします。 サブスクリプションは期間終了の24時間前に自動更新されます。 サブスクリプションはご購入後、iTunes の「設定」で管理してください。サブスクリプションの自動更新はそちらから、いつでもキャンセルできます。 利用規約およびプライバシーポリシー: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.ko: 다양한 음료, 상세 통계, 사용자 지정 볼륨, 기타 유용한 기능 등 확장 기능을 원하시면 My Water Premium을 이용하세요. 두 가지 요금제: 할인된 가격으로 1개월/1$ 및 12개월/12$ My Water Premium 구독권: 결제 금액은 iTunes 계정으로 청구됩니다. 만료일 24시간 전에 자동으로 갱신됩니다. 구매 후 iTunes 사용자 설정에서 구독을 관리하세요. 거기에서 언제든 구독 자동 갱신을 취소할 수 있습니다. 이용 약관 및 개인정보 보호정책: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.ms: Untuk fungsi lanjutan seperti pelbagai minuman, statistik terperinci, isi padu tersuai dan fungsi berguna lain, dapatkan My Water Premium. Dua pelan berbeza: 1 bulan/1$ dan 12 bulan/12$ dengan harga diskaun. Langganan My Water Premium: Pembelian akan dicaj ke akaun iTunes anda. Langganan akan diperbaharui secara automatik 24 jam sebelum tamat. Uruskan langganan anda dari Tetapan Pengguna dalam iTunes selepas pembelian. Batalkan langganan auto-pembaharuan dari sana pada bila-bila masa. Terma dan Dasar Privasi: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.nb: Hvis du vil ha flere funksjoner som forskjellige drikker, detaljert statistikk, tilpassede volumer og andre nyttige funksjoner, får du My Water Premium. To forskjellige planer: 1 måned/1$ og 12 måneder/12$ med rabattert pris. My Water Premium-abonnement: Kjøpet belastes iTunes-kontoen din. Abonnementet fornyes automatisk 24 timer før det utløper. Administrer abonnementet ditt i Brukerinnstillinger på iTunes etter kjøp. Avslutt det automatisk fornyede abonnementet der når som helst. Vilkår og personvernerklæring: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.nl: Voor uitgebreide functies zoals verschillende dranken, gedetailleerde statistieken, aangepaste volumes en andere handige functies neemt u My Water Premium. Twee verschillende abonnementen: 1maand/1$ en 12 maanden/12$ met korting. My Water Premium abonnement: De aankoop zal in rekening worden gebracht van uw iTunes account. Het abonnement wordt 24 uur voor afloop automatisch verlengd. Beheer uw abonnement na aankoop in Gebruikersinstellingen in iTunes. U kunt daar het automatisch verlengen op elk gewenst moment annuleren. Algemene voorwaarden en privacybeleid: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.pl: W przypadku rozszerzonych funkcji, takich jak różne napoje, szczegółowe statystyki, niestandardowe wielkości i inne przydatne funkcje, wybierz My Water Premium. Dwa różne plany: 1 miesiąc/1$ i 12 miesięcy/12$ z ceną dyskontową. Subskrypcja My Water Premium: W wyniku zakupu zostanie obciążone twoje konto iTunes Subskrypcja zostanie automatycznie odnowiona na 24 godziny przed jej wygaśnięciem Zarządzaj subskrypcją w Ustawieniach użytkownika w iTunes po zakupie. Tam też, w dowolnym momencie, możesz anulować automatyczne odnawianie subskrypcji. Zasady i polityka prywatności: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.pt_BR: Para acessar mais recursos, como bebidas diferentes, estatísticas detalhadas, volumes personalizados e outras funções úteis, adquira o My Water Premium. Dois planos diferentes: 1 mês/US$ 1 e 12 meses/US$ 12 com desconto. Assinatura do My Water Premium: A compra será cobrada em sua conta do iTunes A assinatura será renovada automaticamente 24 horas antes do prazo terminar Gerencie sua assinatura nas Configurações de usuário no iTunes após a compra. Cancele a assinatura com renovação automática nas configurações a qualquer momento. Termos e Política de privacidade: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.ru: Чтобы получить расширенные функции, такие как разные напитки, подробная статистика, свои объёмы и другие полезные возможности, оформи My Water Premium. Два тарифа: 1 месяц/1$ и 12 месяцев/12$. My Water Premium: покупка будет списана с твоего аккаунта iTunes. Подписка автоматически продлевается за 24 часа до окончания срока. После покупки управляй подпиской в настройках пользователя iTunes. Автопродление можно отменить там в любое время. Условия и политика конфиденциальности: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.sv: För fler funktioner som olika drycker, detaljerad statistik, anpassade volymer och andra användbara funktioner skaffa dig My Water Premium. Två olika planer: 1 månad/1$ och 12 månader/12$ med rabatterat pris. My Water Premium prenumeration: Köpet debiteras ditt iTunes-konto. Prenumerationen förnyas automatiskt 24 timmar innan den tar slut. Hantera din prenumeration i Användarinställningar på iTunes efter köpet. Avbryt den automatiskt förnyade prenumerationen där när som helst. Villkor och sekretesspolicy: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.tr: Çeşitli içecekler, ayrıntılı istatistikler, özel hacimler ve diğer faydalı özellikler gibi gelişmiş özellikler için My Water Premium edinin. İki farklı plan: 1 ay / 1 dolar ve 12 ay / 12 dolar. My Water Premium: Satın alma, iTunes hesabınıza eklenecektir. Abonelik, sona erme tarihinden 24 saat önce otomatik olarak yenilenecektir. Aboneliğinizi satın aldıktan sonra iTunes'daki kullanıcı tercihlerinden yönetin. Aboneliğinizin otomatik olarak yenilenmesini istediğiniz zaman iptal edin. Şartlar ve Gizlilik Politikası: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.vi: Để sử dụng các tính năng mở rộng như đồ uống khác nhau, thống kê chi tiết, thể tích uống tùy chỉnh và các tính năng hữu ích khác, hãy kích hoạt My Water Premium. Hai phương án khác nhau: 1 tháng/1$ và 12 tháng/12$ với giá chiết khấu. Đăng ký My Water Premium: Giao dịch mua sẽ được tính vào tài khoản iTunes của bạn. Việc đăng ký sẽ được tự động gia hạn 24 giờ trước khi hết hạn. Quản lý việc đăng ký của bạn từ Cài đặt Người dùng trong iTunes sau khi mua. Hủy đăng ký tự động gia hạn từ đó bất cứ lúc nào. Điều khoản và Chính sách Bảo mật: https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/
t.zh_CN: 如需使用不同饮品、详细统计、自定义饮水量等扩展功能，请获取 My Water Premium。两种套餐：1 个月/1 美元和 12 个月/12 美元，均为折扣价。My Water Premium 订阅：购买费用将从你的 iTunes 账户扣除。订阅会在到期前 24 小时自动续订。购买后，你可以在 iTunes 的用户设置中管理订阅，并可随时在那里取消自动续订。条款和隐私政策：https://mywaterapp.me/privacypolicy/

context:
Surface: Settings screen — row label that opens a "suggest a feature" flow (user can propose new functionality, e.g. CSV export, new beverage type).
Type: settings row label
Context: Short imperative phrase inviting the user to suggest a new feature for the app.
Constraints: Keep short (fits in a settings row, ≤25 chars).

Surface: Paywall — motivational hero / CTA header (currently no live call-sites in Swift; preserved for legacy / re-introduced paywall layouts).
Type: motivational text / hero header
Context: Short imperative phrase encouraging the user to achieve the daily water goal with premium. Uses "goal" wording (current lexicon, not legacy "norm").
Constraints: Keep short — fits a hero / CTA header.
Register: casual T-form — a paywall hero / CTA is brand-voice marketing «ты» across all T-V / honorific languages (a warm ask, not the legally-binding subscription-terms block — that would be Register: formal; § Brand voice § Юридический carve-out). Legacy «вы» grandfathered.

t.vi: Đạt được mục tiêu của bạn

en: With the full version, you'll drink 42[%] more water and reach your goal. Start your active lifestyle today!
context:
Surface: Paywall — promotional value-proposition paragraph (currently no live call-sites in Swift; preserved for legacy / re-introduced paywall layouts).
Type: paragraph (marketing claim)
Context: Two-sentence promotional claim that premium users achieve their goal more often, framed as "42% more water". Concludes with a CTA inviting the user to step into an active lifestyle. Uses legacy "Full version" wording.
Constraints: The "[%]" token is a LITERAL percent sign ("42%"), not a format argument — keep it as the universal literal "[%]"; do not convert it to a placeholder or a bare "%".
Tone: Promotional but warm — encouraging, not aggressive.

t.ar: يشرب مستخدمو الإصدار الكامل كمية مياه تزيد عمن سواهم بنسبة 42[%] ويحققون أهدافهم. ابدأ نمط حياة نشط الآن!
t.da: Brugere med fuld version drikker 42[%] mere vand og når deres mål. Kom i gang med en aktiv livsstil nu!
t.de: Mit der Vollversion trinkst du 42[%] mehr Wasser und erreichst dein Ziel. Starte heute deinen aktiven Lebensstil!
t.en: With the full version, you'll drink 42[%] more water and reach your goal. Start your active lifestyle today!
t.es: Los usuarios de la versión completa beben un 42[%] más de agua y alcanzan su objetivo. ¡Da el paso hacia un estilo de vida saludable!
t.fr: Les utilisateurs de la version complète boivent 42[%] d'eau en plus et atteignent leur objectif. Adoptez dès maintenant un mode de vie actif!
t.hi: फुल वर्ज़न से 42[%] ज़्यादा पानी पियो और अपना लक्ष्य हासिल करो। आज ही एक्टिव लाइफ़स्टाइल शुरू करो!
t.id: Pengguna versi lengkap minum 42[%] lebih banyak air dan mencapai target mereka. Mulailah gaya hidup aktif sekarang!
t.it: Gli utenti della versione completa bevono il 42[%] di acqua in più e raggiungono il loro obiettivo. Adotta subito uno stile di vita attivo!
t.ja: フルバージョンなら42[%]多くの水を飲んで目標を達成できます。さあ、生き生きとした生活を始めましょう！
t.ko: 풀버전 사용자는 물을 42[%] 더 마시고 목표를 달성했어요. 지금 더 활기찬 하루를 시작해요!
t.ms: Pengguna versi lengkap minum 42[%] lebih banyak air dan mencapai matlamat mereka. Mulakan gaya hidup aktif sekarang!
t.nb: Brukere av fullversjonen drikker 42[%] mer vann og oppnår målet sitt. Start en aktiv livsstil nå!
t.nl: In de volledige versie drinken gebruikers 42[%] meer water en bereiken hun doel. Begin nu aan een actieve levensstijl!
t.pl: Użytkownicy pełnej wersji piją 42[%] więcej wody i osiągają swój cel. Zacznij teraz żyć aktywnie!
t.pt_BR: Os usuários da versão completa bebem 42[%] mais água e atingem sua meta. Entre no estilo de vida ativo agora!
t.ru: Пользователи полной версии пьют на 42[%] больше воды и достигают поставленной цели. Начни активный образ жизни прямо сейчас!
t.sv: Användare av den fullständiga versionen dricker 42[%] mer vatten och uppnår sitt mål. Börja en aktiv livsstil nu!
t.tr: Tam sürümün kullanıcıları [%]42 daha fazla su içer ve hedeflerine ulaşırlar. Hemen şimdi aktif bir yaşam tarzı başlatın!
t.vi: Người dùng phiên bản đầy đủ uống nhiều nước hơn 42[%] và dễ đạt được mục tiêu của họ. Hãy bước vào lối sống năng động ngay bây giờ!
t.zh_CN: 完整版用户多喝 42[%] 的水并达成饮水目标。现在就开始积极的生活方式吧！

en: Remove this drink from your favorites?
context:
Surface: Favorite beverages screen — confirmation alert body when the user taps to remove a beverage from favorites.
Type: error message / confirmation prompt
Context: Asks the user to confirm removing the selected beverage from their favorites list.

t.ar: هل تريد إزالة هذا المشروب من المفضّلة؟
t.da: Vil du fjerne denne drikkevare fra dine favoritter?
t.de: Möchtest du dieses Getränk aus deinen Favoriten entfernen?
t.en: Remove this drink from your favorites?
t.fr: Retirer cette boisson de tes favoris ?
t.hi: इस पेय को पसंदीदा से हटाओ?
t.ja: お気に入りからこの飲み物を削除しますか？
t.nb: Vil du fjerne denne drikken fra favorittene dine?
t.nl: Dit drankje uit je favorieten verwijderen?
t.pt_BR: Quer remover esta bebida dos favoritos?
t.sv: Vill du ta bort den här drycken från dina favoriter?
t.tr: Bu içeceği favorilerinden silmek istediğine emin misin?
t.vi: Xóa đồ uống này khỏi danh sách yêu thích?
t.zh_CN: 要将所选饮料从收藏中移除吗？

en: Our app will help you drink more water and lead a healthy lifestyle every day!
context:
Surface: Onboarding intro screen — top hero paragraph shown above the sign-up / continue buttons (separate from the carousel slides).
Type: paragraph (marketing claim)
Context: One-line pitch summarising the app's value proposition before the user enters the carousel / signup flow. Friendly first-person plural voice — "our application" framing the app as a partner.

t.ar: سوف يساعدك تطبيقنا على شرب المزيد من المياه والتمتع بأسلوب حياة صحي كل يوم!
t.da: Vores app hjælper dig med at drikke mere vand og føre en sund livsstil hver dag!
t.de: Unsere App hilft dir, jeden Tag mehr Wasser zu trinken und einen gesunden Lebensstil zu führen!
t.en: Our app will help you drink more water and lead a healthy lifestyle every day!
t.es: Nuestra aplicación te ayudará a beber más agua y a llevar un estilo de vida saludable todos los días
t.fr: Notre application t'aidera à boire plus d'eau et à adopter un mode de vie sain chaque jour!
t.hi: हमारी ऐप तुम्हें ज़्यादा पानी पीने और रोज़ हेल्दी रहने में मदद करेगी!
t.id: Aplikasi kami akan membantu kamu minum lebih banyak air dan menjalani gaya hidup sehat setiap hari!
t.it: La nostra app ti aiuterà a bere più acqua e a seguire uno stile di vita sano tutti i giorni!
t.ja: このアプリが、もっと水を飲んで毎日健康的なライフスタイルを送れるようサポートします！
t.ko: 저희 앱을 이용하면 물도 더 많이 마시고 매일 건강한 생활 습관을 이어갈 수 있어요!
t.ms: Aplikasi kami akan membantu awak minum lebih banyak air dan mengamalkan gaya hidup sihat setiap hari!
t.nb: Appen vår hjelper deg med å drikke mer vann og føre en sunn livsstil hver dag!
t.nl: Onze app helpt je om meer water te drinken en elke dag gezond te leven!
t.pl: Nasza aplikacja pomoże ci pić więcej wody i prowadzić zdrowy tryb życia każdego dnia!
t.pt_BR: Nosso app vai ajudar você a beber mais água e ter um estilo de vida saudável todos os dias!
t.ru: Наше приложение поможет тебе пить больше воды и вести здоровый образ жизни каждый день!
t.sv: Vår app hjälper dig att dricka mer vatten och leva en hälsosam livsstil varje dag!
t.tr: Uygulamamız her gün daha fazla su içmene ve sağlıklı bir yaşam sürmene yardımcı olacak!
t.vi: Ứng dụng của chúng tôi sẽ giúp bạn uống nhiều nước hơn và có lối sống lành mạnh mỗi ngày!
t.zh_CN: 我们的应用程序将帮助你多喝水，让每一天变得更加健康！

en: The full version helps you reach your daily goal faster!
context:
Surface: Main screen — premium upsell banner / cell (FullVersionCell, PurchaseOfferCell) and classic main-screen promotion banner.
Type: paragraph (marketing banner) / accessibility value
Context: In-app promotional banner shown to free users on the main screen — claims the full version helps reach the daily goal faster. Used both as visible label and as the cell's accessibility value. Uses legacy "Full version" wording.
Tone: Promotional but warm.

t.ar: ستُساعدك النُّسخة الكاملة على الوصول إلى هدفك اليومي بشكل أسرع!
t.da: Den fulde version hjælper dig med at nå dit daglige mål hurtigere!
t.de: Mit der Vollversion erreichst du dein Tagesziel viel schneller!
t.en: The full version helps you reach your daily goal faster!
t.es: ¡La versión completa te ayudará a alcanzar tu objetivo diario más rápido!
t.fr: La version complète t'aidera à atteindre ton objectif quotidien plus vite !
t.hi: फुल वर्ज़न तुम्हें अपना रोज़ का लक्ष्य जल्दी पूरा करने में मदद करता है!
t.id: Versi lengkap akan membantu mencapai target harian lebih cepat!
t.it: La versione completa ti aiuterà a raggiungere più facilmente il tuo obiettivo giornaliero!
t.ja: フルバージョンなら毎日の目標到達が早くなります！
t.ko: 풀 버전을 이용하면 일일 목표에 더 빠르게 도달할 수 있어요!
t.ms: Versi lengkap akan membantu mencapai matlamat harian lebih cepat!
t.nb: Fullversjonen hjelper deg med å nå det daglige målet ditt raskere!
t.nl: Met de volledige versie bereik je je dagelijkse doel sneller!
t.pl: Pełna wersja pomoże ci osiągnąć swój codzienny cel szybciej!
t.pt_BR: A versão completa vai ajudar você a alcançar sua meta diária mais rápido!
t.ru: Полная версия поможет достичь дневной цели быстрее!
t.sv: Den fullständiga versionen hjälper dig att nå ditt dagliga mål snabbare!
t.tr: Tam sürüm, günlük hedefine daha hızlı ulaşmana yardımcı olacak!
t.vi: Phiên bản đầy đủ sẽ giúp bạn đạt được mục tiêu hàng ngày nhanh hơn!
t.zh_CN: 完整版将帮助你更快地达成每日目标！

context:
Surface: Onboarding welcome / intro primary CTA and Classic main-screen promotion banner fallback CTA.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb phrase inviting the user to start using the app / promotion right away. Use the locale-natural short imperative; not a literal "begin walking / starting up" sense.
Constraints: Keep short (onboarding / promo CTA button; wraps if long). No trailing period.

Surface: Subscription / paywall — headline shown for introductory-offer users; also used in horizontal benefits paywall.
Type: badge / banner headline
Context: Short marketing label flagging a limited-time discounted subscription offer. Standard sales / e-commerce phrasing.
Constraints: Keep short (≤20 chars). No trailing period.
Tone: promotional.

Surface: Onboarding "choose calculation" screen — pro header label; Subscription compare table header — "Full" column header (premium tier column, paired with "Free").
Type: column header / section label
Context: Short label for the paid / premium tier of the app. Often shown side-by-side with the "Free" tier label in feature comparison tables.
Constraints: Keep very short (≤6 chars) — must fit a narrow comparison-table column.
