en: Couldn't connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again later. If the problem persists, please contact us.
context:
Surface: app-wide — generic "no internet / server unreachable" error alert message used by APIError handling across login, sync, profile fetch, friend list, and other networked flows.
Type: error message
Context: Two-paragraph message explaining that the server cannot be reached, asking the user to check their internet connection and retry, and offering a follow-up if the issue persists. Used as the alert body in `APIError.localizedDescription` and from explicit `showAlert(title:)` calls.
Register: casual T-form — an error / failure message is brand-voice «ты» with a reserved tone across all T-V / honorific languages (seriousness comes from the reserved tone and impersonal phrasing, never from a formal pronoun; § Brand voice § Фамильярность). Not legally-binding text; legacy «вы» grandfathered.
Tone: reserved, apologetic, action-oriented — "Please" prefix in line with the project error-message convention.

t.ar: لا يوجد اتصال بالخادم. يرجى التحقق من اتصالك بالإنترنت والمحاولة مرة أخرى في وقت لاحق. إذا استمرت المشكلة، يرجى الاتصال بنا.
t.da: Der er ingen forbindelse til serveren. Kontroller venligst din internetforbindelse og prøv igen senere. Hvis problemet fortsætter, bedes du kontakte os.
t.de: Es besteht keine Verbindung zum Server. Bitte überprüfe deine Internetverbindung und versuche es später erneut. Wenn das Problem weiterhin besteht, kontaktiere uns bitte.
t.en: Couldn't connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again later. If the problem persists, please contact us.
t.es: No hay conexión con el servidor. Por favor, comprueba tu conexión a internet e inténtalo de nuevo más tarde. Si el problema persiste, por favor, contáctanos.
t.fr: Il n'y a pas de connexion au serveur. Vérifie ta connexion internet et réessaie plus tard. Si le problème persiste, contacte-nous.
t.hi: सर्वर से कनेक्शन नहीं हो पा रहा। अपना इंटरनेट कनेक्शन जाँचो और बाद में फिर कोशिश करो। अगर समस्या बनी रहे, तो हमसे संपर्क करो।
t.id: Tidak ada koneksi ke server. Periksa koneksi internetmu dan coba lagi nanti. Jika masalah berlanjut, hubungi kami.
t.it: Non c'è connessione al server. Controlla la tua connessione internet e riprova più tardi. Se il problema persiste, contattaci.
t.ja: サーバーへの接続がありません。インターネット接続を確認し、後で再試行してください。問題が解決しない場合は、お問い合わせください。
t.ko: 서버에 연결할 수 없어요. 인터넷 연결을 확인한 후 잠시 뒤 다시 시도해 주세요. 문제가 계속되면 문의해 주세요.
t.ms: Tiada sambungan ke pelayan. Sila periksa sambungan internet awak dan cuba lagi kemudian. Jika masalah berterusan, sila hubungi kami.
t.nb: Det er ingen forbindelse til serveren. Kontroller internettforbindelsen din og prøv igjen senere. Hvis problemet vedvarer, ta kontakt med oss.
t.nl: Er is geen verbinding met de server. Controleer je internetverbinding en probeer het later opnieuw. Als het probleem aanhoudt, neem dan contact met ons op.
t.pl: Nie ma połączenia z serwerem. Sprawdź swoje połączenie z internetem i spróbuj ponownie później. Jeśli problem będzie się utrzymywać, skontaktuj się z nami.
t.pt_BR: Não há conexão com o servidor. Verifique sua conexão com a internet e tente de novo mais tarde. Se o problema continuar, fale com a gente.
t.ru: Нет соединения с сервером. Проверь интернет-соединение и попробуй снова позже. Если проблема сохраняется, свяжись с нами.
t.sv: Det finns ingen anslutning till servern. Kontrollera din internetanslutning och försök igen senare. Om problemet kvarstår, vänligen kontakta oss.
t.tr: Sunucuya bağlantı yok. Lütfen internet bağlantını kontrol et ve daha sonra tekrar dene. Sorun devam ederse, lütfen bizimle iletişime geç.
t.vi: Không có kết nối đến máy chủ. Vui lòng kiểm tra kết nối internet của bạn và thử lại sau. Nếu vấn đề vẫn còn, vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi.
t.zh_CN: 无法连接到服务器。请检查你的互联网连接，稍后再试。如果问题仍然存在，请联系我们。

en: Hey there! We've noticed a hiccup in your session. Please log in again.
context:
Surface: Authentication / API error — shown as the localized description of `APIError.invalidCredentials` and `APIError.unauthorized`, surfaced in alerts when the saved session token is rejected by the server.
Type: error message
Context: Tells the user their session has expired or credentials are no longer accepted and asks them to log in again. "Log in" = sign in to their existing account, not create a new one. Tone is unusually informal compared to other errors in the app ("Hey there!", "hiccup"); preserve this friendly/casual register in translations rather than making it formal.
Tone: friendly / casual.

t.ar: مرحبًا! لقد لاحظنا خللاً في جلستك. الرجاء تسجيل الدخول مرة أخرى.
t.da: Hej! Vi har bemærket et lille problem med din session. Log ind igen.
t.de: Hallo! Da gab es eine kleine Panne mit deiner Sitzung. Bitte melde dich erneut an.
t.en: Hey there! We've noticed a hiccup in your session. Please log in again.
t.es: ¡Hola! Hemos notado un contratiempo en tu sesión. Por favor, inicia sesión de nuevo.
t.fr: Salut ! Nous avons remarqué un problème dans ta session. Reconnecte-toi.
t.hi: अरे! लगता है तुम्हारा सेशन रुक गया है। कृपया दोबारा लॉग इन करो।
t.id: Hai! Sepertinya sesimu terputus. Masuk lagi, ya.
t.it: Ciao! Abbiamo notato un'interruzione nella tua sessione. Per favore, effettua di nuovo l'accesso.
t.ja: こんにちは！セッションに問題が発生したようです。もう一度ログインしてください。
t.ko: 안녕하세요! 세션에 문제가 생긴 것 같아요. 다시 로그인해 주세요.
t.ms: Hai! Kami perasan ada gangguan dalam sesi awak. Sila log masuk semula.
t.nb: Hei der! Det oppstod en liten glipp i økten din. Logg inn igjen.
t.nl: Hé daar! We hebben een hapering in je sessie opgemerkt. Log alsjeblieft opnieuw in.
t.pl: Cześć! Zauważyliśmy problem z twoją sesją. Zaloguj się ponownie.
t.pt_BR: Olá! Notamos um problema na sua sessão. Faça login de novo.
t.ru: Привет! Похоже, сессия прервалась. Войди в систему снова.
t.sv: Hej där! Vi har märkt ett litet problem med din session. Logga in igen.
t.tr: Merhaba! Oturumunda bir aksaklık fark ettik. Lütfen tekrar giriş yap.
t.vi: Xin chào! Chúng tôi đã nhận thấy một sự cố trong phiên làm việc của bạn. Vui lòng đăng nhập lại.
t.zh_CN: 嘿！我们注意到你的会话中出现了一些小问题。请重新登录。

en: Please enter more than 3 characters to search
context:
Surface: Find friends / user search screen — inline validation message shown when the search query is empty or shorter than the minimum length (`APIError.SearchUsersErrors.emptyRequest` / `.shortRequest`).
Type: error message (input validation)
Context: Tells the user that their search input is too short — they need at least 4 characters before the server will return results. Polite imperative with "Please".

t.ar: الرجاء إدخال أكثر من 3 أحرف للبحث
t.da: Indtast venligst mere end 3 tegn for at søge
t.de: Bitte gib mehr als 3 Zeichen ein, um zu suchen
t.en: Please enter more than 3 characters to search
t.es: Introduce más de 3 caracteres para buscar
t.fr: Entre plus de 3 caractères pour rechercher
t.hi: खोजने के लिए 3 से अधिक वर्ण दर्ज करो
t.id: Silakan masukkan lebih dari 3 karakter untuk mencari
t.it: Inserisci più di 3 caratteri per cercare
t.ja: 検索するには3文字以上を入力してください
t.ms: Sila masukkan lebih daripada 3 aksara untuk mencari
t.nb: Skriv inn mer enn 3 tegn for å søke
t.nl: Voer meer dan 3 tekens in om te zoeken
t.pl: Wprowadź więcej niż 3 znaki, aby wyszukać
t.pt_BR: Digite mais de 3 caracteres para pesquisar
t.sv: Vänligen ange mer än 3 tecken för att söka
t.tr: Arama yapmak için lütfen 3 karakterden fazla gir
t.vi: Vui lòng nhập nhiều hơn 3 ký tự để tìm kiếm
t.zh_CN: 请输入超过3个字符进行搜索

en: An error occurred while sharing on Facebook. Please ensure that the Facebook app is installed and that sharing permissions have been granted.
context:
Surface: Achievement / progress share flow — alert shown when sharing to Facebook fails (Facebook app not installed, sharing permission denied, or `ShareKit` reports a generic error).
Type: error message
Context: Informs the user that the Facebook share could not be completed and what to check (Facebook app installed, sharing permission granted). "Facebook" is a product name — keep untranslated. Tone is polite and action-oriented.

t.ar: حدث خطأ أثناء المشاركة على Facebook. يرجى التأكد من تثبيت تطبيق Facebook وأن تم منح أذونات المشاركة.
t.da: Der opstod en fejl under deling på Facebook. Sørg for, at Facebook-appen er installeret, og at delingstilladelser er blevet givet.
t.de: Beim Teilen auf Facebook ist ein Fehler aufgetreten. Bitte stelle sicher, dass die Facebook-App installiert ist und die Freigabeberechtigungen erteilt wurden.
t.en: An error occurred while sharing on Facebook. Please ensure that the Facebook app is installed and that sharing permissions have been granted.
t.es: Se produjo un error al compartir en Facebook. Asegúrate de que la aplicación de Facebook esté instalada y de que se hayan otorgado los permisos para compartir.
t.fr: Une erreur s'est produite lors du partage sur Facebook. Assure-toi que l'application Facebook est installée et que les autorisations de partage ont été accordées.
t.hi: Facebook पर शेयर करते समय एक त्रुटि हुई। पक्का करो कि Facebook ऐप इंस्टॉल है और शेयर करने की अनुमति दी गई है।
t.id: Terjadi kesalahan saat berbagi di Facebook. Pastikan bahwa aplikasi Facebook telah terpasang dan izin berbagi telah diberikan.
t.it: Si è verificato un errore durante la condivisione su Facebook. Assicurati che l'app di Facebook sia installata e di aver concesso le autorizzazioni per la condivisione.
t.ja: Facebookで共有する際にエラーが発生しました。Facebookアプリがインストールされていて、共有の許可が与えられていることを確認してください。
t.ko: Facebook에 공유하는 동안 오류가 발생했어요. Facebook 앱이 설치되어 있고 공유 권한이 허용되어 있는지 확인해 주세요.
t.ms: Ralat berlaku semasa berkongsi di Facebook. Sila pastikan bahawa aplikasi Facebook telah dipasang dan kebenaran berkongsi telah diberikan.
t.nb: En feil oppstod under deling på Facebook. Sørg for at Facebook-appen er installert og at delingstillatelser er gitt.
t.nl: Er is een fout opgetreden bij het delen op Facebook. Zorg ervoor dat de Facebook-app is geïnstalleerd en dat de deelrechten zijn verleend.
t.pl: Wystąpił błąd podczas udostępniania na Facebooku. Upewnij się, że aplikacja Facebook jest zainstalowana i że udzielono uprawnień do udostępniania.
t.pt_BR: Não foi possível compartilhar no Facebook. Confira se o app do Facebook está instalado e se a permissão de compartilhamento foi concedida.
t.ru: Произошла ошибка при публикации в Facebook. Проверь, что приложение Facebook установлено и есть разрешение на публикацию.
t.sv: Ett fel uppstod vid delning på Facebook. Vänligen se till att Facebook-appen är installerad och att delningsbehörigheter har beviljats.
t.tr: Facebook'ta paylaşılırken bir hata oluştu. Lütfen Facebook uygulamasının yüklü olduğundan ve paylaşım izinlerinin verildiğinden emin ol.
t.vi: Đã xảy ra lỗi khi chia sẻ lên Facebook. Vui lòng đảm bảo rằng ứng dụng Facebook đã được cài đặt và quyền chia sẻ đã được cấp phép.
t.zh_CN: 在 Facebook 上分享时发生错误。请确保已安装 Facebook 应用，并已授予分享权限。

context:
Surface: Daily / beverage detail statistics — water balance row when an alcoholic beverage was logged.
Type: statistics caption
Context: Alcohol dehydrates the body, so logging an alcoholic drink raises the user's daily water goal. This caption shows the extra volume added to the goal because of that drink. Rendered example: "+200 ml to goal (alcohol increases goal)".
Placeholders:
  [%1$s] — added volume number (e.g. "200")
  [%2$s] — measurement unit ("ml" / "l" / "fl oz")
Constraints: Keep the line reasonably short; the parenthetical explanation can be shortened in translation if needed.

t.es: +[%1$s] [%2$s] a la meta (el alcohol aumenta la meta)
t.ja: 目標に +[%1$s] [%2$s]（アルコールは目標を増やします）
t.nl: +[%1$s] [%2$s] bij je doel (alcohol verhoogt je doel)
t.pt_BR: +[%1$s] [%2$s] para a meta (álcool aumenta a meta)
t.vi: +[%1$s] [%2$s] vào mục tiêu (rượu làm tăng mục tiêu)

context:
Surface: Onboarding "Choose daily goal calculation method" screen — header above the basic calculation card.
Type: short header label
Context: One-word label marking the simpler (basic) calculation option, paired with the more detailed "Full" option. Distinct from `basicTitle` ("Basic calculation"), which is the full text label for the basic option.
Constraints: Keep to one short word.

Surface: Streak popup (after reaching the daily goal) — congratulation line. Also used historically on the main screen today-progress cell.
Type: motivational text
Context: Confirms the user has met the daily water goal several times in a row. Rendered example: "Goal achieved 5 times in a row".
Placeholders:
  [%s] — localized plural for "N time(s)" produced by the timesPlural .stringsdict rules
Register: casual T-form — main-screen motivational text is casual companion voice (default for non-formal surfaces).
Tone: encouraging.

t.vi: Đã đạt được mục tiêu [%s] liên tiếp

context:
Surface: Add Drink screen — section header above the user's favorite-beverages row (rendered uppercased).
Type: section header
Context: Heading for the row of beverages the user marked as favorites for one-tap adding. Distinct from "favoritesBeverages" ("Favorite beverages") used as a longer settings title.
Constraints: Short single word; will be uppercased at runtime — choose a translation that reads well in all-caps.

Surface: Settings → Favorite beverages row title, Favorite beverages screen navigation title, Add Drink banner title.
Type: settings row title / screen title
Context: Refers to the user's curated list of beverages saved for quick one-tap adding from the main / Add Drink screen. Distinct from "favorites" (short uppercase section header).

en: Select the drink you want to add to favorites for quick access
context:
Surface: Add drink screen — favorite-beverage selection helper text in the "choose a beverage to favorite" sheet.
Type: paragraph (instructional helper)
Context: Instructs the user to tap a drink to add it to their favorite-beverages quick-access list. Shown above the catalog list when adding a new favorite.

t.ar: حدد المشروب الذي تريد إضافته إلى المفضلة للوصول السريع
t.da: Vælg den drik, du vil tilføje til favoritter for hurtig adgang
t.de: Wähle das Getränk aus, das du zu den Favoriten hinzufügen möchtest, für schnellen Zugriff
t.en: Select the drink you want to add to favorites for quick access
t.es: Selecciona la bebida que quieras agregar a favoritos para un acceso rápido
t.fr: Sélectionne la boisson que tu souhaites ajouter aux favoris pour un accès rapide
t.hi: उस पेय को चुनो जिसे तुम क्विक एक्सेस के लिए पसंदीदा में जोड़ना चाहते हो
t.id: Pilih minuman yang ingin kamu tambahkan ke favorit untuk akses cepat
t.it: Seleziona la bevanda che vuoi aggiungere ai preferiti per un accesso rapido
t.ja: すぐに使えるよう、お気に入りに追加する飲み物を選択してください
t.ko: 즐겨찾기에 추가하여 빠르게 접근하고 싶은 음료를 선택하세요
t.ms: Pilih minuman yang awak mahu tambah ke kegemaran untuk akses cepat
t.nb: Velg drikken du vil legge til i favoritter for rask tilgang
t.nl: Kies het drankje dat je aan favorieten wilt toevoegen voor snelle toegang
t.pl: Wybierz napój, który chcesz dodać do ulubionych dla szybkiego dostępu
t.pt_BR: Escolha a bebida que você quer adicionar aos favoritos para acesso rápido
t.ru: Выбери напиток, который хочешь добавить в избранное для быстрого доступа
t.sv: Välj den dryck du vill lägga till i favoriter för snabb åtkomst
t.tr: Hızlı erişim için favorilere eklemek istediğin içeceği seç
t.vi: Chọn đồ uống bạn muốn thêm vào mục yêu thích để truy cập nhanh
t.zh_CN: 选择想添加到收藏夹的饮品，方便快速取用

en: Add drinks to favorites for quick access. Touch and hold, then drag to reorder.
context:
Surface: Settings → Favorite beverages screen — description / helper cell above the favorites list.
Type: paragraph (instructional helper)
Context: Explains the favorite-beverages feature: tap to add for one-tap quick-add on the main screen, and long-press-and-drag to reorder. Distinct from "favoritesBeveragesAddDescription" which appears in the picker sheet.

t.ar: أضف المشروبات إلى المفضلة للوصول السريع. اضغط مع الاستمرار، ثم اسحب لتغيير الترتيب.
t.da: Opret favoritdrikke for hurtig tilføjelse. Tryk og træk for at ændre deres rækkefølge.
t.de: Füge Getränke zu deinen Favoriten hinzu, um sie schnell einzutragen. Halte ein Getränk gedrückt und zieh es, um die Reihenfolge zu ändern.
t.en: Add drinks to favorites for quick access. Touch and hold, then drag to reorder.
t.es: Crea tus bebidas favoritas para añadirlas rápidamente. Presiona y arrastra para cambiar su orden.
t.fr: Ajoute des boissons aux favoris pour un accès rapide. Maintiens appuyé, puis fais glisser pour réorganiser.
t.hi: जल्दी जोड़ने के लिए पसंदीदा पेय बनाओ। क्रम बदलने के लिए दबाओ और खींचो।
t.id: Tambahkan minuman ke favorit untuk akses cepat. Tahan dan seret untuk mengubah urutannya.
t.it: Aggiungi bevande ai preferiti per un accesso rapido. Tocca e tieni premuto, poi trascina per riordinare.
t.ja: お気に入りに追加すると、すぐにアクセスできます。長押ししてドラッグすると並べ替えられます。
t.ko: 즐겨찾는 음료를 만들어 빠르게 추가하세요. 순서를 변경하려면 누르고 드래그하세요.
t.ms: Tambah minuman ke kegemaran untuk penambahan pantas. Tekan dan tahan, kemudian seret untuk menukar susunannya.
t.nb: Legg til drikker i favoritter for rask tilgang. Trykk og hold, så dra for å endre rekkefølgen.
t.nl: Voeg drankjes toe aan favorieten voor snelle toegang. Houd ingedrukt en sleep om de volgorde te wijzigen.
t.pl: Utwórz ulubione napoje dla szybkiego dodawania. Naciśnij i przeciągnij, aby zmienić ich kolejność.
t.pt_BR: Crie bebidas favoritas para adicionar rápido. Toque, segure e arraste para mudar a ordem.
t.ru: Добавляй напитки в избранное для быстрого доступа. Нажми и удерживай, затем перетащи, чтобы изменить порядок.
t.sv: Skapa favoritdrycker för att snabbt lägga till dem. Håll in och dra för att ändra ordningen.
t.tr: İçecekleri hızlı erişim için favorilere ekle. Sıralamayı değiştirmek için basılı tut ve sürükle.
t.vi: Thêm đồ uống vào mục yêu thích để truy cập nhanh. Nhấn giữ rồi kéo để sắp xếp lại.
t.zh_CN: 添加喜欢的饮品以便快速记录。按住并拖动即可重新排序。

en: Create an account. Save your statistics.
context:
Surface: Settings screen — "Create account" promo row title; also reused as the title on the onboarding sign-up screen.
Type: paragraph (call to action)
Context: Two short sentences inviting an unauthenticated user to create an account so their statistics get backed up. First sentence is the action, second is the benefit.
Constraints: Preserve the two-sentence structure (each sentence ends with a period). Keep both sentences short — they wrap onto two lines on narrow devices.

t.da: Opret en konto. Gem dine statistikker.
t.de: Erstelle ein Konto. Sichere deine Statistik.
t.en: Create an account. Save your statistics.
t.es: Crea una cuenta. Guarda tus estadísticas.
t.fr: Crée un compte. Sauvegarde tes statistiques.
t.hi: एक खाता बनाओ। अपने आँकड़े सेव करो।
t.it: Crea un account. Salva le tue statistiche.
t.ja: アカウントを作成しましょう。統計を保存できます。
t.nb: Opprett en konto. Lagre statistikken din.
t.nl: Maak een account aan. Bewaar je statistieken.
t.pt_BR: Crie uma conta. Salve suas estatísticas.
t.sv: Skapa ett konto. Spara din statistik.
t.vi: Tạo một tài khoản. Lưu thống kê của bạn.
t.zh_CN: 创建账户。保存你的统计数据。

en: This is an estimated goal based on your parameters. Your doctor can determine an exact daily goal for you.
context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal screen — description below the calculated daily water goal value.
Type: paragraph (educational disclaimer)
Context: Tells the user that the computed daily water goal is an approximation derived from their profile parameters (sex, weight, activity, etc.), and that only their doctor can give an exact medical value. "Estimated" = approximate, not exact.

t.ar: هذا هو الهدف المقدر بناءً على معاييرك. يمكن للطبيب أن يحدد لك هدفًا يوميًا دقيقًا.
t.da: Dette er et estimeret mål baseret på dine parametre. Din læge kan bestemme et præcist dagligt mål for dig.
t.de: Dies ist ein geschätztes Ziel basierend auf deinen Angaben. Dein Arzt kann ein genaues Tagesziel für dich bestimmen.
t.en: This is an estimated goal based on your parameters. Your doctor can determine an exact daily goal for you.
t.es: Este objetivo es una estimación basada en tus datos. Tu médico puede determinar un objetivo diario exacto para ti.
t.fr: Ceci est un objectif estimé basé sur tes paramètres. Ton médecin peut déterminer un objectif quotidien exact pour toi.
t.hi: यह तुम्हारे पैरामीटर के आधार पर अनुमानित लक्ष्य है। तुम्हारे डॉक्टर तुम्हारे लिए सटीक दैनिक लक्ष्य तय कर सकते हैं।
t.id: Ini adalah perkiraan target berdasarkan parametermu. Doktermu bisa menentukan target harian yang tepat untukmu.
t.it: Questo obiettivo è stimato in base ai tuoi parametri. Il tuo medico può determinare un obiettivo giornaliero esatto per te.
t.ja: 入力した情報をもとにした推定目標です。正確な1日の目標については医師にご相談ください。
t.ko: 입력한 정보를 바탕으로 계산한 예상 목표예요. 정확한 하루 목표는 의사와 상담해 보세요.
t.ms: Ini ialah matlamat anggaran berdasarkan parameter awak. Doktor awak boleh menentukan matlamat harian yang tepat untuk awak.
t.nb: Dette er et estimert mål basert på dine parametere. Legen din kan bestemme et nøyaktig daglig mål for deg.
t.nl: Dit is een geschat doel op basis van je gegevens. Je arts kan een exact dagelijks doel voor je bepalen.
t.pl: To jest szacowany cel na podstawie twoich parametrów. Twój lekarz może określić dla ciebie dokładny dzienny cel.
t.pt_BR: Esta é uma meta estimada com base nos seus dados. Seu médico pode definir uma meta diária exata para você.
t.ru: Это приблизительная цель на основе твоих параметров. Точную дневную цель поможет определить врач.
t.sv: Detta är ett uppskattat mål baserat på dina parametrar. Din läkare kan bestämma ett exakt dagligt mål för dig.
t.tr: Bu, parametrelerine dayalı tahmini bir hedeftir. Doktorun senin için kesin bir günlük hedef belirleyebilir.
t.vi: Đây là mục tiêu ước lượng dựa trên các tham số của bạn. Bác sĩ của bạn có thể xác định mục tiêu hàng ngày chính xác cho bạn.
t.zh_CN: 这是根据你的参数设定的预估目标。医生可以帮你确定更精确的每日目标。

context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal screen — primary button label below the goal value.
Type: button label
Context: Imperative verb. Re-runs the daily water goal calculation flow so the user can update their parameters (weight, activity, climate) and get a new recommended goal.
Constraints: Keep short for button width; no trailing period.

Surface: Onboarding Welcome screen — top hero greeting shown when the user first opens the app.
Type: screen title
Context: Single-word greeting that opens the onboarding flow before the carousel / questionnaire. Keep the friendly exclamation tone.

en: Let's drink more water! "My Water" makes it simple and fun.
context:
Surface: Onboarding welcome screen — subtitle below the "Welcome!" title.
Type: paragraph (marketing hook)
Context: Friendly call-to-action that invites the user to start drinking more water with the app. "My Water" is the product name and should be translated/transliterated naturally for the target locale (keep the quotation marks).
Tone: encouraging, playful.

t.ar: دعونا نشرب المزيد من الماء! "My Water" يجعل الأمر بسيطًا وممتعًا.
t.da: Lad os drikke mere vand! "Mit vand" gør det enkelt og sjovt.
t.de: Trinken wir mehr Wasser! "Mein Wasser" macht es einfach und spaßig.
t.en: Let's drink more water! "My Water" makes it simple and fun.
t.es: ¡Bebamos más agua! "My Water" lo hace sencillo y divertido.
t.fr: Buvons plus d'eau ! My Water rend cela simple et amusant.
t.hi: चलो ज़्यादा पानी पियो! "My Water" इसे आसान और मज़ेदार बनाता है।
t.id: Mari minum lebih banyak air! "My Water" membuatnya jadi mudah dan seru.
t.it: Beviamo più acqua! «La mia acqua» lo rende semplice e divertente.
t.ja: もっと水を飲みましょう！「My Water」なら、シンプルで楽しく続けられます。
t.ko: 물을 더 많이 마셔요! "나의 물"이 간단하고 재미있게 도와줄게요.
t.ms: Jom minum lebih banyak air! "Air saya" menjadikannya mudah dan menyeronokkan.
t.nb: La oss drikke mer vann! "Mitt Vann" gjør det enkelt og morsomt.
t.nl: Laten we meer water drinken! "My Water" maakt het eenvoudig en leuk.
t.pl: Pijmy więcej wody! "Moja woda" sprawia, że jest to proste i przyjemne.
t.pt_BR: Vamos beber mais água! "My Water" torna isso simples e divertido.
t.ru: Давай пить больше воды! С "Моей водой" это просто и весело.
t.sv: Låt oss dricka mer vatten! "Mitt Vatten" gör det enkelt och roligt.
t.tr: Daha fazla su içelim! "My Water" bunu basit ve eğlenceli hale getirir.
t.vi: Hãy uống nhiều nước hơn! "My Water" giúp việc này trở nên đơn giản và vui vẻ.
t.zh_CN: 让我们多喝水！“My Water”让这变得简单有趣。

context:
Surface: Long subscription paywall — chart card title (progress visualization over a 2-week period).
Type: chart section title
Context: Heading above a chart that shows how the user's daily water intake is expected to improve over the first two weeks of using the app.

t.vi: Tiến trình của bạn trong 2 tuần

context:
Surface: Main screen — "first steps" / setup checklist row title.
Type: checklist row title
Context: One of the initial setup steps shown on the main screen — taps into the goal calculation flow where the user enters parameters (sex, weight, activity, climate) and the app computes their recommended daily water goal.

t.vi: Tính toán mục tiêu hàng ngày

context:
Surface: Main screen — "First steps" onboarding checklist row, the last step in the checklist (paired with tempCalculateDailyNorm and a "log your first drink" step).
Type: tutorial step
Context: Title of the step that gets checked off once the user reaches their daily water goal for the first time. Imperative verb phrase addressed to the user.

en: Follow all steps to stay motivated!
context:
Surface: Main screen — "First steps" onboarding checklist card title (parent title above tempCalculateDailyNorm, the "log first drink" step, and tempDailyGoalAchieved).
Type: section header
Context: Title of the checklist card that guides a new user through the initial setup actions. Encourages the user to complete every step to stay engaged.

t.da: Følg alle trin for at forblive motiveret!
t.de: Befolge alle Schritte, um motiviert zu bleiben!
t.en: Follow all steps to stay motivated!
t.es: ¡Sigue todos los pasos para mantenerte motivado!
t.fr: Suis toutes les étapes pour rester motivé !
t.hi: प्रेरित रहने के लिए सभी कदम पूरे करो!
t.id: Ikuti semua langkah untuk tetap termotivasi!
t.it: Segui tutti i passaggi per rimanere motivato!
t.ja: やる気を保つためにすべてのステップを進めましょう！
t.ko: 동기를 유지하려면 모든 단계를 따라가 봐요!
t.ms: Ikuti semua langkah untuk kekal bermotivasi!
t.nb: Følg alle trinn for å holde deg motivert!
t.nl: Volg alle stappen om gemotiveerd te blijven!
t.pl: Wykonaj wszystkie kroki, aby zachować motywację!
t.pt_BR: Siga todos os passos para permanecer motivado!
t.ru: Следуй всем шагам, чтобы не терять мотивацию!
t.sv: Följ alla steg för att hålla motivationen uppe!
t.tr: Motivasyonunu korumak için tüm adımları izle!
t.vi: Làm theo tất cả các bước để giữ động lực!
t.zh_CN: 完成所有步骤，保持动力！

en: Based on your parameters, your estimated goal is [%1$.1f] [%2$s] of water.
context:
Surface: Goal calculation result screen — estimated daily water goal sentence (currently no live call-sites; preserved for legacy / pending screen).
Type: paragraph (educational)
Context: Tells the user the approximate daily water goal computed from their profile parameters. Pair with the next sentence "contactDoctorWarning" ("Your doctor can determine the exact goal for you."). "Estimated" = approximate, not exact.
Placeholders:
  [%1$.1f] — daily goal amount with one decimal (e.g. "1.2")
  [%2$s] — measurement unit ("l" / "fl oz" / "ml")

t.ar: بناءً على معاييرك، الكمية المستهدفة من الماء هي [%1$.1f] [%2$s] تقريبًا.
t.da: Baseret på dine parametre er dit estimerede mål [%1$.1f] [%2$s] vand.
t.de: Basierend auf deinen Angaben liegt dein geschätztes Ziel bei [%1$.1f] [%2$s] Wasser.
t.en: Based on your parameters, your estimated goal is [%1$.1f] [%2$s] of water.
t.es: La meta estimada en función de sus parámetros es [%1$.1f] [%2$s] de agua.
t.fr: L'objectif estimé en fonction de vos paramètres est [%1$.1f] [%2$s] d'eau.
t.hi: तुम्हारे पैरामीटर के आधार पर पानी का अनुमानित लक्ष्य [%1$.1f] [%2$s] है.
t.id: Perkiraan target berdasarkan parameter Anda adalah [%1$.1f] [%2$s] air.
t.it: L'obiettivo stimato in base ai tuoi parametri è [%1$.1f] [%2$s] di acqua.
t.ja: あなたの情報から算出した推定目標は、水 [%1$.1f] [%2$s] です。
t.ko: 입력하신 정보를 바탕으로 한 예상 목표는 물 [%1$.1f] [%2$s]예요.
t.ms: Matlamat anggaran berdasarkan parameter anda ialah [%1$.1f] [%2$s] air.
t.nb: Beregnet mål basert på parameterne dine er [%1$.1f] [%2$s] vann.
t.nl: Op basis van je parameters is je geschatte doel [%1$.1f] [%2$s] water.
t.pl: Szacowany cel na podstawie twoich parametrów to [%1$.1f] [%2$s] wody.
t.pt_BR: A meta estimada com base nos seus parâmetros é de [%1$.1f] [%2$s] de água.
t.ru: Ориентировочная цель на основе твоих параметров: [%1$.1f] [%2$s] воды.
t.sv: Uppskattat mål baserat på dina parametrar är [%1$.1f] [%2$s] vatten.
t.vi: Mục tiêu ước tính dựa trên các tham số của bạn là [%1$.1f] [%2$s] nước.
t.zh_CN: 根据你的参数，预估饮水目标是 [%1$.1f] [%2$s]。

en: Your doctor can determine the exact goal for you.
context:
Surface: Goal calculation result screen — disclaimer sentence (currently no live call-sites; preserved for legacy / pending screen).
Type: paragraph (educational disclaimer)
Context: Reminds the user that the goal computed by the app is an approximation and only a doctor can give an exact medical value. Usually shown right after "yourEstimatedGoal" ("Estimated goal based on your parameters is X l of water.").

t.ar: يمكن لطبيبك تحديد الكمية الدقيقة المناسبة لك.
t.da: Din læge kan fastslå dit nøjagtige mål.
t.de: Dein Arzt kann das genaue Ziel für dich bestimmen.
t.en: Your doctor can determine the exact goal for you.
t.es: Tu médico puede determinar la meta exacta para ti.
t.fr: Ton médecin peut déterminer l'objectif exact pour toi.
t.hi: तुम्हारे डॉक्टर तुम्हारे लिए सटीक लक्ष्य तय कर सकते हैं.
t.id: Dokter Anda dapat menentukan target yang pasti untuk Anda.
t.it: Il tuo medico può determinare l'obiettivo esatto per te.
t.ja: 正確な目標については医師にご相談ください。
t.ko: 주치의를 통해 정확한 목표를 확인할 수 있습니다.
t.ms: Doktor anda boleh menentukan matlamat yang tepat untuk anda.
t.nb: Legen din kan finne det nøyaktige målet for deg.
t.nl: Je arts kan het exacte doel voor je bepalen.
t.pl: Twój lekarz może określić dla ciebie dokładny cel.
t.pt_BR: O seu médico pode definir a meta exata para você.
t.sv: Din läkare kan fastställa det exakta målet åt dig.
t.tr: Doktorunuz sizin için kesin hedefi belirleyebilir.
t.vi: Bác sĩ của bạn có thể xác định mục tiêu chính xác dành cho bạn.
t.zh_CN: 医生可以帮你确定更精确的目标。

context:
Surface: Streak celebration popup title (`StreakPopupViewModel.makeTitleText` when streak count > 0); also reused as a tip-label title on the onboarding "add water" step (`OnboardingAddWaterViewController`).
Type: popup title / tutorial step title
Context: Celebratory exclamation. Standalone "Congratulations!" with no streak count or other context appended. Despite the key name mentioning "streak", the same value is reused on the onboarding step.
Constraints: Keep short — fits a popup header / tutorial title.
Tone: celebratory.

en: With the full version, you'll drink 42[%] more water and reach your goal
context:
Surface: Paywall header — subtitle in SubscriptionSystemStyleHeaderCell and title in SubscriptionHorizontalCardsHeaderCell.
Type: paragraph (marketing claim)
Context: Short variant of the "42% more water" promotional claim. Pairs with the longer "fullPromoText". Uses legacy "Full version" wording.
Constraints: The "[%]" token is a LITERAL percent sign ("42%"), not a format argument — keep it as the universal literal "[%]"; do not convert it to a placeholder or a bare "%".
Tone: Promotional but warm.

t.ar: يشرب مستخدمو الإصدار الكامل كمية مياه تزيد عمن سواهم بنسبة 42[%] ويحققون أهدافهم.
t.da: Brugere med fuld version drikker 42[%] mere vand og når deres mål
t.de: Nutzer der Vollversion trinken 42[%] mehr Wasser und erreichen so ihr Ziel
t.en: With the full version, you'll drink 42[%] more water and reach your goal
t.es: Los usuarios de la versión completa beben un 42[%] más de agua y alcanzan su objetivo
t.fr: Les utilisateurs de la version complète boivent 42[%] d'eau en plus et atteignent leur objectif
t.hi: फुल वर्ज़न का प्रयोग करने वाले लोग 42[%] ज़्यादा पानी पीते हैं और अपना लक्ष्य हासिल करते हैं।
t.id: Pengguna versi lengkap minum 42[%] lebih banyak air dan mencapai target mereka
t.it: Gli utenti della versione completa bevono il 42[%] di acqua in più e raggiungono il loro obiettivo
t.ja: フルバージョンなら42[%]多くの水を飲んで目標を達成できます
t.ko: 풀 버전을 이용하면 물을 42[%] 더 마시고 목표에 도달할 수 있어요
t.ms: Pengguna versi lengkap minum 42[%] lebih banyak air dan mencapai matlamat mereka
t.nb: Brukere av fullversjonen drikker 42[%] mer vann og oppnår målet sitt
t.nl: In de volledige versie drinken gebruikers 42[%] meer water en bereiken hun doel
t.pl: Użytkownicy pełnej wersji piją 42[%] więcej wody i osiągają swój cel
t.pt_BR: Os usuários da versão completa bebem 42[%] mais água e atingem sua meta
t.ru: Пользователи полной версии пьют на 42[%] больше воды и достигают поставленной цели
t.sv: Användare av den fullständiga versionen dricker 42[%] mer vatten och uppnår sitt mål
t.tr: Tam sürümün kullanıcıları [%]42 daha fazla su içer ve hedeflerine ulaşırlar
t.vi: Người dùng phiên bản đầy đủ uống nhiều nước hơn 42[%] và dễ đạt được mục tiêu của họ
t.zh_CN: 完整版用户多喝 42[%] 的水并达成饮水目标

context:
Surface: Onboarding subscription paywall — horizontal cards variant, hero header subtitle below the main title.
Type: paragraph (marketing claim)
Context: Subtitle on the onboarding paywall hero card promising that subscribing unlocks every locked feature in the app. Sits under the primary headline, above the offer cards.
Constraints: Keep concise (1 short sentence, ≤55 chars); no trailing period to match the paywall hero pattern.
Tone: promotional but warm.

t.es: Desbloquea todas las funciones de la aplicación
t.fr: Débloque toutes les fonctions de l'app
t.hi: ऐप के सभी फ़ीचर्स अनलॉक करो
t.ja: アプリのすべての機能をアンロック
t.nb: Lås opp alle funksjoner i appen
t.pt_BR: Desbloqueie todos os recursos do app
t.vi: Mở khóa tất cả các chức năng của ứng dụng
t.zh_CN: 解锁应用程序的所有功能

en: Add drinks in one tap with My Water Premium!
context:
Surface: Favorite drinks banner / premium promo body line under a CTA.
Type: paragraph (marketing claim)
Context: Highlights the one-tap quick-add benefit of My Water Premium — adding a logged drink with a single tap instead of going through the full add-drink flow.
Tone: promotional but warm.

t.ar: أضف المشروبات بنقرة واحدة مع My Water Premium!
t.da: Med My Water Premium kan du tilføje drikkevarer med et enkelt tryk!
t.de: Mit My Water Premium fügst du Getränke mit nur einem Tippen hinzu!
t.en: Add drinks in one tap with My Water Premium!
t.es: ¡Añade bebidas con 1 clic con My Water Premium!
t.fr: Ajoute des boissons en un clic avec My Water Premium !
t.hi: My Water Premium के साथ एक टैप में ड्रिंक जोड़ो!
t.id: Tambahkan minuman dalam satu ketukan dengan My Water Premium!
t.it: Aggiungi bevande con un solo tocco con My Water Premium!

t.ko: My Water Premium으로 한 번만 탭해 음료를 추가해요!

t.nb: Legg til drikker med ett trykk med Mitt Vann Premium!
t.nl: Voeg drankjes toe met één tik dankzij My Water Premium!
t.pl: Dodawaj napoje jednym kliknięciem z My Water Premium!
t.pt_BR: Adicione bebidas com 1 clique com o My Water Premium!
t.ru: Добавляй напитки в одно нажатие с My Water Premium!
t.sv: Lägg till drycker med 1 klick med My Water Premium!
t.tr: My Water Premium ile içeceklerini tek bir tıklamayla ekle!
t.vi: Thêm đồ uống chỉ với 1 cú nhấn với My Water Premium!
t.zh_CN: 通过 My Water Premium 一键添加饮品！

context:
Surface: Settings → Notifications → Notification interval popup — navigation title.
Type: screen title
Context: Screen where the user picks how often the app sends reminder notifications to drink water (every 30 min, every hour, etc.).

t.vi: Chọn khoảng thời gian thông báo

context:
Surface: Main screen progress ring background button — `accessibilityLabel`.
Type: accessibility label
Context: Names the ring button as "streak" for VoiceOver; the actual drunk/goal progress is read separately as the button's `accessibilityValue` via `a11yDrunkOfGoal`. Lowercase intentional.
Constraints: Read aloud — keep short, one word.

Surface: Subscription paywall — third offer card title (one-time purchase tier, no recurring billing).
Type: offer tier label
Context: Names the one-time lifetime-access plan ("pay once, use forever"), as opposed to monthly / yearly subscriptions. Pick the most natural single-word equivalent for permanent app access in the target language (similar to "Forever").
Constraints: Keep to one short word; fits a narrow tier button.

en: Access to all app features. Forever.
context:
Surface: Paywall — description label under the "Lifetime" subscription tier (SubscriptionViewController).
Type: tier description
Context: Tagline for the lifetime plan — emphasizes permanent access to all features after a single purchase. Pairs with the tier label "lifetime".
Constraints: Keep short — fits below the tier title.

t.ar: الوصول إلى جميع ميزات التطبيق. إلى الأبد.
t.da: Adgang til alle app-funktioner. For evigt.
t.de: Zugriff auf alle App-Funktionen. Für immer.
t.en: Access to all app features. Forever.
t.es: Acceso a todas las funciones de la aplicación. Para siempre.
t.fr: Accès à toutes les fonctionnalités de l'application. Pour toujours.
t.hi: ऐप के सभी फ़ीचर्स तक पहुँच। हमेशा के लिए।

t.it: Accesso a tutte le funzionalità dell'app. Per sempre.
t.ja: すべてのアプリ機能を永久に利用できます。

t.nb: Tilgang til alle appfunksjoner. For alltid.
t.nl: Toegang tot alle app-functies. Voor altijd.

en: You can enable them in Apple Health Settings (tap Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water, then enable write permission)
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Apple Health setup screen — footer hint below the "not syncing" list (IntegrationSetupViewController.partialFooterLabel).
Type: paragraph
Context: Tells the user exactly how to grant the missing write permissions in the iOS Settings app: open Apple Health → Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water → enable write permission. "Apple Health" and "My Water" are product names — keep untranslated. Preserve the literal "Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water" navigation path (these labels match strings inside the Apple Health iOS app and the breadcrumb is the actionable part of the hint).

t.ar: يمكنك تفعيلها من إعدادات Apple Health (اضغط على الملف الشخصي ← الخصوصية ← التطبيقات ← My Water، ثم فعّل إذن الكتابة)
t.da: Du kan aktivere dem i indstillingerne for Apple Health (tryk på Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water, og slå derefter skrivetilladelse til)
t.de: In den Apple Health-Einstellungen kannst du sie aktivieren (tippe auf Profil → Datenschutz → Apps → My Water und aktiviere dann die Schreibberechtigung)
t.en: You can enable them in Apple Health Settings (tap Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water, then enable write permission)
t.es: Puedes activarlo en los ajustes de Apple Health (toca Perfil → Privacidad → Apps → My Water y activa el permiso de escritura)
t.fr: Tu peux les activer dans les réglages d'Apple Health (appuie sur Profil → Confidentialité → Apps → My Water, puis active l'autorisation d'écriture)
t.hi: इन्हें Apple Health सेटिंग में चालू कर सकते हो (Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water पर टैप करो, फिर राइट परमिशन चालू करो)
t.id: Kamu bisa mengaktifkannya di Pengaturan Apple Health (ketuk Profil → Privasi → Aplikasi → My Water, lalu aktifkan izin tulis)
t.it: Puoi attivarli nelle impostazioni di Apple Health (tocca Profilo → Privacy → App → My Water, poi attiva l'autorizzazione in scrittura)
t.ja: Apple Health設定で有効にできます(プロフィール → プライバシー → App → My Water をタップして書き込み権限を有効にしてください)
t.ko: Apple Health 설정에서 권한을 켤 수 있어요(프로필 → 개인정보 보호 → 앱 → My Water 순서로 이동한 후 쓰기 권한을 허용하세요).
t.ms: Awak boleh aktifkannya dalam Tetapan Apple Health (ketik Profil → Privasi → Apl → My Water, kemudian aktifkan kebenaran menulis)
t.nb: Du kan aktivere det i innstillingene for Apple Health (trykk på Profil → Personvern → Apper → Mitt Vann, og aktiver skrivetilgang)
t.nl: Je kunt ze inschakelen in Apple Health-instellingen (tik op Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water en zet schrijftoestemming aan)
t.pl: Możesz je włączyć w ustawieniach Apple Health (kliknij Profil → Prywatność → Aplikacje → My Water i włącz uprawnienie do zapisu)
t.pt_BR: Você pode ativá-los nas Configurações do Apple Health (toque em Perfil → Privacidade → Apps → My Water e ative a permissão de gravação)
t.ru: Включить их можно в настройках Apple Health (нажми Профиль → Конфиденциальность → Приложения → My Water, затем включи разрешение на запись)
t.sv: Du kan aktivera dem i Apple Health-inställningarna (tryck på Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water och aktivera sedan skrivbehörighet)
t.tr: Bunları Apple Health ayarlarından açabilirsin (Profil → Gizlilik → Uygulamalar → My Water yolunu izleyip yazma iznini ver)
t.vi: Bạn có thể bật chúng trong cài đặt Apple Health (nhấn Profile → Privacy → Apps → My Water, rồi bật quyền ghi)
t.zh_CN: 你可以在 Apple Health 设置中开启（点按「个人资料」→「隐私」→「应用程序」→「My Water」，然后开启写入权限）

context:

Type: button label
Context: Tapping opens the Apple Health app where the user can grant the missing write permissions. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — keep untranslated.
Constraints: Keep short — single-line button.

en: Helps me keep track of my water intake.
context:
Surface: Paywall / subscription screen — social-proof user-review card (rotating reviewTemp1..N pool shown above the price options).
Type: paragraph (social proof / fake testimonial)
Context: Short customer-style testimonial quoted on the paywall to build trust. Translate as natural first-person consumer praise; keep informal register and casual punctuation.
Tone: testimonial / casual (mimics a user review).

t.ar: أنا أحب كل شيء والتصميم وهذا كل شيء. أنصح الجميع.
t.da: God stabil app. Hjælper mig med at drikke vand.
t.de: Mir gefällt die App sehr gut, weil sie mich erinnern kann, falls ich zu wenig Wasser trinke
t.en: Helps me keep track of my water intake.
t.es: Está genial y gracias a esta app estoy bebiendo más agua, motiva mucho tenerla.
t.fr: J’adore, super appli et très motivante !
t.hi: इससे मुझे अपना पानी ट्रैक करने में मदद मिलती है।
t.id: Suka semuanya, desainnya juga keren. Sangat direkomendasikan!
t.it: L’app è perfetta per ricordarsi di bere l’acqua necessaria ogni giorno per coprire il proprio fabbisogno giornaliero!
t.ja: どれだけ飲んだか分かるからよい
t.ko: 앱에 마시는 것들을 기록하다보니 2리터 마시기가 쉬워지고 있어요
t.ms: Suka semuanya dan reka bentuk dan lainnya. Sangat mengesyorkan
t.nb: Hjelper meg å holde oversikt over vanninntaket mitt.
t.nl: Echt geweldig en gemakkelijk in gebruik.
t.pl: Aplikacja jest super dzięki niej zaczęłam pilnować się z piciem odpowiedniej ilości płynów. Polecam bo warto!
t.pt_BR: Me ajuda a controlar a quantidade de água que bebo todos os dias. Recomendo!
t.ru: Всё нравится, и дизайн, и всё. Всем советую

en: Easy and I like the reminders to drink, was just what I was looking for

en: A great way to make sure I’m drinking enough water every day. There is nothing more satisfying than reaching your goal! 😍🚰
context:
Surface: Paywall / subscription screen — social-proof user-review card (rotating reviewTemp1..N pool shown above the price options).
Type: paragraph (social proof / fake testimonial)
Context: Short customer-style testimonial quoted on the paywall to build trust. Translate as natural first-person consumer praise; keep informal register and casual punctuation. Preserve the celebratory emoji sequence (😍🚰) and the trailing exclamation as part of the testimonial style.
Tone: testimonial / casual (mimics a user review).

t.ar: يساعدك التطبيق حقًا على تتبع كمية السوائل اليومية. مريحة للغاية وبسيطة
t.da: En fantastisk måde at sikre, at jeg drikker nok vand hver dag. Der er intet mere tilfredsstillende end at nå målet! 😍🚰
t.de: Eine tolle Möglichkeit, jeden Tag genug Wasser zu trinken. Es gibt nichts Schöneres, als sein Ziel zu erreichen! 😍🚰
t.en: A great way to make sure I’m drinking enough water every day. There is nothing more satisfying than reaching your goal! 😍🚰
t.es: Me ayuda mucho, creo q conseguirá hacerme el hábito de beber
t.fr: Je recommande cette appli qui nous aide à avoir un apport en eau adapté à notre poids. Pratique et facile à comprendre.
t.hi: रोज़ काफ़ी पानी पीना पक्का करने का बढ़िया तरीका। अपने लक्ष्य तक पहुँचने से बड़ी खुशी कोई नहीं! 😍🚰
t.id: Aplikasi benar-benar membantu memantau berapa banyak air yang diminum per hari. Sangat nyaman dan sederhana
t.it: Per ora mi stimola a bere 👍🏻
t.ja: 操作がとても簡単で続けやすいです。
t.ms: Aplikasi ini betul-betul membantu memantau jumlah air yang diminum sehari. Sangat selesa dan mudah
t.nb: En god måte å sørge for at jeg drikker nok vann hver dag. Det er ingenting mer tilfredsstillende enn å nå et mål! 😍🚰
t.nl: Echt handig, ik gebruik deze app bijna 1 maand
t.pl: Prosta w obsłudze aplikacja 👍 Przypomnienia, dzięki którym pilnuję ilości wypitej wody 😃 Polecam
t.pt_BR: Consigo controlar bem a quantidade de água consumida.
t.ru: Приложение реально помогает следить за тем, сколько воды пьёшь за день. Очень удобно и просто
t.sv: Ett bra sätt att se till att jag dricker tillräckligt med vatten varje dag. Det finns inget mer tillfredsställande än att nå ett mål! 😍🚰
t.tr: Her gün yeterince su içip içmediğimi takip etmek için harika. Hedefe ulaşmak çok tatmin edici.
t.vi: Một cách tuyệt vời để đảm bảo rằng tôi uống đủ nước mỗi ngày. Không có gì hài lòng hơn là đạt được mục tiêu của bạn! 😍🚰
t.zh_CN: 真不错的应用，希望开发者更全面点。

en: This is a great app. Keeps you on track. It also gives you updates on your goals for the day!!!
context:
Surface: Paywall / subscription screen — social-proof user-review card (rotating reviewTemp1..N pool shown above the price options).
Type: paragraph (social proof / fake testimonial)
Context: Short customer-style testimonial quoted on the paywall to build trust. Translate as natural first-person consumer praise; keep informal register, multi-sentence run-on style, and the casual triple-exclamation enthusiasm ("!!!") at the end as part of the testimonial voice.
Tone: testimonial / casual (mimics a user review).

t.da: Dette er en fantastisk app. Holder dig på rette spor. Den giver dig også en opdatering om dine mål for dagen!!!
t.de: Ich habe diese App gern und nutze sie schon mehr als 2 Jahre.
t.en: This is a great app. Keeps you on track. It also gives you updates on your goals for the day!!!
t.es: Me anima a beber agua y me lo recuerda varias veces al día
t.fr: Simple, clair et pratique rien d’autre à dire!
t.hi: यह बढ़िया ऐप है। तुम्हें ट्रैक पर रखता है। यह दिन भर तुम्हारे लक्ष्य की अपडेट भी देता है!!!
t.it: Bellissima applicazione, da quando la uso non dimentico mai di bere nell’arco della giornata ☺️
t.ja: 使い方もシンプルで通知も便利です。
t.ko: 물 마시는 양이 점점 늘어나서 좋아요
t.ms: Aplikasi terbaik, terutama kemas kini terbaharu 🔥
t.nb: Dette er en flott app. Holder deg på sporet. Det gir deg også oppdateringer om målene dine for dagen!!!
t.nl: Echt een super app. Had ik deze maar veel eerder ontdekt❗️
t.pl: Podoba mi się bardzo, jest prosta i pamięta o nawodnieniu 😁
t.pt_BR: Me ajuda muito a lembrar de beber água
t.ru: Отличное приложение, а последнее обновление вообще 🔥
t.sv: Det här är en bra app. Håller dig på rätt spår. Den ger dig också uppdateringar om dina mål för dagen!!!
t.tr: Harika bir uygulama, en son güncelleme daha da harika!
t.vi: Đây là một ứng dụng tuyệt vời. Nó giúp bạn đi đúng hướng. Ứng dụng cũng cung cấp cho bạn những thông tin cập nhật về mục tiêu của bạn trong ngày!!!

en: I like this app, bc it encourages me to drink. I love the motivational prompts.
context:
Surface: Paywall / subscription screen — social-proof user-review card (rotating reviewTemp1..N pool shown above the price options).
Type: paragraph (social proof / fake testimonial)
Context: Short customer-style testimonial quoted on the paywall to build trust. Translate as natural first-person consumer praise; preserve the informal "bc" abbreviation (for "because") as part of the casual testimonial register — substitute the locale-natural equivalent abbreviation when one exists, otherwise keep the casual short form.
Tone: testimonial / casual (mimics a user review).

t.ar: تطبيق رائع! يساعد على التحكم في كمية المياه التي تشربها. مريح للغاية.
t.da: Jeg kan lide denne app, fordi den tilskynder mig til at drikke. Jeg elsker de motiverende meddelelser
t.de: Die App hilft mir, mehr Wasser zu trinken. Ich liebe die motivierenden Erinnerungen.
t.en: I like this app, bc it encourages me to drink. I love the motivational prompts.
t.es: Una gran aplicación para llevar un buen control del agua que bebes.
t.fr: Cette application m’aide beaucoup à boire de l’eau tout au long de la journée. Sinon je ne bois jamais. Merci
t.hi: मुझे यह ऐप पसंद है, क्योंकि यह मुझे पानी पीने के लिए प्रेरित करता है। इसके मोटिवेशनल मैसेज मुझे बहुत पसंद हैं।
t.id: Aplikasi hebat! Membantu mengontrol jumlah air yang diminum hehe Sangat nyaman dong
t.it: App veramente utile. Bevevo poco durante il giorno e questa app mi ricorda di farlo.
t.ja: 飲むきっかけになるし、応援メッセージが気に入っています
t.ko: 물먹으라고 알람와서 잘 챙겨 마시고 있어요

t.nb: Jeg liker denne appen fordi den oppmuntrer meg til å drikke mer. Jeg elsker de motiverende meldingene.
t.nl: Goed voor als je te weinig drinkt of het vergeet!
t.pl: Polecam, nawet nie przypuszczałem, jak mało piję w ciągu dnia. Dzięki apce mogłem to zmienić

t.sv: Jag gillar den här appen eftersom den uppmuntrar mig att dricka mer. Jag älskar de motiverande meddelandena.
t.tr: Bu uygulamayı seviyorum; su içmemi hatırlatıp motive ediyor.
t.vi: Tôi thích ứng dụng này, vì nó khuyến khích tôi uống nước. Tôi thích những lời thúc đẩy mang tính động lực.
t.zh_CN: 值得购买，用了很多款提醒喝水的软件，这款是目前为止最棒的

"8.4k" is a marketing-rounded abbreviation for 8 400 reviews — keep the abbreviated "k" form when the locale supports it; otherwise use the locale's standard thousand abbreviation. Localize "reviews" with the appropriate noun form.

Context: Header for the section grouping fruit juices, smoothies, and soft drinks / soda in the drinks catalog.
Constraints: Keep short to fit a section header or category chip. "&" may be replaced with the locale's equivalent conjunction.

Surface: Add drink screen — beverage-category section header / tab title for the "water" category (still / sparkling water variants).

Context: Header for the section grouping plain and sparkling water variants in the drinks catalog.
Constraints: Keep short to fit a section header or category chip.

Constraints: Keep short to fit a section header or category chip.

Surface: Add drink screen — beverage-category section header / tab title for the "alcohol" category.

Constraints: Keep short to fit a section header or category chip.

Surface: Add drink screen — beverage-category section header / tab title for the "other" category.

en: Alcohol tracking is available only in Feed style
context:
Surface: Settings → App style screen (`AppStyleViewController`) — info alert message shown when the user tries to enable alcohol tracking while the home-screen style is set to Classic.
Type: error message (info alert body)
Context: Explains that the "alcohol tracking" feature requires the Feed home-screen style and is not available in Classic style. Paired with alert title `alcohol`. "Feed" is the name of the home-screen style — keep capitalized as a proper UI label.
Constraints: Single short sentence; ends with a period.

t.ar: تتبع الكحول متاح فقط في نمط «الموجز»
t.da: Alkoholsporing er kun tilgængelig i Feed-stil
t.de: Alkohol-Tracking ist nur im Feed-Stil verfügbar
t.en: Alcohol tracking is available only in Feed style
t.es: El seguimiento del alcohol solo está disponible en el estilo Feed
t.fr: Le suivi de l'alcool est disponible uniquement dans le style « Moderne »
t.hi: अल्कोहल ट्रैकिंग सिर्फ़ फ़ीड स्टाइल में उपलब्ध है
t.id: Pelacakan alkohol hanya tersedia di gaya Feed
t.it: Il monitoraggio dell'alcol è disponibile solo nello stile Feed.
t.ja: アルコールトラッキングはフィードスタイルでのみ利用できます
t.ko: 알코올 추적은 피드 스타일에서만 사용할 수 있어요
t.ms: Penjejakan alkohol hanya tersedia dalam gaya Feed.
t.nb: Sporing av alkohol er kun tilgjengelig i Feed-stilen
t.nl: Het bijhouden van alcohol is alleen beschikbaar in de Feed-stijl.
t.pl: Śledzenie alkoholu jest dostępne tylko w stylu Aktualności
t.pt_BR: O rastreamento de álcool está disponível apenas no estilo Feed.
t.ru: Отслеживание алкоголя доступно только в стиле «Лента».
t.sv: Alkoholspårning är endast tillgänglig i Flöde-stilen
t.vi: Theo dõi cồn chỉ khả dụng trong kiểu Bảng tin.
t.zh_CN: 酒精追踪仅在“信息流”样式下可用

context:
Surface: Settings → Create / edit drink (`CreateDrinkViewController`) — info popup title for the alcohol parameter; Drinks parameters cards — accessibility label prefix for the alcohol metric.
Type: card title / accessibility label
Context: Short noun phrase labeling the "alcohol by volume" parameter of a custom beverage. "Strength" here is ABV (alcohol content), not a generic intensity. Paired with `alcoholStrengthDescription` as the popup body.
Constraints: Keep short to fit a popup title.

en: Percentage of alcohol in this beverage. Set to 0[%] to exclude this beverage from alcohol tracking
context:
Surface: Settings → Create / edit drink (`CreateDrinkViewController`) — info popup body for the alcohol parameter, opened from the "i" / info button next to the alcohol slider.
Type: paragraph (info popup body)
Context: Explains what the alcohol parameter means (alcohol by volume percentage) and tells the user that setting 0% will exclude this beverage from the alcohol export / tracking. Paired with title `alcoholStrength`.
Constraints: Keep the "0%" numeric literal — it is a concrete threshold, not a placeholder.

t.ar: نسبة الكحول في هذا المشروب. اضبط القيمة على 0[%] لاستثناء هذا المشروب من تتبع الكحول
t.da: Procentdelen af alkohol i denne drik. Sæt til 0[%] for at udelade denne drik fra alkoholsporing
t.de: Alkoholgehalt dieses Getränks. Stell 0[%] ein, um dieses Getränk vom Alkohol-Tracking auszuschließen
t.en: Percentage of alcohol in this beverage. Set to 0[%] to exclude this beverage from alcohol tracking
t.es: Porcentaje de alcohol en esta bebida. Pon 0[%] para excluir esta bebida del seguimiento del alcohol
t.fr: Pourcentage d'alcool dans cette boisson. Mets 0[%] pour exclure cette boisson du suivi de l'alcool
t.hi: इस पेय में अल्कोहल का प्रतिशत। 0[%] सेट करने पर यह पेय अल्कोहल ट्रैकिंग में नहीं गिना जाएगा
t.id: Persentase alkohol dalam minuman ini. Atur ke 0[%] untuk mengecualikan minuman ini dari pelacakan alkohol
t.it: Percentuale di alcol in questa bevanda. Imposta 0[%] per escludere questa bevanda dal monitoraggio dell'alcol
t.ja: この飲み物のアルコール度数。アルコールトラッキングから除外するには0[%]に設定してください
t.ko: 이 음료의 알코올 함량 비율이에요. 알코올 추적에서 제외하려면 0[%]로 설정하세요
t.ms: Peratusan alkohol dalam minuman ini. Tetapkan kepada 0[%] untuk mengecualikan minuman ini daripada penjejakan alkohol
t.nb: Prosent alkohol i denne drikken. Sett til 0[%] for å utelate denne drikken fra alkoholsporing

t.ru: Процент содержания алкоголя в напитке. Установи 0[%], если не хочешь учитывать этот напиток в отслеживании алкоголя.
t.sv: Alkoholprocent i den här drycken. Ange 0[%] för att utesluta drycken från alkoholspårning
t.tr: İçeceğin alkol yüzdesi. Bu içeceği alkol takibinden çıkarmak için 0[%] olarak ayarla.
t.vi: Phần trăm cồn trong đồ uống này. Đặt thành 0[%] để loại đồ uống này khỏi theo dõi cồn
t.zh_CN: 此饮品中的酒精百分比。设为 0[%] 即可将此饮品从酒精追踪中排除

en: Drinks imported from Apple Health can't be edited in My Water. You can remove this drink from your statistics
context:
Surface: One-day statistics screen → drink detail / edit popup (EditAddedDrinkReadonlyInfoView) — informational card subtitle, shown when the selected drink was imported from Apple Health and therefore cannot be edited inside the app.
Type: paragraph
Context: Explains the read-only state — the drink record originated from Apple Health, so it can only be removed (deleted from statistics), not edited. "Apple Health" and "My Water" are product names — keep untranslated.

t.ar: لا يمكن تعديل المشروبات المستوردة من Apple Health داخل My Water. يمكنك إزالة هذا المشروب من إحصائياتك
t.da: Drikke importeret fra Apple Health kan ikke redigeres i Mit vand. Du kan fjerne denne drik fra din statistik
t.de: Aus Apple Health importierte Getränke können in My Water nicht bearbeitet werden. Du kannst dieses Getränk aus deinen Statistiken entfernen
t.en: Drinks imported from Apple Health can't be edited in My Water. You can remove this drink from your statistics
t.es: Las bebidas importadas desde Apple Health no se pueden editar en My Water. Puedes eliminar esta bebida de tus estadísticas
t.fr: Les boissons importées depuis Apple Health ne peuvent pas être modifiées dans My Water. Tu peux les supprimer de tes statistiques
t.hi: Apple Health से लिए गए पेय My Water में एडिट नहीं किए जा सकते। इस पेय को अपने स्टैटिस्टिक्स से हटा सकते हैं
t.id: Minuman yang diimpor dari Apple Health tidak dapat diedit di My Water. Kamu bisa menghapusnya dari statistikmu
t.it: Le bevande importate da Apple Health non possono essere modificate in My Water. Puoi rimuovere questa bevanda dalle tue statistiche
t.ja: Apple Healthから取り込んだ飲み物はMy Waterで編集できません。この飲み物は統計から削除できます
t.ko: Apple Health에서 가져온 음료는 My Water에서 수정할 수 없어요. 통계에서 이 음료를 삭제할 수 있어요
t.ms: Minuman yang diimport dari Apple Health tidak boleh diedit dalam My Water. Awak boleh keluarkan minuman ini daripada statistik awak
t.nb: Drikker importert fra Apple Health kan ikke redigeres i Mitt Vann. Du kan fjerne denne drikken fra statistikken
t.nl: Drankjes die zijn geïmporteerd uit Apple Health kunnen niet worden bewerkt in My Water. Je kunt dit drankje uit je statistieken verwijderen
t.pl: Napojów zaimportowanych z Apple Health nie można edytować w My Water. Możesz usunąć ten napój ze swoich statystyk
t.pt_BR: Bebidas importadas do Apple Health não podem ser editadas no My Water. Você pode remover esta bebida das suas estatísticas
t.ru: Напитки, импортированные из Apple Health, нельзя редактировать в приложении «Моя вода». Можно удалить этот напиток из своей статистики.
t.sv: Drycker som importerats från Apple Health kan inte redigeras i Mitt Vatten. Du kan ta bort den här drycken från din statistik
t.tr: Apple Health'ten alınan içecekler My Water'da düzenlenemez. Bu içeceği istatistiklerinden silebilirsin.
t.vi: Đồ uống nhập từ Apple Health không thể chỉnh sửa trong My Water. Bạn có thể xóa đồ uống này khỏi thống kê
t.zh_CN: 从 Apple Health 导入的饮品无法在 My Water 中编辑。你可以从统计中删除此饮品

context:
Surface: One-day statistics screen → drink detail / edit popup (EditAddedDrinkReadonlyInfoView) — informational card title, shown when the selected drink was imported from Apple Health.
Type: card title / heading
Context: Short header above the read-only explanation, labelling the drink as originating from Apple Health. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — keep untranslated.
Constraints: Keep short — single-line heading.

t.zh_CN: 来自 Apple Health 的饮品

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Apple Health setup screen — bullet item in the "not syncing" list (IntegrationSetupViewController.reloadPartialPermissionsBullets, iOS 15+ alcoholic beverages branch).
Type: list item
Context: One row in the bulleted list of share types not being exported to Apple Health. Refers to alcoholic-beverage records (HKQuantityTypeIdentifier.numberOfAlcoholicBeverages). Shown only on iOS 15+, where the alcoholic-beverages share type is available.
Constraints: Keep short — appears as a bullet item.

t.ja: アルコールのエクスポート

context:
Surface: "Choose beverage" screen — navigation title when used in the create-favorite-drink flow.
Type: screen title
Context: Noun. Used as the screen title when picking a beverage type for a new favorite drink. Distinct from "drinkType" which titles the same picker when editing an already-added drink entry.
Constraints: Keep short (single word).

en: Caffeine tracking is available only in Feed style
context:
Surface: Settings → App style screen — alert body shown when the user taps the info button on the caffeine-tracking row while a non-Feed Home screen style is selected (AppStyleViewController showCaffeineTrackingFeedOnlyAlert). Title of the alert is "Caffeine".
Type: alert body
Context: Explains that caffeine tracking widgets / surfaces only appear when the Feed Home screen style is active — prompting the user to switch styles if they want the feature. One short sentence ending with a period.
Constraints: Keep "Feed" capitalized as the proper name of the Home screen style (matches "feed" key).

t.ar: تتبع الكافيين متاح فقط في نمط «الموجز»
t.da: Koffeinsporing er kun tilgængelig i Feed-stil
t.de: Koffein-Tracking ist nur im Feed-Stil verfügbar
t.en: Caffeine tracking is available only in Feed style
t.es: El seguimiento de la cafeína solo está disponible en el estilo Feed
t.fr: Le suivi de la caféine est disponible uniquement dans le style « Moderne »
t.hi: कैफ़ीन ट्रैकिंग सिर्फ़ फ़ीड स्टाइल में उपलब्ध है
t.id: Pelacakan kafein hanya tersedia di gaya Feed
t.it: Il monitoraggio della caffeina è disponibile solo nello stile Feed.
t.ja: カフェイントラッキングはフィードスタイルでのみ利用できます
t.ko: 카페인 추적은 피드 스타일에서만 사용할 수 있어요

t.nb: Sporing av koffein er kun tilgjengelig i Feed-stilen

t.pt_BR: O rastreamento de cafeína está disponível apenas no estilo Feed.
t.ru: Отслеживание кофеина доступно только в стиле «Лента».
t.sv: Koffeinspårning är endast tillgänglig i Flöde-stilen
t.vi: Theo dõi caffeine chỉ khả dụng trong kiểu Bảng tin.
t.zh_CN: 咖啡因追踪仅在“信息流”样式下可用

context:
Surface: Main statistics screen — action label on the right side of the "Monthly statistic" section header that opens the month calendar view (MainStatViewModel). Has accessibility identifier A11y.Statistics.openCalendar.
Type: button label
Context: Noun. Names the calendar destination opened by tapping this header action — a monthly calendar of logged drinks. Distinct from the generic word "calendar" elsewhere.
Constraints: Keep short (single word). No trailing period.

Surface: Friend profile screen — confirmation alert title and destructive action button label shown when the user taps to withdraw a pending friend request they previously sent. Used both as the alert title and the action button title (paired with cancelFriendRequestConfirmation body).
Type: alert title / button label
Context: Imperative verb phrase meaning "withdraw / take back the friend request". Not a generic Cancel — refers specifically to revoking a pending outgoing request.
Constraints: Keep short to fit an alert button. No trailing period.

t.ja: 友達申請をキャンセル

en: Are you sure you want to cancel this friend request? The user will no longer see your pending request
context:
Surface: Friend profile screen — confirmation alert body shown when the user taps to withdraw a pending friend request they previously sent (paired with cancelFriendRequest title and action).
Type: alert body
Context: Two-sentence confirmation. First sentence asks for confirmation; second clarifies the consequence — the recipient will no longer see the pending request on their side after the action.
Constraints: Trailing period on the second sentence.

t.ar: هل تريد إلغاء طلب الصداقة هذا؟ لن يرى المستخدم طلبك المعلّق بعد الآن
t.da: Er du sikker på, at du vil annullere denne venneanmodning? Brugeren vil ikke længere se din afventende anmodning
t.de: Möchtest du diese Freundschaftsanfrage wirklich zurückziehen? Die Person sieht deine ausstehende Anfrage dann nicht mehr
t.en: Are you sure you want to cancel this friend request? The user will no longer see your pending request
t.es: ¿Seguro que quieres cancelar esta solicitud de amistad? La otra persona dejará de ver tu solicitud pendiente
t.fr: Veux-tu vraiment annuler cette demande d'ami ? L'utilisateur ne verra plus ta demande en attente
t.hi: क्या तुम इस फ्रेंड रिक्वेस्ट को रद्द करना चाहते हो? यूज़र को तुम्हारी पेंडिंग रिक्वेस्ट अब नहीं दिखेगी
t.id: Yakin ingin membatalkan permintaan teman ini? Pengguna tidak akan melihat permintaanmu yang tertunda lagi
t.it: Vuoi davvero annullare questa richiesta di amicizia? L'utente non vedrà più la tua richiesta in sospeso
t.ja: この友達申請をキャンセルしますか？相手の画面に申請は表示されなくなります
t.ko: 이 친구 요청을 취소할까요? 상대방은 더 이상 대기 중인 요청을 볼 수 없어요
t.ms: Adakah awak pasti mahu batalkan permintaan kawan ini? Pengguna tidak akan melihat permintaan tertunda awak lagi
t.nb: Er du sikker på at du vil trekke tilbake denne venneforespørselen? Brukeren vil ikke lenger se den ventende forespørselen
t.nl: Weet je zeker dat je dit vriendenverzoek wilt annuleren? De gebruiker zal je openstaande verzoek niet meer zien
t.pl: Na pewno anulować to zaproszenie do znajomych? Użytkownik nie będzie już widział oczekującego zaproszenia
t.pt_BR: Tem certeza de que quer cancelar este pedido de amizade? O usuário não verá mais seu pedido pendente
t.ru: Отменить заявку в друзья? Пользователь больше не увидит её.
t.sv: Är du säker på att du vill avbryta den här vänförfrågan? Användaren ser då inte längre din väntande förfrågan
t.tr: Bu arkadaşlık isteğini iptal etmek istediğine emin misin? Kullanıcı bekleyen isteğini artık görmeyecek
t.vi: Bạn có chắc muốn hủy lời mời kết bạn này? Người dùng sẽ không còn thấy lời mời đang chờ của bạn
t.zh_CN: 确定要取消此好友请求吗？对方将不再看到这条待处理的请求

context:
Surface: Characters picker screen — section header for the curated "Popular" mascots group, shown above the per-category sections (Characters / Figures and objects / Animals / Plants).
Type: section header
Context: Groups the most-used / featured mascot characters at the top of the picker so the user finds them first.
Constraints: Keep short.

Surface: Settings → App style screen — segmented option for character fill style ("Fill character by colors" row). Paired with characterFillStyleColored.
Type: segmented control option / setting value
Context: Label for the "Classic" fill style — the mascot is drawn as a single-color (monochrome) silhouette that fills upward as the user drinks toward the daily goal. Opposite of the "Colored" option, which uses multi-color artwork.
Constraints: Keep short (1 word); fits inside a segmented control.

Surface: Settings → App style screen — segmented option for character fill style ("Fill character by colors" row). Paired with characterFillStyleClassic.
Type: segmented control option / setting value
Context: Label for the "Colored" fill style — the mascot is drawn with its full multi-color artwork, and the colored fill rises with hydration progress. Opposite of the "Classic" (monochrome silhouette) option.
Constraints: Keep short (1 word); fits inside a segmented control.

en: Quickly log a drink to your daily intake
context:
Surface: iOS 18 Control Center "Add a drink" Control Widget — gallery / configuration description shown by the system.
Type: paragraph (system gallery description)
Context: System-rendered description for the AppIntent-backed Control Widget that quickly logs a drink (AddDrinkControlIntent, AddDrinkControlWidget).

t.ar: أضف مشروبًا بسرعة إلى كميتك اليومية
t.da: Tilføj hurtigt en drik til dit daglige indtag

t.es: Añade rápidamente una bebida a tu ingesta diaria
t.fr: Ajoute rapidement une boisson à ta consommation quotidienne
t.it: Aggiungi rapidamente una bevanda al consumo giornaliero

t.nb: Legg raskt til en drikk i dagens inntak
t.nl: Voeg snel een drankje toe aan je dagelijkse inname
t.pl: Szybko dodaj napój do dziennego spożycia
t.pt_BR: Adicionar rapidamente uma bebida à sua ingestão diária
t.sv: Lägg snabbt till en dryck i ditt dagliga intag
t.tr: Günlük hedefine hızlıca bir içecek ekle
t.vi: Nhanh chóng thêm đồ uống vào lượng nước hằng ngày

context:
Surface: iOS 18 Control Center "Add a drink" Control Widget — AppIntent parameter label for the drink picker (also used as the DrinkPickerEntity type display name).
Type: parameter label
Context: Noun. Label for the parameter that selects which beverage will be logged when the Control Widget is tapped.
Constraints: Keep short (single word).

Surface: iOS 18 Control Center "Add a drink" Control Widget — gallery title and AppIntent title (also used by the watchOS quick-add AppIntent).
Type: widget gallery title
Context: Imperative verb phrase. Title for the Control Widget / AppIntent that logs a drink.
Constraints: Keep short to fit the Control Center widget label.

Surface: Control Widget / Live Activity AppIntents — internal AppIntent parameter label for the drink-tag identifier.
Type: parameter label
Context: Label for the integer drink-tag parameter that identifies which beverage to log. Internal AppIntent metadata, not visible in typical user flows but may surface in Shortcuts / system editors.

Surface: iOS 18+ Control Center "Glass of water" Control Widget — gallery description shown under the title (AddGlassWaterControlWidget).
Type: control description
Context: Imperative one-sentence description for the Control Widget that logs a single glass of water with one tap. Pairs with the "controlGlassWaterTitle" title.
Constraints: Keep concise (≤ ~40 chars). Trailing period.

Surface: iOS 18+ / watchOS Control Center "Glass of water" Control Widget — gallery / button title, Control Widget display name, and AddGlassWaterControlIntent title.
Type: control title
Context: Short noun phrase naming the quick-add control: a single glass of water. LiveActivityIntent conformance is routing only; this is not the Hydration Live Activity quick-add title.
Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~15 chars) for the Control Center tile. No trailing period.

Surface: Live Activity quick-add AppIntent — internal AppIntent title (AddDrinkLiveActivityIntent).
Type: widget gallery title
Context: Title of the non-discoverable Live Activity AppIntent that logs a drink from the hydration Live Activity. "(Live Activity)" suffix disambiguates it from the Control Widget intent in Shortcuts / system editors.
Constraints: Preserve the "(Live Activity)" disambiguation parenthetical.

Surface: iOS 18+ / watchOS Control Widget — description of the "Open statistics" control (OpenStatisticsControlWidget / OpenStatisticsControlIntent).
Type: control description
Context: Description shown for the "Open statistics" Control Center control: tapping it opens the app on the hydration statistics screen. Short imperative sentence.
Constraints: Keep short (≤ ~40 chars).

t.ja: 水分摂取の統計を開く

context:
Surface: iOS 18+ / watchOS Control Widget — title of the "Open statistics" control (OpenStatisticsControlWidget / OpenStatisticsControlIntent).
Type: control title
Context: Title shown for the "Open statistics" Control Center control. Single-word noun naming the destination screen.
Constraints: Keep very short (≤ ~15 chars) for the Control Center tile.

Surface: Home / Lock screen widget AppIntent (AddDrinkHomeWidgetIntent) and Live Activity AppIntent (AddDrinkLiveActivityIntent) — internal `@Parameter` label for the drink volume value shown in Shortcuts / system editors.
Type: parameter label
Context: Noun. Label for the drink-size / volume parameter (`size: Double`) on the quick-add AppIntents. Refers to the amount poured per tap; not visible during normal widget use, surfaces only in Shortcuts.
Constraints: Keep very short (single word). No trailing period.

Surface: Home / Lock screen widget AppIntent (AddDrinkHomeWidgetIntent) — internal `@Parameter` label for the widget family identifier passed by WidgetKit, shown in Shortcuts / system editors.
Type: parameter label
Context: Noun phrase. Label for the WidgetFamily parameter that records which widget size triggered the quick-add (small / medium / large). Internal metadata, not visible during normal widget use.
Constraints: Keep short (1-2 words). No trailing period.

Surface: Settings → Daily goal — destructive action button label in the "apply new daily goal" choice alert (UIViewController+DailyGoalApplyScopeAlert).
Type: alert button label
Context: Choice that applies the new daily goal retroactively, recalculating completion percentages for all past days as well as future ones. Paired with "dailyGoalApplyScopeCurrentDay" (today-only) and "dailyGoalApplyScopeMessage" (alert body). Rendered as the destructive button to signal the wider impact.
Constraints: Keep short to fit an alert button. No trailing period.

t.hi: सभी दिनों के लिए दोबारा गिनो
t.nb: Regn ut alle dager på nytt
t.vi: Tính lại tất cả các ngày

context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — default action button label in the "apply new daily goal" choice alert (UIViewController+DailyGoalApplyScopeAlert).
Type: alert button label
Context: Choice that applies the new daily goal only from today onward, leaving past days with their original goals. Paired with "dailyGoalApplyScopeAllTime" (recalculate all) and "dailyGoalApplyScopeMessage" (alert body).
Constraints: Keep short to fit an alert button. No trailing period.

en: Apply the new daily goal from today only, or recalculate all previous days too?
context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — body text of the choice alert shown when the user changes their daily goal value (UIViewController+DailyGoalApplyScopeAlert). Paired with "dailyGoalApplyScopeCurrentDay" / "dailyGoalApplyScopeAllTime" action buttons and a Cancel.
Type: alert body
Context: Asks the user whether the new daily goal should apply only from today (leaving past days untouched) or also recalculate completion for all previous days. Single question sentence ending with "?".
Constraints: One sentence; ends with "?".

t.ar: هل تطبق الهدف اليومي الجديد من اليوم فقط، أم تعيد حساب جميع الأيام السابقة أيضًا؟
t.da: Skal det nye daglige mål kun gælde fra i dag, eller skal alle tidligere dage også beregnes igen?
t.de: Soll das neue Tagesziel nur ab heute angewendet oder auch für alle vergangenen Tage neu berechnet werden?
t.en: Apply the new daily goal from today only, or recalculate all previous days too?
t.es: ¿Aplicar la nueva meta diaria solo desde hoy o recalcular también los días anteriores?
t.fr: Appliquer le nouvel objectif quotidien à partir d'aujourd'hui seulement, ou recalculer aussi tous les jours précédents ?
t.hi: नया दैनिक लक्ष्य सिर्फ़ आज से लागू करना है या पिछले सभी दिनों के लिए भी दोबारा गिनना है?
t.id: Terapkan target harian baru mulai hari ini saja, atau hitung ulang semua hari sebelumnya juga?
t.it: Applicare il nuovo obiettivo giornaliero solo da oggi o ricalcolare anche tutti i giorni precedenti?
t.ja: 新しい1日の目標を今日から適用しますか？それとも過去のすべての日も再計算しますか？
t.ko: 새로운 일일 목표를 오늘부터만 적용할까요, 아니면 이전 날짜도 다시 계산할까요?
t.ms: Gunakan matlamat harian baharu hanya dari hari ini, atau kira semula hari sebelumnya juga?
t.nb: Vil du bruke det nye daglige målet kun fra i dag, eller også regne om alle tidligere dager?
t.nl: Het nieuwe dagelijkse doel alleen vanaf vandaag toepassen, of ook alle voorgaande dagen herberekenen?
t.pl: Zastosować nowy dzienny cel tylko od dziś, czy przeliczyć też wszystkie poprzednie dni?
t.pt_BR: Aplicar a nova meta diária apenas a partir de hoje ou recalcular também todos os dias anteriores?
t.ru: Применить новую дневную цель только с сегодняшнего дня или пересчитать также все предыдущие дни?
t.sv: Vill du tillämpa det nya dagliga målet endast från idag, eller räkna om alla tidigare dagar också?
t.tr: Yeni günlük hedef yalnızca bugünden mi geçerli olsun, yoksa geçmiş günler de yeniden hesaplansın mı?
t.vi: Áp dụng mục tiêu hằng ngày mới chỉ từ hôm nay, hay tính lại cho cả những ngày trước?
t.zh_CN: 新的每日目标仅从今天开始应用，还是同时重新计算之前所有日期？

context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal — title of the "Daily goal history" button under the goal value, and screen title / accessibility label of the table picker that lists past daily goal entries. Also used as the accessibility label for the goal-history button on the beverage detail statistics screen.
Type: screen title / button label / accessibility label
Context: Opens / titles the screen that lists past daily goal values the user had over time (each entry is a date + goal amount).
Constraints: Keep short to fit a button label.

t.vi: Lịch sử mục tiêu hằng ngày

context:
Surface: Settings → main list — row title for the "End of day" entry that opens the time-of-day picker controlling when one logged day rolls over into the next. Also used as the title of that picker screen.
Type: settings row title / screen title
Context: Noun phrase. Labels the user-configurable day boundary — the hour after midnight at which the app starts counting drinks toward the next day (e.g. someone going to bed at 2 AM still wants those drinks counted as "today"). Distinct from the legacy "dayEnd" key with the same value but no longer used in code.
Constraints: Keep short to fit a single-line settings row title.

en: Applies to new drinks only. Past entries keep their original day.
context:
Surface: Settings → "End of day" picker — subtitle shown under the picker title explaining what the day boundary change affects.
Type: paragraph (hint)
Context: Reassures the user that changing the day boundary does not retroactively move past drinks between days — only newly added drinks use the new boundary; already-logged entries keep the day they were originally saved to.

t.ar: ينطبق على المشروبات الجديدة فقط. تحتفظ السجلات السابقة بيومها الأصلي.
t.da: Gælder kun for nye drikke. Tidligere registreringer beholder deres oprindelige dag.
t.de: Gilt nur für neue Getränke. Frühere Einträge behalten ihren ursprünglichen Tag.
t.en: Applies to new drinks only. Past entries keep their original day.
t.es: Se aplica solo a las nuevas bebidas. Las anteriores mantienen su día original.
t.fr: S'applique uniquement aux nouvelles boissons. Les anciennes entrées gardent leur jour d'origine.
t.hi: सिर्फ़ नए पेय पर लागू होता है। पुरानी एंट्री अपने मूल दिन पर रहती हैं।
t.id: Hanya berlaku untuk minuman baru. Entri lama tetap di hari aslinya.
t.it: Si applica solo alle nuove bevande. Le voci passate mantengono il loro giorno originale.
t.ja: 新しい飲み物にのみ適用されます。過去の記録は元の日付のまま保持されます。
t.ko: 새로 추가하는 음료에만 적용돼요. 기존 기록은 원래 날짜를 유지해요.
t.ms: Berkuat kuasa untuk minuman baharu sahaja. Catatan lama kekal pada hari asal.
t.nb: Gjelder kun nye drikker. Tidligere oppføringer beholder den opprinnelige dagen.
t.nl: Geldt alleen voor nieuwe drankjes. Eerdere invoer behoudt de oorspronkelijke dag.
t.pl: Dotyczy tylko nowych napojów. Wcześniejsze wpisy zachowują swój pierwotny dzień.
t.pt_BR: Aplica-se apenas às novas bebidas. Os registros anteriores mantêm o dia original.
t.ru: Применяется только к новым напиткам. Старые записи сохраняют исходный день.
t.sv: Gäller endast nya drycker. Tidigare poster behåller sin ursprungliga dag.
t.tr: Yalnızca yeni içeceklere uygulanır. Geçmiş kayıtlar kendi günlerini korur.
t.vi: Chỉ áp dụng cho đồ uống mới. Các mục đã ghi vẫn giữ ngày ban đầu.
t.zh_CN: 仅对新饮品生效。已有记录保留原本所属日期。

context:
Surface: Settings → Notifications → Notifications schedule — row title that opens the weekday picker, and screen title of that picker. Selects the days of week on which reminder notifications fire.
Type: settings row title / screen title
Context: Noun phrase. Labels the configurable set of weekdays (Mon–Sun) when reminder notifications are active.
Constraints: Keep short to fit a row title.

en: Delete this daily goal from history?
context:
Surface: Settings → Daily goal → Daily goal history picker — confirmation alert body shown after the user taps the destructive (delete) action on a single past goal entry.
Type: error message (confirmation alert body)
Context: Asks the user to confirm permanent deletion of one historical daily goal entry. Paired with the "Delete" / "Cancel" alert buttons.

t.ar: حذف هذا الهدف اليومي من السجل؟
t.da: Slet dette daglige mål fra historikken?
t.de: Dieses Tagesziel aus dem Verlauf löschen?

t.fr: Supprimer cet objectif quotidien de l'historique ?
t.hi: इतिहास से इस दैनिक लक्ष्य को हटाओ?
t.id: Hapus target harian ini dari riwayat?
t.it: Eliminare questo obiettivo giornaliero dalla cronologia?
t.ja: この1日の目標を履歴から削除しますか？
