context:
Surface: Settings screen — row title for the cross-promotion entry point that opens the studio's other apps (App Store listing / promo screen).
Type: settings row title
Context: Header / row title introducing the studio's other apps as a cross-promotion. "Our" = the studio's, framing the studio as a partner ("we" / "our app"). Pairs with installOtherLabel on the destination promo screen.
Constraints: Keep short to fit a settings row.

t.vi: Những ứng dụng khác của chúng tôi

en: Fitbit did not grant nutrition access. Reconnect Fitbit and allow nutrition permission.
context:
Surface: Fitbit integration — error shown when Fitbit was connected but the nutrition permission was not granted.
Type: error message
Context: Tells the user Fitbit did not grant nutrition access and instructs them to reconnect Fitbit and allow the nutrition permission. Two sentences: problem, then recovery action.
Tone: direct, with a recovery instruction.

t.ar: لم يمنح Fitbit صلاحية الوصول إلى التغذية. أعد ربط Fitbit واسمح بصلاحية التغذية
t.da: Fitbit gav ikke adgang til ernæring. Tilslut Fitbit igen, og giv tilladelse til ernæring.
t.de: Fitbit hat keinen Zugriff auf Ernährungsdaten gewährt. Verbinde Fitbit erneut und erlaube den Zugriff.
t.en: Fitbit did not grant nutrition access. Reconnect Fitbit and allow nutrition permission.
t.es: Fitbit no concedió acceso a nutrición. Vuelve a conectar Fitbit y permite el permiso de nutrición.
t.fr: Fitbit n'a pas accordé l'accès à la nutrition. Reconnectez Fitbit et autorisez l'accès à la nutrition.
t.hi: Fitbit ने न्यूट्रिशन एक्सेस नहीं दिया। Fitbit को फिर से कनेक्ट करो और न्यूट्रिशन परमिशन दो।
t.id: Fitbit tidak memberikan akses nutrisi. Hubungkan kembali Fitbit dan izinkan akses nutrisi.
t.it: Fitbit non ha concesso l'accesso alla nutrizione. Riconnetti Fitbit e consenti l'autorizzazione per la nutrizione.
t.ja: Fitbitから栄養情報へのアクセスが許可されませんでした。Fitbitを再接続して栄養情報の権限を許可してください。
t.ko: Fitbit이 영양 정보 접근 권한을 부여하지 않았어요. Fitbit을 다시 연결하고 영양 정보 권한을 허용해 주세요.
t.ms: Fitbit tidak memberikan akses pemakanan. Sambung semula Fitbit dan benarkan kebenaran pemakanan.
t.nb: Fitbit ga ikke tilgang til ernæring. Koble til Fitbit på nytt og tillat ernæringstilgang
t.nl: Fitbit verleende geen toegang tot voedingsgegevens. Verbind Fitbit opnieuw en sta toegang tot voedingsgegevens toe.
t.pl: Fitbit nie udzielił dostępu do informacji o odżywianiu. Połącz Fitbit ponownie i zezwól na uprawnienie do informacji o odżywianiu.
t.pt_BR: O Fitbit não concedeu acesso à nutrição. Reconecte o Fitbit e permita o acesso à nutrição.
t.ru: Fitbit не предоставил доступ к данным о питании. Переподключи Fitbit и разреши доступ к питанию.
t.sv: Fitbit beviljade inte tillgång till nutrition. Återanslut Fitbit och tillåt behörighet för nutrition.
t.tr: Fitbit beslenme erişimi vermedi. Fitbit'i yeniden bağla ve beslenme iznini ver.
t.vi: Fitbit không cấp quyền truy cập dinh dưỡng. Hãy kết nối lại Fitbit và cho phép quyền dinh dưỡng.
t.zh_CN: Fitbit 未授予营养数据权限。请重新连接 Fitbit 并允许营养数据访问。

en: Could not disconnect Fitbit. Check your connection and try again.
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Fitbit disconnect alert — shown when the app cannot revoke Fitbit OAuth tokens while disconnecting.
Type: alert body
Context: The integration remains connected locally because server-side revoke did not succeed.

t.ar: تعذّر فصل Fitbit. تحقق من اتصالك وحاول مرة أخرى
t.da: Kunne ikke afbryde Fitbit. Tjek din forbindelse, og prøv igen.
t.de: Fitbit konnte nicht getrennt werden. Überprüfe deine Verbindung und versuche es erneut.
t.en: Could not disconnect Fitbit. Check your connection and try again.
t.es: No se pudo desconectar Fitbit. Comprueba tu conexión e inténtalo de nuevo.
t.fr: Impossible de déconnecter Fitbit. Vérifiez votre connexion et réessayez.
t.hi: Fitbit डिस्कनेक्ट नहीं हो सका। अपना कनेक्शन जाँचो और फिर से कोशिश करो।
t.id: Tidak dapat memutuskan Fitbit. Periksa koneksimu dan coba lagi.
t.it: Impossibile disconnettere Fitbit. Controlla la connessione e riprova.
t.ja: Fitbitを切断できませんでした。接続を確認してもう一度お試しください。
t.ko: Fitbit 연결을 해제할 수 없어요. 연결 상태를 확인하고 다시 시도해 주세요.
t.ms: Tidak dapat memutuskan sambungan Fitbit. Semak sambungan awak dan cuba lagi.
t.nb: Kunne ikke koble fra Fitbit. Sjekk tilkoblingen og prøv igjen
t.nl: Kan Fitbit niet ontkoppelen. Controleer je verbinding en probeer het opnieuw.
t.pl: Nie udało się rozłączyć z Fitbit. Sprawdź połączenie i spróbuj ponownie.
t.pt_BR: Não foi possível desconectar o Fitbit. Verifique sua conexão e tente de novo.
t.ru: Не удалось отключить Fitbit. Проверь подключение и попробуй снова.
t.sv: Kunde inte koppla från Fitbit. Kontrollera din anslutning och försök igen.
t.tr: Fitbit bağlantısı kesilemedi. Bağlantını kontrol edip tekrar dene.
t.vi: Không thể ngắt kết nối Fitbit. Hãy kiểm tra kết nối và thử lại
t.zh_CN: 无法断开 Fitbit。请检查网络连接后重试。

context:
Surface: Main (Home) screen — tag pill at the very bottom of the scrolling list, below the users-count row (MainViewController.customizePillRow). Tapping it opens the App style settings screen (AppStyleViewController) in the current tab.
Type: pill / tag button title
Context: Compact entry point inviting the user to personalize the Home screen layout and appearance. Single verb, imperative.
Constraints: Keep very short to fit a compact pill on narrow screens (≤ ~12 chars).

Surface: Settings screen — section header above the beverages group (beverages catalog, favorite drinks, default volumes).
Type: section header
Context: Groups everything related to drinks configuration. Single noun. Intentionally the same English word as the "beverages" catalog row title inside this section, but a separate key — section header is a distinct surface and translations may diverge per language.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤15 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

Surface: Settings screen — section header above the appearance group (app style, color scheme, main-screen character, add-drink sound).
Type: section header
Context: Groups visual customization options. Single noun.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤20 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

Surface: Settings screen — section header above the general group (language, units of measure, end of day, integrations).
Type: section header
Context: Groups general app configuration. Single noun, generic catch-all label.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤20 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

Surface: Settings screen — section header above the about/support group (rate app, suggest feature, write to us, share app, social links).
Type: section header
Context: Groups app info, feedback and support entry points. Short noun phrase.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤30 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

Surface: App Style screen — section header above the classic/feed style cards.
Type: section header
Context: Groups the main visual style switch (classic vs feed). Short noun phrase. Intentionally the same English text as the "appStyle" row title on the Settings screen, but a separate key — section header is a distinct surface and translations may diverge per language.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤20 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

Surface: App Style screen — section header above the appearance group (fill character by color, volume display, Live Activity).
Type: section header
Context: Groups how hydration is visually presented across the app. Single noun. Intentionally the same English word as the Settings-screen "settingsSectionAppearance" header, but a separate key — section header is a distinct surface and translations may diverge per language.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤20 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

Surface: App Style screen — section header above the tracking group (caffeine, alcohol, sugar).
Type: section header
Context: Groups optional nutrient/substance tracking toggles. Single noun.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤20 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

Surface: Settings → Notifications popup — section header above the appearance group (notification texts source + show progress toggle).
Type: section header
Context: Groups how reminder notifications are visually presented — text source (Default / motivating / custom) and whether the progress bar is shown inside the push payload. Distinct from `settingsSectionAppearance` / `appStyleSectionAppearance` headers — different surface, translation may diverge per language.
Constraints: Section header — keep concise (≤20 chars) to fit one line on narrow screens.

en: No drinks in this category yet. Drag a drink here to add it
context:
Surface: Drink parameters (Beverages) screen — placeholder shown on the dashed plate inside an empty drink category section (all of its drinks were hidden or dragged into other categories).
Type: empty state
Context: Reassures the user the empty section is intentional, not a bug, and explains how to fill it — by dragging a drink into this category. Shown beneath the category header.
Constraints: Keep concise to fit two short lines on small iPhones.

t.ar: لا توجد مشروبات في هذه الفئة بعد. اسحب مشروبًا إلى هنا لإضافته
t.da: Ingen drikke i denne kategori endnu. Træk en drik herhen for at tilføje den
t.de: In dieser Kategorie sind noch keine Getränke. Ziehe ein Getränk hierher, um es hinzuzufügen
t.en: No drinks in this category yet. Drag a drink here to add it
t.es: Aún no hay bebidas en esta categoría. Arrastra una bebida aquí para añadirla
t.fr: Aucune boisson dans cette catégorie pour le moment. Fais glisser une boisson ici pour l'ajouter
t.hi: इस कैटेगरी में अभी कोई पेय नहीं है। यहाँ कोई पेय खींचकर लाओ

t.nl: Nog geen drankjes in deze categorie. Sleep een drankje hierheen om het toe te voegen
t.pl: W tej kategorii nie ma jeszcze napojów. Przeciągnij tutaj napój, aby go dodać

context:
Surface: Settings → Notifications → Live Activity mode picker — option row label for the "always on" mode. Sibling options: "While notified" / "Off".
Type: picker option
Context: Live Activity continuously visible while hydration reminders are enabled; the app does not auto-dismiss it.

Surface: Settings → Notifications → Live Activity mode picker — option row label for the "only while a drink reminder is active" mode. Sibling options: "Always" / "Off".
Type: picker option
Context: Live Activity appears while an active drink reminder is showing and is dismissed when the reminder ends.

Surface: Settings → Notifications → Live Activity mode picker — option row label for the "never show" mode. Sibling options: "Always" / "While notified".
Type: picker option
Context: Live Activity is never shown.

en: Live Activities are turned off. Please turn them back on in Settings.
context:
Surface: Live Activity feature — error shown when the user tries to use a Live Activity while the system permission is off.
Type: error message
Context: Tells the user Live Activities are turned off and to re-enable them in Settings. Problem, then recovery action.
Tone: direct, with a recovery instruction.

t.ar: الأنشطة المباشرة معطّلة. يرجى تفعيلها من الإعدادات.
t.da: Live Activities er slået fra. Slå dem til igen i Indstillinger.
t.de: Live-Aktivitäten sind ausgeschaltet. Bitte aktiviere sie wieder in den Einstellungen.
t.en: Live Activities are turned off. Please turn them back on in Settings.
t.es: Las Live Activities están desactivadas. Vuelve a activarlas en Ajustes.
t.fr: Les Activités en direct sont désactivées. Réactive-les dans les Réglages.
t.hi: Live Activities बंद हैं। इन्हें सेटिंग्स में दोबारा चालू करो।
t.id: Live Activity dinonaktifkan. Aktifkan kembali di Pengaturan.
t.it: Le Live Activity sono disattivate. Riattivale nelle Impostazioni.
t.ja: ライブアクティビティがオフになっています。設定からオンに戻してください。
t.ko: 실시간 활동이 꺼져 있어요. 설정에서 다시 켜 주세요.
t.ms: Live Activities dimatikan. Sila hidupkannya semula dalam Tetapan.
t.nb: Live Activities er slått av. Slå dem på igjen i Innstillinger.
t.nl: Live Activities zijn uitgeschakeld. Schakel ze opnieuw in via Instellingen.
t.pl: Aktywności na żywo są wyłączone. Włącz je ponownie w Ustawieniach.
t.pt_BR: As Live Activities estão desativadas. Ative de novo nas Configurações.
t.ru: Эфир активности отключён. Включи его снова в Настройках.
t.sv: Live Activities är avstängda. Slå på dem igen i Inställningar.
t.tr: Canlı Etkinlikler kapalı. Lütfen Ayarlar'dan yeniden açın.
t.vi: Live Activity đang tắt. Vui lòng bật lại trong Cài đặt.
t.zh_CN: 实时活动已关闭。请在“设置”中重新开启。

context:
Surface: Settings → Notifications screen — group header above the reminder window start/end time, reminder interval and days-of-week rows (NotificationsPopupIntervalsViewController).
Type: settings section header
Context: Names the group of settings that define WHEN reminders are sent (time window, interval, weekdays). Short noun phrase, sentence case.

Surface: Settings → Notifications screen — group header above the sound, notification texts and show-progress rows (NotificationsPopupIntervalsViewController).
Type: settings section header
Context: Names the group of settings that define WHAT a reminder notification looks/sounds like (sound, text source, progress). Short noun phrase, sentence case.

Surface: Settings → Notifications screen — group header above the "skip after a recent drink" and "after reaching the goal" rows (NotificationsPopupIntervalsViewController).
Type: settings section header
Context: Names the group of behavioural rules that automatically suppress or continue reminders based on the user's recent activity. Short noun phrase, sentence case.

Surface: Statistics → Beverage detail → Highlights grid, tile title for the most-frequent portion size of this beverage.
Type: section header
Context: Title above the user's most often chosen single-serving size for this drink (e.g. "Favorite volume" with "250 ml" below). Noun phrase, sentence case.
Constraints: Keep short (1-3 words) to fit a compact highlights tile.

Surface: Statistics → Beverage detail → Highlights grid, tile subtitle under the Favorite volume value.
Type: label
Context: Small caption that clarifies the displayed volume is the user's most frequently chosen single-serving size for this beverage (e.g. "most often" under "250 ml"). Sentence case, no period.
Constraints: Keep very short (1-3 words) — appears as a small subtitle line.

Surface: Statistics → Beverage detail → shared placeholder shown in highlight tiles (Best day), time-of-day cells (Morning/Day/Evening/Night percent and volume), Yesterday/previous-period total card and trend pill when the selected period has no logged drinks of this beverage.
Type: label (empty state)
Context: Replaces an em-dash (—) as a friendlier "nothing to show" stand-in. Used in compact stat tiles and inline pills, so the label must stay very short to avoid truncation. Sentence case, no period.
Constraints: Keep extremely short (≤ ~10 chars) — must fit a small stat tile. Single sentence — no trailing period.

Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer — primary CTA button that starts the full re-sync.
Type: button label
Context: Action that re-uploads all the user's drink history to Apple Health. Sibling of the appleHealthResync* family.
Constraints: Keep short; no trailing period.

t.hi: सारा डेटा फिर से सिंक करो
t.vi: Đồng bộ lại tất cả dữ liệu

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Apple Health setup screen — confirmation alert title shown after the user taps the "Re-sync all data" button.
Type: alert title
Context: Asks the user to confirm starting a bulk re-export of all drinks to Apple Health. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — do not translate.

t.hi: Apple Health के साथ फिर से सिंक करो?
t.ja: Apple Healthに再同期しますか？
t.nb: Synkronisere til Apple Health på nytt?
t.pt_BR: Sincronizar com o Apple Health novamente?
t.tr: Apple Health ile yeniden senkronize edilsin mi?
t.vi: Đồng bộ lại với Apple Health?

en: This will upload every drink from My Water to Apple Health. Duplicates won't be created
context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Apple Health setup screen — confirmation alert body shown after the user taps the "Re-sync all data" button.
Type: alert message / paragraph
Context: Reassures the user that this won't create duplicates — the app deduplicates against samples already present in Apple Health. "My Water" and "Apple Health" are product names — do not translate.
Constraints: ≤ 2 sentences for a system alert.

t.ar: سيتم رفع جميع المشروبات من My Water إلى Apple Health. لن يتم إنشاء نسخ مكررة
t.da: Dette uploader alle drikke fra Mit vand til Apple Health. Der oprettes ingen dubletter
t.de: Alle Getränke aus My Water werden zu Apple Health hochgeladen. Es entstehen keine Duplikate
t.en: This will upload every drink from My Water to Apple Health. Duplicates won't be created
t.es: Todas las bebidas de My Water se subirán a Apple Health. No se crearán duplicados
t.fr: Toutes les boissons de My Water seront envoyées vers Apple Health. Aucun doublon ne sera créé
t.hi: इससे My Water के सभी पेय Apple Health में अपलोड हो जाएँगे। डुप्लिकेट नहीं बनेंगे
t.id: Ini akan mengunggah setiap minuman dari My Water ke Apple Health. Duplikat tidak akan dibuat
t.it: Tutte le bevande di My Water verranno caricate su Apple Health. Non verranno creati duplicati
t.ja: My Waterのすべての飲み物をApple Healthにアップロードします。重複は作成されません
t.ko: My Water의 모든 음료를 Apple Health에 업로드해요. 중복은 생성되지 않아요
t.ms: Ini akan memuat naik setiap minuman dari My Water ke Apple Health. Pendua tidak akan dicipta
t.nb: Dette vil laste opp alle drikker fra Mitt Vann til Apple Health. Duplikater blir ikke opprettet
t.nl: Hiermee worden alle drankjes uit My Water naar Apple Health geüpload. Er worden geen duplicaten gemaakt
t.pl: Wszystkie napoje z My Water zostaną przesłane do Apple Health. Duplikaty nie zostaną utworzone
t.pt_BR: Isso vai enviar todas as bebidas do My Water para o Apple Health. Não serão criadas duplicatas
t.ru: Все напитки из приложения «Моя вода» будут загружены в Apple Health. Дубликаты не появятся
t.sv: Alla drycker från Mitt Vatten laddas upp till Apple Health. Inga dubbletter skapas
t.tr: Bu işlem My Water'daki tüm içecekleri Apple Health'e yükler. Mükerrer kayıt oluşmaz
t.vi: Tất cả đồ uống từ My Water sẽ được tải lên Apple Health. Sẽ không tạo bản trùng
t.zh_CN: 这会将 My Water 中的所有饮品上传到 Apple Health。不会产生重复记录

context:
Surface: Settings → Integrations → Apple Health setup screen — confirmation alert primary action.
Type: button label
Context: Confirms starting the bulk re-export. Pairs with the generic "cancel" key.
Constraints: Keep short — alert action.

Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — large title shown at the top of the modal while the bulk export is in progress.
Type: drawer title
Context: Indicates the running operation to the user. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — do not translate.
Constraints: Single line; auto-shrinks.

t.ar: جارٍ إعادة المزامنة مع Apple Health
t.hi: Apple Health के साथ सिंक हो रहा है
t.vi: Đang đồng bộ với Apple Health

en: We're uploading all your drinks. This can take a while. Please keep the app open
context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — subtitle paragraph below the title, shown while the bulk export is in progress.
Type: paragraph (informational)
Context: Tells the user the export may take a while and asks them not to close the app. The export continues in foreground; backgrounding the app risks iOS killing the process and partial state.
Constraints: 1-2 short sentences.

t.ar: نقوم برفع جميع مشروباتك. قد يستغرق ذلك بعض الوقت. يرجى إبقاء التطبيق مفتوحًا
t.da: Vi uploader alle dine drikke. Det kan tage et stykke tid. Lad venligst appen være åben
t.de: Wir laden alle deine Getränke hoch. Das kann eine Weile dauern. Bitte halte die App geöffnet
t.en: We're uploading all your drinks. This can take a while. Please keep the app open
t.es: Estamos subiendo todas tus bebidas. Esto puede tardar un poco. Mantén la app abierta
t.fr: Envoi de toutes tes boissons en cours. Cela peut prendre un moment. Garde l'application ouverte
t.hi: हम तुम्हारे सारे पेय अपलोड कर रहे हैं। इसमें थोड़ा समय लग सकता है। ऐप खुला रखो
t.id: Kami sedang mengunggah semua minumanmu. Proses ini mungkin memakan waktu. Biarkan aplikasi tetap terbuka
t.it: Stiamo caricando tutte le tue bevande. Potrebbe richiedere un po' di tempo. Tieni l'app aperta
t.ja: すべての飲み物をアップロードしています。しばらく時間がかかる場合があります。アプリを開いたままにしてください
t.ko: 모든 음료를 업로드하고 있어요. 시간이 좀 걸릴 수 있어요. 앱을 열어 둔 채로 기다려 주세요
t.ms: Kami sedang memuat naik semua minuman awak. Ini mungkin mengambil sedikit masa. Sila pastikan aplikasi ini terbuka
t.nb: Vi laster opp alle drikkene dine. Dette kan ta litt tid. Hold appen åpen
t.nl: We uploaden al je drankjes. Dit kan even duren. Houd de app open
t.pl: Przesyłamy wszystkie twoje napoje. To może chwilę potrwać. Nie zamykaj aplikacji
t.pt_BR: Estamos enviando todas as suas bebidas. Isso pode levar um tempo. Deixe o app aberto
t.ru: Загружаем все напитки. Это может занять время. Оставь приложение открытым
t.sv: Vi laddar upp alla dina drycker. Det kan ta en stund. Håll appen öppen
t.tr: Tüm içeceklerin yükleniyor. Bu biraz sürebilir. Lütfen uygulamayı açık tut
t.vi: Đang tải lên tất cả đồ uống của bạn. Việc này có thể mất một lúc. Vui lòng giữ ứng dụng mở
t.zh_CN: 正在上传所有饮品。这可能需要一些时间。请保持应用打开

context:

  [%1$i] — number of records processed so far
  [%2$i] — total number of records to process
Constraints: Keep short. Translation must preserve both ordered placeholders.

Placeholders:
  [%1$s] — formatted count of newly added drink records
  [%2$s] — formatted count of drink records already present in Apple Health
  [%3$s] — formatted count of all processed drink records
Constraints: Keep three short lines. Translation must preserve all ordered placeholders and line breaks.

en: Couldn't upload: [%1$s]. Please allow full access in Apple Health
context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — extra line appended to the success summary when some drinks could not be uploaded because the matching Apple Health permission (water / caffeine / alcohol) is turned off.
Type: status message (single line appended after appleHealthResyncDoneSummary)
Context: Tells the user that N records were skipped not because they were already synced, but because the app lacks write access for them — they should grant the permission in Apple Health and re-run.
Placeholders:
  [%1$s] — formatted count of drink records that couldn't be uploaded for lack of permission
Constraints: Period between the sentences only — no trailing period after "Apple Health". "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — do not translate. Translation must preserve the ordered placeholder.

t.ar: تعذّر الرفع: [%1$s]. يرجى السماح بكل الأذونات في Apple Health
t.da: Kunne ikke uploade: [%1$s]. Giv venligst fuld adgang i Apple Health
t.de: Konnte nicht hochladen: [%1$s]. Bitte erteile in Apple Health alle Berechtigungen
t.en: Couldn't upload: [%1$s]. Please allow full access in Apple Health
t.es: No se han podido subir: [%1$s]. Permite todos los accesos en Apple Health
t.fr: Impossible d'envoyer : [%1$s]. Autorise tous les accès dans Apple Health
t.hi: अपलोड नहीं हो सके: [%1$s]। Apple Health में सारे एक्सेस की अनुमति दो
t.id: Tidak dapat mengunggah: [%1$s]. Silakan izinkan semua akses di Apple Health
t.it: Impossibile caricare: [%1$s]. Consenti tutti gli accessi in Apple Health
t.ja: アップロードできませんでした: [%1$s]。Apple Healthですべてのアクセスを許可してください
t.ko: 업로드할 수 없음: [%1$s]. Apple Health에서 모든 접근 권한을 허용해 주세요
t.ms: Tidak dapat memuat naik: [%1$s]. Sila benarkan semua akses dalam Apple Health
t.nb: Kunne ikke laste opp: [%1$s]. Gi alle tilganger i Apple Health
t.nl: Kon niet uploaden: [%1$s]. Geef alle toegang in Apple Health
t.pl: Nie udało się przesłać: [%1$s]. Zezwól na wszystkie uprawnienia w Apple Health
t.pt_BR: Não foi possível enviar: [%1$s]. Permita todos os acessos no Apple Health
t.ru: Не удалось загрузить: [%1$s]. Разреши полный доступ в Apple Health
t.sv: Kunde inte laddas upp: [%1$s]. Tillåt alla behörigheter i Apple Health

t.zh_CN: 无法上传：[%1$s]。请在 Apple Health 中开启全部权限

en: All your drinks are already in Apple Health
context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — success message shown after the bulk export completes when nothing new needed uploading (every drink already in Apple Health).
Type: status message
Context: Reassures the user that the export ran but found no new records to push — all drinks are already in sync.
Constraints: Single sentence.

t.ar: جميع مشروباتك موجودة بالفعل في Apple Health
t.da: Alle dine drikke er allerede i Apple Health
t.de: Alle deine Getränke sind bereits in Apple Health

t.es: Todas tus bebidas ya están en Apple Health

t.nl: Al je drankjes staan al in Apple Health

t.vi: Tất cả đồ uống của bạn đã có trong Apple Health

en: You don't have any drinks to upload yet
context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — message shown when the user starts the re-sync but has no eligible drinks stored locally.
Type: status message
Context: Edge case for new users or users who haven't logged any drinks yet. Single sentence.

t.da: Du har ingen drikke at uploade endnu
t.de: Du hast noch keine Getränke zum Hochladen
t.en: You don't have any drinks to upload yet
t.es: Aún no tienes bebidas para subir
t.fr: Tu n'as pas encore de boissons à envoyer
t.hi: अभी अपलोड करने के लिए कोई पेय नहीं है

t.it: Non hai ancora bevande da caricare

en: Apple Health is not available on this device
context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync — alert body shown when Apple Health is not available on the device (e.g., iPad without HealthKit support).
Type: alert message
Context: Explains the device-level unavailability — distinct from "permissions denied" (use existing appleHealthPermission key for that case). "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — do not translate.
Constraints: Single sentence.

t.ar: Apple Health غير متاح على هذا الجهاز
t.da: Apple Health er ikke tilgængelig på denne enhed
t.de: Apple Health ist auf diesem Gerät nicht verfügbar
t.en: Apple Health is not available on this device
t.es: Apple Health no está disponible en este dispositivo
t.fr: Apple Health n'est pas disponible sur cet appareil
t.hi: इस डिवाइस पर Apple Health उपलब्ध नहीं है
t.id: Apple Health tidak tersedia di perangkat ini
t.it: Apple Health non è disponibile su questo dispositivo
t.ja: このデバイスではApple Healthを利用できません
t.ko: 이 기기에서는 Apple Health를 사용할 수 없어요
t.ms: Apple Health tidak tersedia pada peranti ini
t.nb: Apple Health er ikke tilgjengelig på denne enheten
t.nl: Apple Health is niet beschikbaar op dit apparaat
t.pl: Apple Health nie jest dostępne na tym urządzeniu

t.ru: Apple Health недоступен на этом устройстве
t.sv: Apple Health är inte tillgängligt på den här enheten
t.vi: Apple Health không khả dụng trên thiết bị này
t.zh_CN: 此设备不支持 Apple Health

en: Stop re-sync? Drinks already uploaded will stay in Apple Health
context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — confirmation alert body shown when the user taps the close button mid-export.
Type: alert message
Context: Reassures the user that already-uploaded drinks won't be removed if they stop the operation. Pairs with the "appleHealthResyncCancelConfirmAction" action. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — do not translate.
Constraints: Single sentence.

t.ar: هل تريد إيقاف إعادة المزامنة؟ ستبقى المشروبات المرفوعة في Apple Health
t.da: Stop synkroniseringen? Allerede uploadede drikke forbliver i Apple Health
t.de: Synchronisierung stoppen? Bereits hochgeladene Getränke bleiben in Apple Health
t.en: Stop re-sync? Drinks already uploaded will stay in Apple Health
t.es: ¿Detener la sincronización? Las bebidas ya subidas se mantendrán en Apple Health
t.fr: Arrêter la resynchronisation ? Les boissons déjà envoyées resteront dans Apple Health
t.hi: फिर से सिंक करना बंद करना है? पहले से अपलोड हुए पेय Apple Health में रहेंगे
t.id: Hentikan sinkronisasi ulang? Minuman yang sudah diunggah akan tetap ada di Apple Health

t.ja: 再同期を停止しますか？すでにアップロードされた飲み物はApple Healthに残ります
t.ko: 동기화를 중단할까요? 이미 업로드된 음료는 Apple Health에 그대로 유지돼요
t.ms: Hentikan penyegerakan semula? Minuman yang telah dimuat naik akan kekal dalam Apple Health
t.nb: Stopp synkroniseringen? Drikker som allerede er lastet opp blir værende i Apple Health
t.nl: Synchronisatie stoppen? Al geüploade drankjes blijven in Apple Health
t.pl: Zatrzymać synchronizację? Już przesłane napoje pozostaną w Apple Health
t.pt_BR: Parar sincronização? As bebidas já enviadas permanecerão no Apple Health
t.ru: Остановить синхронизацию? Уже загруженные напитки останутся в Apple Health
t.sv: Stoppa synkroniseringen? Redan uppladdade drycker finns kvar i Apple Health
t.tr: Yeniden senkronizasyonu durdurmak mı istiyorsun? Yüklenen içecekler Apple Health'te kalacak
t.vi: Dừng đồng bộ lại? Đồ uống đã tải lên vẫn sẽ ở trong Apple Health
t.zh_CN: 停止重新同步？已上传的饮品会保留在 Apple Health 中

context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — confirmation alert primary action shown when the user taps the close button mid-export.
Type: button label
Context: Confirms stopping the bulk re-export. Destructive action style (red text on iOS). Pairs with the generic "cancel" key.
Constraints: Keep short — alert action.

Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — header title shown after the bulk export has finished (any terminal success state: fully exported / nothing new / no eligible drinks).
Type: screen header / navigation title
Context: Replaces the in-progress title to signal the operation is done. Subtitle below carries the specific outcome. "Apple Health" is the Apple product name — do not translate.
Constraints: Keep short — drawer header.

en: A re-sync is already in progress. Please wait for it to finish
context:
Surface: Apple Health re-sync drawer modal — message shown when the user attempts to start a re-sync while another re-sync is already running (rare; UI usually prevents this).
Type: status message
Context: Defensive fallback informing the user that the previous re-sync is still in progress. The user should wait for it to finish.
Constraints: Single sentence.

t.ar: إعادة المزامنة قيد التقدم بالفعل. يرجى الانتظار حتى تكتمل
t.da: En synkronisering kører allerede. Vent venligst på, at den er færdig
t.de: Eine Synchronisierung läuft bereits. Bitte warte, bis sie abgeschlossen ist
t.en: A re-sync is already in progress. Please wait for it to finish
t.es: Ya hay una sincronización en curso. Espera a que termine
t.fr: Une resynchronisation est déjà en cours. Attends qu'elle se termine
t.hi: फिर से सिंक पहले से चल रहा है। इसके पूरा होने का इंतज़ार करो
t.id: Sinkronisasi ulang sedang berlangsung. Silakan tunggu hingga selesai
t.it: Una risincronizzazione è già in corso. Attendi il suo completamento
t.ja: 再同期はすでに実行中です。完了するまでお待ちください
t.ko: 이미 다시 동기화가 진행 중이에요. 완료될 때까지 기다려 주세요
t.ms: Penyegerakan semula sedang berjalan. Sila tunggu sehingga selesai
t.nb: En synkronisering pågår allerede. Vent til den er ferdig
t.nl: Er is al een synchronisatie bezig. Wacht tot deze voltooid is
t.pl: Synchronizacja już trwa. Poczekaj na jej zakończenie
t.pt_BR: Uma sincronização já está em andamento. Espere ela terminar
t.ru: Синхронизация уже выполняется. Дождись её завершения
t.sv: En synkronisering pågår redan. Vänta tills den är klar

t.vi: Đồng bộ lại đang diễn ra. Vui lòng đợi cho đến khi hoàn tất
